title: 巧克力粉甜甜圈的高端静物摄影预设
author: Sharon Riley
prompt:
1) 垂直拍摄的影棚产品摄影，以上传的产品参考照片为基础，拍摄撒有巧克力粉的甜甜圈。甜甜圈居中放置在一个涂有温暖可可色的哑光圆形底座上，保持了原始产品精确的标志、文字和形状。构图严格遵循单色“同色系”美学，背景、表面和道具均采用不同深浅的棕色——从深浓咖啡色到浅拿铁色——营造出精致、富有层次感的视觉体验。甜甜圈是焦点，其顶部粉末的磨砂质感与光滑、简约的周围环境形成了触觉上的对比。
灯光设计柔和而有方向性，利用大型柔光罩将光线包裹在甜甜圈的曲线周围，同时保持微妙的阴影以勾勒其体积。背景是丰富摩卡色调的无缝纸质背景，营造出无干扰的环境，与产品的调色板和谐融合。图像采用高分辨率人像镜头拍摄，确保巧克力粉细节清晰对焦，同时让单色调融合成奶油般柔和、统一的商业编辑风格。

2) 垂直拍摄的影棚产品摄影，以上传的产品参考照片为基础，拍摄撒有巧克力粉的甜甜圈，保持了原始产品精确的形状和外观。甜甜圈居中放置，作为焦点，周围环绕着一个精致、多层次的纸艺装置。手工切割的纹理艺术纸层，采用温暖、互补的摩卡色、拿铁色、奶油色和柔和金色调，堆叠并排列成有机、波浪状的图案，围绕甜甜圈底部构建，营造出深度和精致的三维地形效果。
灯光设计精巧，使用柔和、有方向性的影棚灯，在纸层之间投射出柔和、清晰的阴影，强调了精确的切口和材料的触感。相机角度为平视直拍，捕捉到可可粉丰富的质感与纸艺光滑、哑光饰面之间的对比。画面采用垂直构图，景深较浅，确保甜甜圈清晰锐利地对焦，而周围的纸层则逐渐模糊成抽象的艺术背景，增强了场景的优质手工感。

3) 垂直拍摄的影棚产品摄影，以上传的产品参考照片为基础，拍摄撒有巧克力粉的甜甜圈，居中放置在定制的水磨石表面上，保持了原始产品精确的形状和外观。水磨石图案融合了时尚的嵌入式骨料碎片，采用烧焦橙色、森林绿、芥末黄和奶油色的柔和色调，置于温暖的米色基底中，与甜甜圈上哑光的可可粉形成了鲜明而精致的纹理对比。
环境是一个受控的影棚设置，带有 s
prompt_en:
1) Vertical studio product photography of the chocolate-dusted donut based on the upload reference photo of the product, centered on a matte, circular podium painted in a warm cocoa shade, maintaining the exact logo, text, and shape of the original product. The composition strictly adheres to a monochromatic "tone-on-tone" aesthetic, where the background, surface, and props utilize varying shades of brown—from deep espresso to light latte—to create a sophisticated, layered visual experience. The donut acts as the focal point, with the dusty texture of the topping providing a tactile contrast to the smooth, minimal surroundings.
The lighting is designed to be soft yet directional, utilizing a large diffuser to wrap light around the curves of the donut while maintaining subtle shadows that define its volume. The background is a seamless paper backdrop in a rich mocha tone, creating a distraction-free environment that blends harmoniously with the product's color palette. The image is captured with a high-resolution portrait lens, ensuring crisp focus on the chocolate powder details while allowing the monochromatic colors to melt together in a creamy, cohesive commercial editorial style.

2) Vertical studio product photography of the chocolate-dusted donut based on the upload reference photo of the product, maintaining the exact shape and appearance of the original. The donut is positioned centrally, acting as the focal point amidst an intricate, multi-layered paper craft installation. Hand-cut layers of textured art paper in warm, complementary shades of mocha, latte, cream, and muted gold are stacked and arranged in organic, wave-like patterns that build up around the base of the donut, creating depth and a sophisticated, three-dimensional topographical effect.
The lighting is expertly designed using soft, directional studio lights that cast gentle, defined shadows between the paper layers, emphasizing the precise cutouts and the tactile quality of the materials. The camera angle is straight-on at eye level, capturing the rich texture of the cocoa powder against the smooth, matte finish of the paper art. The shot is framed vertically with a shallow depth of field, ensuring the donut is in razor-sharp focus while the surrounding paper layers gradually blur into an abstract, artistic backdrop, enhancing the premium, handcrafted feel of the scene.

3) Vertical studio product photography of the chocolate-dusted donut based on the upload reference photo of the product, placed centrally on a custom-made terrazzo stone surface, maintaining the exact shape and appearance of the original product. The terrazzo pattern features a stylish mix of embedded aggregate chips in muted tones of burnt orange, forest green, mustard yellow, and cream set within a warm beige base, creating a vibrant yet sophisticated textural contrast with the matte cocoa powder on the donut.

title: 符号冲突
author: @B_4AI
prompt:
悬浮摄影风格的超现实而超现实的图像，其中 [主体] 的元素混乱而随机地漂浮在伸出的手上方，与直接对立的象征性元素交织在一起。

背景动态形成，通过模糊或抽象的细节在视觉上体现主题及其对立面的象征意义，这些细节反映了两者之间的张力或和谐——就像梦中的镜子。

每个元素都以独特的角度和不同的距离漂浮。

背景：根据主体及其对立面而变化

照明：柔和的电影感，带有梦幻般的阴影

风格：超写实 + 悬浮摄影 + 奇幻

长宽比：1：1
prompt_en:
A surreal yet hyper-realistic image in levitation photography style, where elements of [subject] float chaotically and randomly above an outstretched hand, interwoven with symbolic elements that directly oppose it.

The background forms dynamically to visually embody the symbolism of the subject and its opposite, through blurred or abstract details that reflect either tension or harmony between the two—like a mirror inside a dream.

Each element floats at a unique angle and varying distance.

Background: Shifts according to the subject and its opposite

Lighting: Soft cinematic with dreamy shadows

Style: Hyper-realistic + Levitation Photography + Fantasy

Aspect Ratio: 1:1

title: 液体倾倒摄影
author: Nano banana
prompt:
液体倾倒产品摄影

[产品] 倾倒着[液体：蜂蜜、油、颜料、牛奶]，在接触的瞬间被捕捉，滴落并覆盖表面，粘稠的流动被凝固在时间里，影棚灯光展现液体质感，感官产品摄影，诱人的美学]
prompt_en:
Liquid Pour Product Photography

[PRODUCT] with [liquid: honey, oil, paint, milk] being poured over it, captured at moment of contact, dripping and coating surface, viscous flow frozen in time, studio lighting revealing liquid texture, sensory product photography, indulgent aesthetic

title: 青花瓷风格
author: firatbilal
prompt: 以上传的图片作为精确的视觉基础，将其转换为超现实风格的3D模型，同时保留标志的原始形状和比例。应用传统的奥斯曼伊兹尼克陶瓷材质效果：以温暖的白色釉面为底，辅以细腻的裂纹纹理；在表面叠加鲜艳的钴蓝色、绿松石色以及大胆的红色花卉图案（如郁金香、康乃馨和阿拉伯式藤蔓）。整个标志应被视为一个独立的瓷器雕塑，具有凸起的、手工绘制的细节，并且没有背景板或瓷砖结构。确保装饰图案优雅地贴合布加迪标志的轮廓，同时不影响其整体形态。使用Cinema 4D软件中的产品光照技术，将模型渲染在纯黑色背景上，突出陶瓷材质的光泽感、层次深度以及微妙的反射效果。最终成品应呈现出一种奢华的手工陶瓷再诠释风格，巧妙融合了传统装饰艺术与现代品牌形象。
prompt_en: Using the uploaded image as the exact visual base, transform it into a hyper-realistic 3D object that retains the original shape and proportions of the logo only. Apply traditional Ottoman Iznik ceramic textures—featuring a warm white glazed base with delicate crackle lines, overlaid with vivid cobalt blue, turquoise, and bold red floral motifs such as tulips, carnations, and arabesque vines. The entire logo should be treated as a standalone porcelain sculpture with raised, hand-painted detailing and no background plate or tile structure. Ensure the decorative patterns elegantly follow the contours of the Bugatti logo, without altering its form. Render the object in a pure black background with Cinema 4D-style product lighting—highlighting realistic ceramic gloss, material depth, and subtle reflections. The final result should feel like a luxurious handcrafted ceramic reinterpretation, balancing heritage ornamentation with industrial branding.

title: 警方照片风格
author: @Artedeingenio
prompt:
Transform this image into a realistic police mugshot.
Add a gray background with height markings, harsh frontal lighting, and a nameplate with the person's name and a case number.
The photo should look like an official FBI or police booking photo, vertical format (4:5), with a neutral expression and no accessories.
prompt_en:
Transform this image into a realistic police mugshot.
Add a gray background with height markings, harsh frontal lighting, and a nameplate with the person's name and a case number.
The photo should look like an official FBI or police booking photo, vertical format (4:5), with a neutral expression and no accessories.

title: 品牌折叠纸
author: HBCoop_
prompt:
一张印有品牌标识的平面纸张在折叠过程中会自动变成某个产品（例如“可口可乐瓶”、“耐克运动鞋”或“巨无霸”）的完整三维形态。  

纸张的颜色与该品牌的标志性色调以及产品的天然色彩相得益彰（例如，可口可乐的红色和白色；巨无霸的棕色、绿色和黄色）。  

场景采用戏剧性的摄影灯效，展现了纸张折叠过程中的细腻纹理变化，同时营造出柔和的渐变阴影效果。整个设计融合了日本极简主义美学元素与优雅的负空间处理手法，生动呈现出从平面品牌标识到立体产品形态的惊艳转变过程。
prompt_en:
A flat branded paper folds itself into the full 3D shape of a [insert product or item, e.g. “Coca-Cola bottle”, “Nike sneaker”, “Big Mac”], mid-motion. 

The paper colors match the [insert brand name] brand’s signature palette and the natural colors of the item (e.g., [describe key colors or ingredients, like “red and white for Coca-Cola”, “brown, green, yellow for Big Mac”]).

Dramatic studio lighting, origami texture detail, soft gradient shadows. Stylized with Japanese minimalism and elegant negative space. The scene captures a clean, elevated transformation from flat brand identity into sculptural product form.

title: 品牌奢华之物从天而降
author: hc_dsn
prompt:
创建一张比例为1:1的图片：

title: Glitch 矢量徽标样式

The logo appears corrupted or hacked, as if captured from a malfunctioning screen. Use a black or dark background for contrast, neon or high-saturation color palette, and sharp angular forms.

title: 自定义主题公园
author: @AI_Kei75
prompt:
生成一张基于原图的逼真主题公园图像。
主题公园及其游玩的人物需以极其逼真的风格呈现。白天，阳光明媚。
色彩方案和设计从原图中提取，并应用于各种设施的色彩和设计上。
图像中摆放的元素包括：根据原图设计的车辆和建筑、以原图为基础适度夸张的吉祥物服装、印有原图的标牌。
吉祥物服装设计应以原图为元素，但适度变形以呈现逼真效果。
人物和吉祥物服装的尺寸必须合理，不得不符合实际比例。
即使原图是动漫风格，最终生成的图像也必须是逼真的主题公园。务必遵循以上规则。
prompt_en:
Generate a realistic image of a theme park based on the original picture.  
The theme park and its characters should be depicted in an extremely realistic style. The scene is set during daytime with bright sunshine.  
Extract the color scheme and design elements from the original image and apply them to various attractions and facilities.  
Elements included in the image should be: vehicles and buildings designed based on the original image, mascot costumes that are moderately exaggerated but inspired by the original image, and signs featuring the original image.  
The mascot costumes should incorporate elements from the original image but be slightly stylized to enhance realism.  
The sizes of characters and mascot costumes must be proportionate and realistic; no exaggerated or unrealistic proportions are allowed.  
Even if the original image is in an anime style, the final generated image must depict a realistic theme park.  
Please strictly follow these instructions.

title: 坐在巨大光滑的白色岩层上
author: @eyishazyer
prompt:
这幅超现实主义肖像画描绘了一位年轻男子坐在巨大光滑的白色岩层上，沐浴在自然阳光下。他身穿宽松略带褶皱的米色亚麻衬衫，最上面的纽扣敞开着，搭配白色长裤。他的装扮散发着轻松的地中海风情。
他向后仰着身子，一只手扶着岩石，另一只手放在膝盖上，目光略微侧向一侧。他戴着一副细长的黑色矩形墨镜。他的发型短而略显凌乱，阳光在他的衣服和纹理分明的岩石上投下柔和的阴影。
整体氛围平静、时尚，充满地中海风情。脸部应该与参考照片完全匹配。
prompt_en:
A hyper-realistic portrait of a young man sitting on large, smooth white rocky formations under natural sunlight. He is wearing a loose, slightly crumpled beige linen shirt with the top buttons open, paired with white trousers. His outfit gives a relaxed, Mediterranean vibe.
He is leaning back, one arm resting on the rock, and the other hand on his knee, looking slightly to the side. He wears slim black rectangular sunglasses. His hairstyle is short, slightly messy, and the sunlight casts soft shadows across his outfit and the textured rocks.
The overall atmosphere is calm, stylish, and Mediterranean-inspired. The face should match exactly with the reference photo.

prompt_en: A giant [transparent or glossy] [object/container] with a miniature 3D diorama inside it, depicting [a symbolic or narrative scene], studio-lit with soft shadows, placed on a neutral matte surface. Emphasize visual contrast between the scale of the capsule and the detail within. Highlight texture, light refraction, and emotional tone (e.g., surreal, poetic, or sci-fi).

title: 高端果汁3D商业摄影
author: Zara
prompt:
提示：

创作一张超逼真的 3D 商业风格产品图，展示一瓶优质樱桃汁悬浮在半空中，瓶身表面凝结着精致的水滴。瓶身应呈现清新亮丽的视觉效果，每一滴水珠都反射着环境光，增强照片的真实感。在产品周围添加动态元素，例如飞溅的樱桃汁、完整的樱桃和冰块，以高速运动的瞬间定格，每个元素都清晰锐利，充满活力。

漂浮的樱桃茎和叶子也应加入其中，以增强清新活力之感。

背景采用浓郁的深红色和酒红色渐变，与樱桃汁的浓郁色泽相得益彰，营造出奢华和高端的氛围。产品应位于画面中心，略微倾斜，以展现动感和精致感。

使用电影级的影棚灯光，在瓶身上营造明亮的高光、清晰的阴影和高对比度，打造奢华精致的视觉效果。确保瓶身标签清晰可见，其下方有微妙的反射，为画面增添层次感和真实感。

整体美感必须体现奢华、清新和高品质，所有元素都应共同打造高端且引人注目的视觉效果。画面应充满活力、清新怡人，重点突出樱桃汁的鲜艳色彩和新鲜质感。

技术规格：

宽高比：4:5

分辨率：超高清

灯光：影棚级灯光，明亮的高光、微妙的反射和高对比度

细节：极其注重冷凝水、水滴和高速运动元素的细节表现。
prompt_en:
3D Ultra Realistic Product Shot · Created with Gemini Banana Pro
Prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic 3D commercial-style product shot of a premium cherry juice bottle, suspended mid-air with intricate condensation droplets on its surface. The bottle should appear fresh and vibrant, with each condensation bead reflecting ambient light to enhance photorealism. Surround the product with dynamic elements like splashing droplets of cherry juice, whole cherries, and ice cubes, frozen in high-speed motion, each element sharply defined with vibrant clarity.
Floating cherry stems and leaves should also be included to enhance the sense of freshness and energy.
Set the background against a rich, deep red and burgundy gradient, which complements the rich color of the cherry juice and evokes a sense of indulgence and premium quality. The product should be centrally placed, slightly tilted to convey a sense of movement and sophistication.
Use cinematic, studio-style lighting with bright highlights reflecting off the bottle, crisp shadows, and high contrast to create a luxurious, polished look. Ensure the bottle’s label is clearly visible, with subtle reflections beneath it, adding depth and realism to the scene.
The overall aesthetic must evoke indulgence, freshness, and premium quality, with all elements contributing to a high-end, visually striking image. The scene should feel rich, fresh, and full of vitality,with a focus on the vibrant color and fresh nature of the cherry juice.
Technical Specifications:
Aspect Ratio: 4:5
Resolution: Ultra-HD quality
Lighting: Studio-style, cinematic with bright highlights, subtle reflections, and high contrast
Detailing: Extreme attention to condensation, droplets, and high-speed motion of elements

title: 怪诞又梦幻的超现实插画
author: @fy360593
prompt:
将上传的图片转换为一幅超现实插画，营造出怪诞又梦幻的氛围。
色彩搭配：采用柔和色调（浅绿、棕色、灰色），偶尔点缀一抹淡雅的绿色。
光线效果：柔和、弥漫的近乎空灵的光线，融合渐变色与细微的高光。
质感与媒介感：类似油画的笔触、淡淡的水彩晕染或松散的手绘线条，带有轻微的颗粒质感。
氛围与构图：具有夸张、富有表现力的特征（如拉长的脸型或饱含情感的眼睛），这是卡通或提线木偶风格插画的典型特点，但要将其应用于超现实、略带奇幻色彩的场景中。
整体美学：将对细节的真实刻画与一丝超现实的怪诞感相融合 —— 营造出一种宁静又略带诡异的氛围。
prompt_en:
Transform the uploaded image into a surreal illustration with a whimsical, dream‑like vibe.
• Color palette: muted tones (soft greens, browns, greys) with occasional gentle pops of green.
• Lighting: soft, diffused, almost ethereal light that blends gradients and subtle highlights.
• Texture & medium feel: oil‑painting‑like brushstrokes, faint watercolor washes, or loose hand‑drawn linework, with a slight grainy texture.
• Mood & composition: exaggerated, expressive features (e.g., elongated faces or emotive eyes) characteristic of cartoonish or Muppet‑style illustrations, but applied in a surreal, slightly fantastical context.
• Overall aesthetic: blend realistic attention to detail with a touch of surreal whimsy—think serene, slightly uncanny atmosphere.

title: 一张戏剧性的黑白工作室肖像照
author: @hellokaton
prompt:
一张戏剧性的黑白工作室肖像照。主体背对镜头站立，上半身轻微转向侧面，头微微低下，脸部侧面轮廓部分可见。表情平静而内省，营造出一种安静、神秘的氛围。

灯光：一盏强烈的侧光，投下鲜明的对比。一束干净的水平光束横切过背景墙。画面大部分处于阴影之中，着重强调剪影和轮廓。
氛围：极简主义，情绪化，电影感，唤起优雅与孤独感。主体身穿深色夹克，与阴影融为一体，呈现出流畅利落的时尚杂志风格。
构图：使用全画幅相机拍摄，85mm镜头，f/1.8大光圈营造浅景深效果，ISO 200，快门速度1/125秒。中景构图（从腰部到头部），突出剪影、侧脸和姿态。
后期：高对比度的黑白效果，柔和的色调渐变，深邃的阴影，添加轻微的胶片颗粒以增加质感，最终呈现精致的艺术杂志风格。
prompt_en:
A dramatic black-and-white studio portrait. The subject stands with their back to the camera, torso slightly turned to the side, head gently lowered, revealing the profile silhouette of the face. The expression is calm and introspective, creating a quiet, mysterious atmosphere.

Lighting: A strong side light produces vivid contrast. A clean, horizontal beam cuts across the background wall. Most of the frame is in shadow, emphasizing silhouette and contours.

Mood: Minimalist, emotional, cinematic, evoking elegance and loneliness. The subject wears a dark jacket that blends into the shadows, presenting a sleek, fashion magazine style.

Composition: Shot with a full-frame camera using an 85mm lens, aperture f/1.8 for a shallow depth of field, ISO 200, shutter speed 1/125 sec. Medium shot (from waist to head), highlighting silhouette, profile, and posture.

Post-processing: High-contrast black-and-white effect with soft tonal gradients, deep shadows, slight film grain added for texture, resulting in a refined art magazine aesthetic.

title: 3D蓬松的物体
author: @TechieBySA
prompt: 将[品牌名称]标志转化为超逼真、3D 蓬松的物体。保持原始形状和品牌的确切颜色。用柔软、细节丰富的毛皮覆盖整个表面，具有逼真的毛发纹理。使用电影感光效创造微妙的后光和柔和的阴影，使标志看起来有触感和超现实。将标志放在干净黑色背景的中心，轻轻漂浮，具有现代时尚感。风格应感觉温馨、俏皮、视觉上引人注目。以超高清 4K 分辨率渲染，具有照片级真实质量。
prompt_en: Transform the [BRAND NAME] logo into a hyper-realistic, 3D fluffy object. Keep the original shape and exact brand colors. Cover the entire surface in soft, detailed fur with a realistic hair texture. Use cinematic lighting to create subtle backlighting and soft shadows, making the logo appear tactile and surreal. Place the logo in the center of a clean black background, floating gently with a modern, stylish look. The style should feel cozy, playful, and visually striking. Render in ultra-high 4K resolution with photorealistic quality.

1、"X-CODE" in futuristic glitch style, with pixel breakups and neon overlays

title: 品牌产品化身梦幻咖啡馆微型场景
author: Aleena Amir
prompt:
一个梦幻般的微缩都市场景，其中一个超大的 [{"brand product" "BRAND PRODUCT"}] 被重新构想成一家迷人的咖啡馆，以一种俏皮而高端的方式将产品设计与建筑融为一体。

产品构成了建筑的上半部分，而地面层则变成了一个舒适的咖啡馆店面，散发着温暖诱人的光芒。

透明的玻璃窗户展现出精致的微缩内部，里面有小桌子、凳子和雅致的装饰，强调了工艺和比例。

周围的街道经过精心设计，配有精致的路灯、小巧的城市细节和干净的人行道，营造出温馨的社区氛围。

柔和的电影式灯光增强了异想天开的氛围，带有柔和的高光和自然的阴影。
超精细、超逼真的微缩渲染，高端广告美学，超现实而可信的比例，精致的艺术指导，高分辨率。
prompt_en:
A dreamlike miniature urban scene where an oversized [{"brand product" "BRAND PRODUCT"}] is reimagined as a charming café, blending product design with architecture in a playful yet premium way.

The product forms the upper structure of the building, while the ground level transforms into a cozy café storefront, glowing with warm, inviting light.

Transparent glass windows reveal a detailed miniature interior with tiny tables, stools, and subtle décor, emphasizing craftsmanship and scale.

The surrounding street is thoughtfully styled with delicate street lamps, small urban details, and clean pavement, creating a welcoming neighborhood atmosphere.

Soft, cinematic lighting enhances the whimsical mood, with gentle highlights and natural shadows.
Ultra-detailed, hyperrealistic miniature rendering, premium advertising aesthetic, surreal yet believable scale, refined art direction, high resolution.

title: 草莓主题奢华甜品广告视觉呈现
author: SimplyDera ◻
prompt: 风味主题：【{"flavor theme" "Strawberry"}】。超高端甜点广告海报，超写实，令人垂涎欲滴。一个高大的水晶圣代杯居中，里面装满了以风味主题为灵感的浓郁奶油甜点，搭配多种来自相同风味和色调的独特互补食材，即使风味主题本身在视觉上很明显，这些食材在形式、质地或制备方式上也明显不同；对于视觉上模糊或乳制品风味，应包含源自风味本身的清晰可辨的固体装饰元素。冰淇淋球看起来浓密、冰冷、奶油状，边缘柔软融化。与风味相符的液体飞溅物清晰地源自杯内，从甜点本身向上和向外迸发，浓稠、有光泽、受重力驱动，以不规则的丝带和水滴状缓慢流淌，覆盖杯子的边缘和内壁。水果或点缀物看起来多汁，带有可见的水分，一些放置在前景以增加深度。无缝无限工作室背景，采用精致的中等到深色调，干净无纹理，柔和照明，带有微妙的色调渐变，与风味主题颜色匹配。电影级灯光，浅景深，高端商业美学，奢华而精致，超细节，8k 画质。无文字，无标志，无水印，无包装，无边框，无 CGI 或卡通外观。
prompt_en: Flavor theme: 【{"flavor theme" "Strawberry"}】. Ultra-premium dessert advertising poster, hyper-realistic and intensely mouth-watering. A tall crystal sundae glass centered, filled with a rich creamy dessert inspired by the flavor theme, paired with multiple distinct complementary ingredients from the same flavor profile and color palette, clearly different in form, texture, or preparation, even when the flavor theme itself is visually obvious; for visually ambiguous or dairy-based flavors, include clearly recognizable solid garnish elements derived from the flavor itself. Ice cream scoops appear dense, cold, and creamy with soft melting edges. Flavor-matched liquid splashes originate clearly from inside the glass, bursting upward and outward from the dessert itself, thick, glossy, and gravity-driven, flowing in irregular ribbons and droplets, coating the rim and inner walls of the glass in slow motion. Fruits or accents appear juicy with visible moisture, some placed in the foreground for depth. Seamless infinite studio background in a refined mid-to-dark tone, clean and texture-free, softly lit with subtle tonal gradients, color-matched to the flavor theme. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high-end commercial aesthetic, indulgent yet refined, hyper-detailed, 8k quality. No text, no logo, no watermark, no packaging, no frame, no CGI or cartoon look.

prompt_en: A hyper-realistic, high-speed food photography scene featuring a bowl suspended mid-air with ingredients exploding outward in perfect motion. Creamy yogurt or smoothie base splashing dramatically, surrounded by flying fruits, berries, banana slices, cereal flakes, granola, nuts, herbs, tortilla chips, or guacamole depending on the variation. Honey dripping from a wooden dipper, liquid splashes frozen in time, ultra-sharp details, glossy textures, vibrant colors. Clean studio background with bold solid color (blue / pink / green), commercial advertising style, macro lens look, shallow depth of field, perfect lighting, ultra-detailed food textures, cinematic composition, 8K ultra-realistic, high-speed photography aesthetic, premium food commercial.

title: 亚克力钥匙扣
author: TechieBySA
prompt: 创建一张逼真的方形图片（1080x1080 像素），展示一个定制的 [LOGO] 标志亚克力钥匙扣，它挂在一个深色背包（如黑色或灰色）的拉链上。该标志必须保持其原始形状、颜色和比例，不得有任何改动。钥匙扣应有一层透明的光泽亚克力，配有银色金属环和扣具。使用柔和的日光或漫射光，避免黄色调。背景设置为现代户外环境，但需模糊处理，以将焦点保持在标志钥匙扣上。
prompt_en: Create a photorealistic square image (1080x1080) showing a custom acrylic keychain version of the [LOGO] logo hanging from the zipper of a dark-colored backpack (e.g. black or grey). The logo must retain its original shape, color, and proportions without any alteration. The keychain should have a clear glossy acrylic layer, clipped with a silver metal ring and clasp. Use soft daylight or diffused lighting to avoid yellow tones. Set the background in a modern outdoor setting, but keep it blurred to maintain focus on the logo keychain.

title: 制作证件照
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt:
截取图片人像头部，帮我做成2寸证件照，要求:
  1、蓝底
  2、职业正装
  3、正脸
  4、微笑

title: 品牌乐器
author: TheRelianceAI
prompt: 这是一张极具风格感且充满活力的[乐器]宣传图片，采用了[品牌]的视觉设计风格。该乐器通过融入该品牌的标志性色彩、图案及美学元素进行了重新设计。画面背景设定在一个充满动感、音乐氛围的环境中，配有发光的装饰元素、符合产品特点的灯光以及欢快的氛围，完美展现了音乐与设计的艺术融合。图片采用3D渲染技术，细节精致、色彩鲜艳，兼具未来感与趣味性。
prompt_en: A highly stylized and vibrant promotional image of a [INSTRUMENT] designed in the visual style of the [BRAND] brand — the instrument is reimagined with iconic colors, patterns, and aesthetic elements of the brand. Set in a dynamic, music-inspired environment, with glowing accents, product-style lighting, and joyful energy. Artistic fusion of music and design. 3D render look, high detail, vibrant colors, futuristic but playful.

title: 品牌杂志
author: TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一个超写实的编辑概念，用于[品牌]与[杂志品牌]的合作。1:1的正方形构图，在时尚的巴黎室内拍摄，室内设有大理石地板和高大的窗户，金色的午后阳光照亮整个场景。一位身着高级定制礼服的模特优雅地摆着姿势，身旁是一个尺寸逼真的[品牌]香水瓶，瓶身上清晰可见[品牌]的标志，香水瓶放置在大理石基座上。超精细的纹理，电影般的写实感，《 Vogue》风格的摄影。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic editorial concept for a collaboration between [BRAND] and [MAGAZINE BRAND]. Square 1:1 composition, shot in a sleek Parisian interior with marble floors and tall windows, golden afternoon light illuminating the scene. A single model in a couture gown poses gracefully beside a realistically sized [BRAND] perfume bottle with the [BRAND] logo clearly visible placed on a marble pedestal. Ultra-refined textures, cinematic realism, Vogue-style photography.

title: 迪奥美妆广告大片创作
author: 𝙕ar⭕on
prompt:
Dior 主题💕：

8K 无压缩 RAW 格式商业摄影作品。一张广角全身照，一位女士坐在一个巨大的粉色化妆品罐上，周围漂浮着各种美妆产品。拍摄对象（真实呈现）：

面部及肌肤：这位女士容貌惊艳却又不失真实感。她的肌肤纹理自然，高光自然，而非塑料般光滑。她是一位棕发女郎，头发随意地向后梳起。

眼睛佩戴灰色柔光美瞳，睫毛浓密卷翘。妆容精致柔和：暖调蜜桃色腮红，裸色亮泽唇妆，眉形清晰，肌肤散发自然光泽。

姿势：她优雅地像模特一样坐在巨大的化妆品罐上，双腿在脚踝处交叉，双手轻轻放在膝盖/下巴上。

服装：一件简约的 Dior 白色露肩纹理连衣裙，心形领口。面料看起来挺括逼真。场景（精确原图构图）：

底座：她端坐在一个巨大的粉色奶油罐上（如同一个基座）。

漂浮物：一些特定的物品悬浮在她周围：左侧：漂浮的粉色化妆海绵和香水瓶，金戒指和珠宝。右侧：漂浮的粉色花朵（牡丹/康乃馨）。烟雾效果：浓厚的粉色烟雾在她身后向上翻滚，将所有漂浮物连接起来。技术风格：焦点：景深极深，画面清晰锐利。女人、罐子和漂浮的香水瓶都清晰可见。只有最近的前景花朵略微虚化（散景）。光线：明亮鲜艳的商业灯光。粉色饱和度高。画质：“Phase One”相机品质——细节超多，无卡通式模糊。

请勿修改我的脸部细节（1000%）

输出杰作图像。

提示 2 🩷：

根据上传的照片，创作一张 8K 超高清电影级写实照片，照片需与照片中的人物面部特征完全一致。

一位魅力四射的女士，面部特征和妆容与附图相同。她拥有一头酒红色长发，身材曲线玲珑有致。她被困在一个巨大的水晶香水瓶中，试图挣脱束缚。瓶内盛满了半透明的粉色香水，她身着一件金属质感的紧身露背礼服，并饰有闪亮的亮片。

香水瓶被一双佩戴着精致珠宝、涂着亮片指甲油的大手高高举起。她只能在粉色液体中看到自己（坐在瓶子上）。

眼睛佩戴灰色柔光美瞳，睫毛浓密卷翘。妆容精致柔和：暖调蜜桃色腮红，裸色亮泽唇妆，眉形清晰，肌肤散发光泽。

背景是一个粉色的摄影棚，灯光效果极具戏剧性。风格：时尚大片，细节丰富，奢华美感，杂志封面风格。16:9 横屏格式。超写实。请使用参考图片。请勿更改任何面部特征。

香水瓶内可以看到完整的身体。
prompt_en:
Dior Commercial Photography create it using Gemini Nano Banana Pro 🍌
Prompt Dior 💕 :
8K uncompressed raw commercial photography. A wide, full-body shot of a woman sitting on a giant pink cosmetic jar, surrounded by floating beauty products.The Subject (Raw Reality):
Face & Skin: The woman is stunning but realistic. Her skin has natural texture and highlights, not plastic smoothness. She is brunette with hair pulled back loosely.
Eyes with grey softlens, long curled voluminous eyelashes. Soft glam makeup: warm peach blush, nude glossy lips, sharp eyebrows, glowing skin highlight.
Pose: She posing elegantly like a model  on the giant jar, legs crossed at the ankles, hands resting gently  lap/chin.
Outfit: A simple, off-the-shoulder Dior white texture dress with a sweetheart neckline. The fabric looks crisp and real.The Scene (Exact Original Composition):
The Base: She is perched on a massive, oversized pink cream jar (like a pedestal).
Floating Objects: Specific items are suspended in the air around her:Left: Floating pink makeup sponges and a perfume, Gold rings and jewelry.Right: Floating pink flower blossoms (peonies/carnations).Smoke Effect: Thick, sculptural pink smoke billows upwards behind her, connecting all the floating items.Technical Style:Focus: Razor-sharp deep depth of field. The woman, the jar, and the floating perfume bottle are all crisp. Only the very closest foreground flowers are slightly blurred (bokeh).Lighting: Bright, vivid commercial lighting. High saturation on the pinks.Quality: "Phase One" camera quality—ultra-detailed, no cartoonish blurring.
Dont change my face 1000%
Output masterpiece image.
Prompt 2 🩷 :
Create 8k ultra hyper cinematic realistic from photo uploaded 100% same facial and face fearures
A glamorous woman with facial features and makeup as in the attached picture. Long burgundy hair, curvy hourglass figure. She is trapped inside a giant crystal perfume bottle, trying to get out, filled with a translucent pink perfume, wearing a metallic, form-fitting gown with backless design and glitter accents.
The bottle is held aloft by oversized hands with intricate jewelry and lacquered nails. She is only visible inside the pink liquid. (Seating on the bottle)
Eyes with grey softlens, long curled voluminous eyelashes. Soft glam makeup: warm peach blush, nude glossy lips, sharp eyebrows, glowing skin highlight.
The background is a pink studio with dramatic cinematic lighting. Fashion editorial, high detail, luxury aesthetic, magazine cover style. 16:9 landscape format. Hyper-realistic. Use reference image. Do not change any facial features.
The full body is visible inside the perfume bottle

title: 动漫雕像放入现实
author: @riddi0908
prompt: 一幅写实的摄影作品。这个人的巨型雕像被安放在东京市中心的广场上，人们仰望着它。
prompt_en: A realistic photographic artwork featuring a giant sculpture of a person placed in a plaza in downtown Tokyo, with people gazing up at it.

title: 蒸饺制作过程的超现实美食摄影
author: Taaruk
prompt: 质朴木板上新鲜出炉的蒸饺（馍馍）的超逼真电影级美食摄影。一个场景展示了成品饺子，面皮油亮，褶皱精致，泛着淡淡的油光，热气袅袅。另一个场景展示了爆炸式分解图：饺子皮和调味肉馅悬浮在空中，面粉颗粒凝固在运动中，香草散落，呈现出戏剧性的慢动作效果。暖色调的氛围灯光，浅景深，深色质朴的厨房背景，专业的影棚美食造型，超精细纹理，电影级真实感，8K，微距摄影，高对比度。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic cinematic food photography of freshly steamed dumplings (momos) on a rustic wooden board. One scene shows finished dumplings with glossy dough, delicate pleats, light oil sheen, and steam rising. Another scene shows an exploded view: dumpling wrappers and spiced minced filling floating mid-air, flour particles frozen in motion, herbs scattered, dramatic slow-motion effect. Warm moody lighting, shallow depth of field, dark rustic kitchen background, professional studio food styling, hyper-detailed textures, cinematic realism, 8K, macro photography, high contrast.

title: 时尚品牌娃娃
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一张超写实的照片，一个时尚娃娃以 [BRAND] 的美学风格，坐在一张带有柔软褶皱的奶油色毛绒床上。这款玩偶的外观反映了该品牌的标志性元素——从头发和服装到配饰——经过精心安排，让人联想到梦幻般的复古风格社论。工作室照明采用温暖的漫射灯光和奶油色的象牙色调调色板，该场景以柔和的玩具屋般的氛围和浅景深模拟奢华时尚摄影。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic photograph of a fashion doll styled in the aesthetic of [BRAND], sitting on a plush, cream-colored bed with soft folds. The doll’s look reflects the brand’s signature elements — from hair and outfit to accessories — arranged thoughtfully to evoke a dreamy, vintage-inspired editorial. Studio-lit with warm, diffused lighting and a creamy, ivory-toned palette, the scene emulates luxury fashion photography with a soft, dollhouse-like atmosphere and shallow depth of field.

title: 模型标注讲解图
author: @berryxia_ai
prompt:
绘制[3D人体器官模型展示示例心脏]用于学术展示，进行标注讲解，适用于展示其原理和[每个器官]的功能，非常逼真，高度还原，精细度非常细致的设计
> [!NOTE]
> **将 [方括号] 中的文字改为需要展示的模型**
prompt_en:
Create a 3D model of an organ, specifically a heart, for academic display. The model should include annotations and explanations, suitable for demonstrating its principles and the functions of each organ. It should be highly realistic, accurately restored, and designed with very fine detail.  
> [!NOTE]  
> **Replace the text within [square brackets] with the model you want to showcase**

title: 科技感品牌视觉头图设计预设

超宽全景标题视觉。
构图平衡，带有一个抽象的焦点元素，
柔和的渐变背景水平淡出，
视觉上极度平静，无杂乱感，
光照从一端到另一端保持一致，
旨在在所有屏幕尺寸下都保持清晰，
如同高端品牌主页的标题。

Ultra-wide panoramic header visual.
Balanced composition with one abstract focal element,
soft gradient background fading horizontally,
strong visual calm, no clutter,
lighting consistent edge to edge,
designed to remain clear at all screen sizes,
like a premium brand homepage header.

prompt: ```json { "generation_request": { "meta_data": { "task_type": "photo_to_watercolor_illustration_couple", "language": "zh-Hans", "priority": "highest", "version": "v1.0_WATERCOLOR_HEART_COUPLE_HUG" }, "input": { "mode": "image_to_image", "reference_image_usage": "very_high", "preserve_identity": true, "preserve_facial_features": true, "notes": "将上传的情侣照片转换为迷人的水彩插画。保留相同的情侣身份、姿势关系和整体姿态。转换为手绘水彩画，具有可见的纸张纹理和柔和的颜料晕染效果。" }, "output": { "aspect_ratio": "4:5", "resolution": "ultra_high", "num_images": 1, "sharpness": "illustration_crisp", "grain": "paper_texture_subtle" }, "style": { "medium": "watercolor", "linework": "soft_ink_outline_minimal", "palette": "warm_pastel_with_rose_red_accents", "texture": "cold_press_paper", "finish": "clean_white_margins" }, "scene": { "background": "情侣身后有一个大的柔和水彩心形，粉色到玫瑰色的晕染，边缘略微不均匀，有细微的颜料飞溅", "environment": "白色背景，无详细场景，以插画为重点" }, "subject": { "people_count": 2, "pose": "浪漫拥抱，男士亲吻女士的脸颊/太阳穴，女士微笑，双眼轻闭，一条腿俏皮地微微抬起", "identity_rules": "在转换为插画的同时，尽可能匹配上传情侣的面部和发型", "wardrobe_translation": "将原始服装转换为插画风格；保留可识别的关键颜色和图案", "props": { "bouquet": "{argument name=\"bouquet type\" default=\"red flowers bouquet\"} 在男士手中，用松散的水彩花瓣绘制" }, "details": { "skin_render": "柔和的水彩肤色，脸颊有淡淡的腮红", "hair_render": "水彩头发，墨水细节极少", "hands": "清晰的解剖结构，自然的指节比例，无多余手指" } }, "composition": { "framing": "全身或 3/4 身体居中", "spacing": "周围留有充足的空白空间，插画漂浮在页面上", "focus": "情侣面部 + 花束，心形背景为次要焦点" }, "lighting": { "type": "illustrated_soft_light", "contrast": "low", "shadows": "极少的水彩阴影" }, "negative_prompt": [ "写实", "3D 渲染", "动漫", "厚涂油画", "到处都是硬朗的轮廓", "杂乱的背景场景", "文字、水印、标志、签名", "模糊的面部", "多余的手指、变形的手、糟糕的解剖结构", "重复的人物", "过饱和的霓虹色" ], "quality_rules": { "must": [ "保留情侣身份" ] } } } ```

title: 品牌标志性美食广告
author: aziz4ai
prompt: 这是一张垂直方向、分辨率为2:3的高质量食品广告海报，重点宣传由知名品牌[填写品牌名称]推出的最具标志性且美味可口的食品。产品照片居中展示，根据不同食品的特点，会配有令人垂涎的细节元素，如融化的奶酪、流淌的巧克力、搅打的奶油或蒸汽凝结物等。海报背景采用渐变或淡彩色调，这些色彩灵感来源于该品牌的整体形象。海报顶部应印有与该品牌风格相匹配的醒目标语；底部则需放置该品牌的官方标志。通过运用电影级别的摄影灯光效果、柔和的阴影处理以及超清晰的图像质感，打造出一张极具视觉吸引力且设计简约的广告海报。
prompt_en: a vertical 2:3 high-resolution food advertisement featuring the most iconic and delicious product from a well-known brand called [INSERT BRAND NAME]. The product appears centered with mouthwatering details — such as melted cheese, dripping chocolate, whipped cream, or condensation — depending on the product. The background should be a gradient or pastel tone inspired by the brand’s identity. At the top, display a bold slogan in a color that matches the brand’s style. At the bottom, include the official logo of the brand. Use cinematic studio lighting, soft shadows, and ultra-sharp textures to create a visually irresistible and minimal poster.

title: 特斯拉线圈等离子杯原理
author: Gadgetify
prompt: 请向我详细阐述这背后的确切科学原理，以及这个实验是如何运作的，还有其原因。
prompt_en: draw me the exact science of this and how this experiment works and why.

title: 文字3D泡泡渲染
author: Leader AI
prompt: 将图片中的文字字体采用圆润饱满的充气球造型，字体采用圆润饱满的充气球造型，材质为亮面反光的 vibrant 蓝色塑料。搭配柔和的 pastel 色调光照。气球弧面上映有影棚柔光箱的微妙反光。整体呈现高端零售美学与波普艺术风格，采用 Cinema 4D 渲染，呈现可爱质感。
prompt_en: 将图片中的文字字体采用圆润饱满的充气球造型，字体采用圆润饱满的充气球造型，材质为亮面反光的 vibrant 蓝色塑料。搭配柔和的 pastel 色调光照。气球弧面上映有影棚柔光箱的微妙反光。整体呈现高端零售美学与波普艺术风格，采用 Cinema 4D 渲染，呈现可爱质感。

title: 霓虹灯发光的可爱动物
author: @icreatelife
prompt: bioluminescent cute [ANIMAL], kawaii, chibi, [COLOR] neon backlit, 3d cartoon, big cute bright eyes, high definition
prompt_en: bioluminescent cute [ANIMAL], kawaii, chibi, [COLOR] neon backlit, 3d cartoon, big cute bright eyes, high definition

title: 人体工程学
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 想象一下以 [生物/物体/概念] 的形式设计的 [家具]。设计应该具有高度的创意和雕塑感，就像一件艺术品。使用有机、流畅的形状和详细的纹理。确保它保持功能正常且符合人体工程学。目标是让它既具有视觉冲击力又具有实用性——您希望看到的是博物馆品质的设计对象
prompt_en: Imagine a [piece of furniture] designed in the form of [creature/object/concept]. The design should be highly creative and sculptural, like an art piece. Use organic, flowing shapes and detailed textures. Make sure it remains functional and ergonomic. The goal is for it to be both visually striking and practical —something you’d expect to see as a museum-quality design object

title: 梦幻般的蒸汽波失真
author: @LudovicCreator
prompt: [主题] 以梦幻般的蒸汽波失真渲染，带有柔和的粉彩和超现实效果。采用 [COLOR1] 和 [COLOR2] 的怀旧调色板，唤起渴望和空灵之美
prompt_en: [Theme] Dreamlike vaporwave distortion rendering with soft pastel tones and surreal effects. Featuring a nostalgic color palette of [COLOR1] and [COLOR2], evoking longing and ethereal beauty.

title: 制作电影海报
author: @aiehon_aya
prompt:
分析上传的照片，检测其中的主体、情绪和氛围。
自动将照片归类到合适的电影类型（爱情、动作、悬疑、恐怖等）。
根据检测到的类型和氛围，用英文生成以下内容：
- 电影标题：具有冲击力，符合该类型风格。
- 短标语 / 宣传语：1–2 行，具有戏剧性或情感渲染。
- 底部制作信息：包括导演、制片、音乐等虚拟姓名，风格类似真实电影海报。
- 上映信息：如 “COMING SOON” 或 “In Theaters 2025”。
将上述元素叠加在照片上，呈现电影海报风格：
- 标题显著展示在中央或下三分之一位置。
- 标语置于标题上方或下方。
- 制作信息放在底部，文字较小。
- 上映信息置于底部中央。
- 最后添加主演信息，格式固定如下：
"Starring: <演员姓名>"
字体要求：粗体、戏剧性、符合电影类型。
最终效果应看起来像真实的电影院海报，所有元素与照片的情绪和氛围协调一致。
prompt_en:
Analyze the uploaded photo to detect its main subject, mood, and atmosphere.  
Automatically categorize the photo into an appropriate film genre (romance, action, mystery, horror, etc.).  
Based on the detected genre and mood, generate the following content in English:  
- **Movie Title:** Impactful and fitting the style of the genre.  
- **Tagline / Slogan:** 1–2 lines, dramatic or emotionally evocative.  
- **Bottom Credits:** Include fictional names for director, producer, composer, etc., styled like a real movie poster.  
- **Release Information:** Such as “COMING SOON” or “In Theaters 2025.”  

Overlay these elements onto the photo to create a movie poster style:  
- The title prominently displayed in the center or lower third.  
- The tagline placed above or below the title.  
- Credits at the bottom in smaller font.  
- Release info at the bottom center.  
- Add starring information in the following fixed format:  
  **"Starring: <Actor Names>"**  
  Font style: bold, dramatic, matching the genre.  

The final result should resemble a real movie poster, with all elements harmonized to match the photo’s mood and atmosphere.

title: 高端饮品动态飞溅商业摄影模板
author: Mo
prompt: 专业影棚产品摄影，拍摄一个居中的 {"product" "[PRODUCT]"}。产品周围环绕着动态、旋转的液体飞溅，将其包裹起来。背景是干净、极简的渐变，与 {"product branding" "[PRODUCT]"} 的配色方案和品牌完美匹配。高端商业照明，电影般的氛围，锐利聚焦，表面有水滴，8k 分辨率，超现实主义。
prompt_en: Professional studio product photography of a {"product" "[PRODUCT]"}, centered. The product is surrounded by dynamic, swirling liquid splashes that wrap around it. The background is a clean, minimalist gradient that perfectly matches the color palette and branding of the {"product branding" "[PRODUCT]"}. High-end commercial lighting, cinematic atmosphere, sharp focus, droplets of water on the surface, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic.

title: 乐高风格套装
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 以 [COUNTRY] 的国宝 [ITEM] 为特色的逼真乐高风格套装。带有乐高品牌的逼真包装，展示拼搭模型的盒子艺术，模型由乐高积木组装而成，具有逼真的颜色和细节。具有柔和阴影和清晰照明的工作室产品摄影，高度详细的专业商业渲染。在场景中加入盒子和积木，注重真实感和类似乐高的风格。9:16.
prompt_en: a realistic LEGO-style set featuring [COUNTRY]’s national treasure: [ITEM]. Photorealistic packaging with LEGO branding, box art showing the built model, the model assembled from LEGO bricks in authentic colors and details. Studio product photography with soft shadows and clear lighting, highly detailed, professional commercial render. Include box and bricks in the scene, focus on realism and LEGO-like style. 9:16.

title: 刺绣logo
author: azed_ai
prompt: 这是一件超写实的刺绣纺织品艺术品，主题为[具体对象]，采用彩色线材和柔软的布料制作而成。作品以密集的针脚和凸起的刺绣图案为特色，完美再现了该物体的实际形态和品牌特征。背景采用纯米白色的布料，光线来自专业的摄影棚，拍摄角度为清晰的特写镜头。通过强调线材的质感以及手工制作的细微瑕疵，展现出这件作品如真实软雕塑般的质感和美感。
prompt_en: A hyperrealistic embroidered textile artwork of the [SUBJECT], created with colored thread and soft fabric textures. The design features dense, tactile stitching and raised embroidery that mimics the actual form and branding. Set against a plain, off-white fabric background, with clean studio lighting and a sharp close-up view. Emphasize threadwork, texture, and handmade imperfections for a realistic soft sculpture look.

title: 提取信息并放置透明图层
author: @nglprz
prompt:
提取 [武士] 并放置透明背景
> [!NOTE]
> **将 [方括号] 中的文字改为需要提取的对象**
prompt_en:
Extract the [samurai] and place it on a transparent background  
> [!NOTE]  
> **Replace the text inside [square brackets] with the object you want to extract**

title: 高端产品静物摄影布光与构图指南
author: Ivan
prompt: 正面严格的产品特写镜头，居中垂直，以人眼水平拍摄，柔和的影室主光从左侧 45° 照射，柔和的衰减和微妙的镜面高光勾勒出包装的边缘；垂直的黑白渐变背景营造出一种受控的、高端的氛围，同时保持标签的高度清晰可读性；烧焦的黑色树枝以克制、有机的非对称性在前景和中景构图，增加纹理，但不分散对产品的注意力；干净柔和的接触阴影将产品固定在表面上，清晰的玻璃/材质真实感，电影般的对比度，浅景深，背景保持平滑无噪点。
prompt_en: Front-facing strict product hero shot, centered and upright, photographed at eye level with a soft studio key light coming from 45° left, gentle falloff and subtle specular highlights defining the edges of the packaging; a vertical black-to-white gradient backdrop creates a controlled, premium atmosphere while maintaining high legibility of the label; charred black branches frame the composition in the foreground and midground with restrained, organic asymmetry, adding texture without distracting from the product; clean soft contact shadow anchors the product to the surface, crisp glass/material realism, cinematic contrast, shallow depth of field with background kept smooth and noise-free.

title: 产品添加炫酷光效3
author: 雏田小姐
prompt: 请帮我挖空电热水壶的红色，其他地方保持不变，红色区域呈现出圆环式加热管发出温暖橙黄色光芒，光圈均匀，扩散到整个内部，光线穿透透明外壳形成柔和光晕效果，水面反射光线产生波光粼粼的动态光流，水中气泡与光线结合形成自然的模糊拖影和微小光粒子闪烁跳跃，透明材质折射光线，内部营造科技感与品质感的温暖氛围。
prompt_en: 请帮我挖空电热水壶的红色，其他地方保持不变，红色区域呈现出圆环式加热管发出温暖橙黄色光芒，光圈均匀，扩散到整个内部，光线穿透透明外壳形成柔和光晕效果，水面反射光线产生波光粼粼的动态光流，水中气泡与光线结合形成自然的模糊拖影和微小光粒子闪烁跳跃，透明材质折射光线，内部营造科技感与品质感的温暖氛围。

title: 微型商店
author: NanoBanana_labs
prompt: [品牌] 的微型立体模型店。屋顶由超大的 [产品] 制成，窗户上方是巨大的 [品牌] 标识，摊主正在向顾客递上 [产品]，地面上覆盖着许多 [产品]。手工软陶造型，摄影棚微距照片，柔和的光线，浅景深，竖屏 3:4
prompt_en: [品牌] 的微型立体模型店。屋顶由超大的 [产品] 制成，窗户上方是巨大的 [品牌] 标识，摊主正在向顾客递上 [产品]，地面上覆盖着许多 [产品]。手工软陶造型，摄影棚微距照片，柔和的光线，浅景深，竖屏 3:4

title: 制作漫画书
author: @icreatelife
prompt: 基于上传的图像，制作漫画书条幅，添加文字，写一个引人入胜的故事。我想要一本奇幻漫画书。
prompt_en: Create a comic book banner based on the uploaded image, add text, and craft an engaging story. I want a fantasy comic book.

title: Monochrome LCD 效果
author: hckmstrrahul

title: 创建星座图
author: @AI_Kei75
prompt:
根据原图创建一幅虚构星座的图像。
- 星夜背景需逼真，即使原图是动漫风格，也必须呈现逼真的星空效果。
- 从原图中提取人物、动物或物品，并将其透明置于星空背景上。在此情况下，提取的目标应为单一主题元素（主图案），且仅放置一幅图像。
- 原图的角色设计、风格和审美需忠实保留，原图背景可忽略。
- 基于所放置的主题元素，创作一个虚构星座。该星座由约 5 到 10 颗星组成。
- 分析原图的姿势，将星座的星星合理布置在角色或物体的关键位置。
- 星座的星星需高亮显示，并用发光线条连接形成星座形态。
prompt_en:
Create an image of a fictional constellation based on the original picture.
- The starry night background must be realistic; even if the original image is in an anime style, the starry sky should appear lifelike.
- Extract characters, animals, or objects from the original image and overlay them transparently onto the starry background. In this case, the extracted element should be a single main subject (primary motif), and only one image should be placed.
- The character design, style, and aesthetic of the original image must be faithfully preserved; the background of the original image can be ignored.
- Based on the placed main element, create a fictional constellation. The constellation should consist of approximately 5 to 10 stars.
- Analyze the pose of the original image, and position the stars of the constellation at key points of the character or object logically.
- The stars of the constellation should be highlighted and connected with glowing lines to form the shape of the constellation.

title: 渐变产品广告
author: Nano banana
prompt:
纯实心白色画布上的专业高端平面设计广告构图。中心是一个完美对称、大型实心圆角方形（非空心边框）。该方形的整个内部填充有平滑、鲜艳的颜色渐变，从[左上角颜色/十六进制]渐变到[右下角颜色/十六进制]。

一个[人物描述]被放置在这样的位置，其躯干底部与方形的底部边缘完全齐平且对齐，下方没有可见的厚彩色边框。至关重要的是，人物及其服装保持自然、逼真的颜色和纹理，由独立于背景渐变的专业影棚灯光照明（防止其皮肤或衣服出现任何色偏）。

他们牢固且逼真地握着[产品描述]。至关重要的是，他们的头部和头发的顶部突破了方形的上边界，部分重叠了白色背景。他们的手和[产品名称]也突破了侧面边界，产生强大的3D突破效果，延伸到白色画布上。

排版布局：在方形上方清晰可见的白色空间中，与方形保持明显间隙，是[字体风格]品牌文字“[品牌名称]”，颜色为[顶部文字颜色]。在右下角，直接叠加在方形内部的渐变之上，是一块小巧、纤细、干净的[底部文字颜色]描述性文字：“[标语/口号]”。

灯光为[灯光类型：例如，锐利/柔和]，清晰且商业化，强调了主体和产品的纹理。
prompt_en:
A professional high-end graphic design advertisement composition on a pure solid white canvas. Centered is a perfectly symmetrical, large solid rounded square (not a hollow frame). The entire interior of this square is filled with a smooth, vibrant color gradient fading from [Top-Left Color/Hex] to [Bottom-Right Color/Hex].

A [Description of Character] is positioned such that the bottom of their torso is perfectly flush and aligned with the very bottom edge of the square, leaving no thick colored border visible beneath them. Crucially, the person and their clothing maintain natural, realistic colors and textures, illuminated by professional studio lighting that is independent of the background gradient (preventing any color cast on their skin or clothes).

They are firmly and realistically gripping [Product Description]. Crucially, the top of their head and hair break the top boundary of the square, partially overlapping the white background. Their hands and the [Product Name] also break the side boundaries for a powerful 3D breakout effect, extending onto the white canvas.

Typography Layout: At the top, in the white space distinctly above the square with a clear gap, is the [Font Style] brand text '[Brand Name]' in [Top Text Color]. In the bottom-right corner, layered directly on top of the gradient inside the square, is a block of small, thin, clean [Bottom Text Color] descriptive text: '[Slogan/Tagline]'.

The lighting is [Lighting Type: e.g., Sharp/Soft], crisp, and commercial, emphasizing the textures of both the subject and the product.

title: 热气腾腾芝士牛肉汉堡特写，木质桌窗边光影
author: Mohamed IDBRAHIM
prompt: 芝士融化滴落的诱人牛肉汉堡的微距美食摄影，油光闪闪，烤过的布里欧修面包，生菜上沾着新鲜水珠。蒸汽袅袅升起。木质桌面背景，窗户采光。宽高比 6:9
prompt_en: Macro food photography of a juicy beef burger with melted cheddar cheese dripping down the side, glistening grease, a toasted brioche bun, and fresh water droplets on the lettuce. Steam is gently rising. Wooden table background, window lighting. Aspect ratio 6:9

title: 品牌我的世界风格
author: TheRelianceAI
prompt: “完全由像素化立方体构建的[品牌名称][对象]的Minecraft风格体素再现——详细的体素建模、标志性品牌颜色和徽标、块状纹理、干净的照明、风格化但可识别、3D渲染、高分辨率、俏皮和创造性的解释
prompt_en: "A Minecraft-style voxel recreation of a [BRAND NAME] [OBJECT], built entirely from pixelated cubes — detailed voxel modeling, signature brand colors and logo, blocky textures, clean lighting, stylized yet recognizable, 3D render, high resolution, playful and creative interpretation

title: 迪士尼鸡尾酒
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一款逼真的高端鸡尾酒，装在磨砂玻璃杯中，带有波光粼粼的盐边，里面装满了晶莹剔透的冰块。这款饮料以深蓝色的羽衣甘蓝叶和精致的淡粉色食用花朵装饰。灯光是喜怒无常的和电影般的，玻璃上有柔和的亮点。整个视觉风格——调色板、灯光、背景和氛围——都受到了迪士尼动画电影【MOVIE_TITLE】的启发，巧妙地反映了它的视觉基调和情绪。在图片的底部，用优雅的金色衬线文字写着：“Disney — 【MOVIE_TITLE】”。垂直 9：16，超详细，摄影现实主义，艺术指导基于电影世界。
prompt_en: A realistic, high-end cocktail in a frosted glass with a sparkling salt rim, filled with crystal-clear ice cubes. The drink is garnished with deep-blue kale leaves and delicate pastel-pink edible flowers. The lighting is moody and cinematic, with soft highlights on the glass. The entire visual style — color palette, lighting, background, and atmosphere — is inspired by the animated film 【MOVIE_TITLE】 by Disney, subtly reflecting its visual tone and mood. At the bottom of the image, in elegant golden serif text, it says: “Disney — 【MOVIE_TITLE】”. Vertical 9:16, ultra-detailed, photographic realism with artistic direction based on the film’s world.

title: 高端智能门锁产品广告图
author: 𝐌
prompt: [{"product name" "product"}]，高端产品广告，白色无缝背景，爆炸图，内部机械结构外露，外壳悬浮在核心上方，微型螺丝和组件悬浮，暗示完美对齐的引导线，清晰柔和的阴影，超现实主义，微距产品摄影，100mm 镜头效果，f/8，8k，1:1
prompt_en: [{"product name" "product"}], high-end product advertising, white seamless background, exploded view with inner mechanics revealed, outer shell hovering above core, micro screws and components suspended, perfect alignment guides implied, crisp soft shadow, ultra realistic, macro product photography, 100mm lens look, f/8, 8k, 1:1

title: 皱巴巴的纸片
author: @umesh_ai
prompt: A photorealistic image of the word '[NAME]' spelled out using torn, highly crumpled pieces of white paper. Each letter is painted in bold [COLOR] on individual scraps, arranged loosely and unevenly, as if placed casually by hand, on a wooden table. The composition should convey a natural, handmade aesthetic with visible creases, shadows, and wood grain detail
prompt_en: A photorealistic image of the word '[NAME]' spelled out using torn, highly crumpled pieces of white paper. title: 精致纸艺折纸模型
author: @Kerroudjm
prompt: 一张 1:1 正方形比例的数码照片，画面中央是用纹理彩纸折叠而成的精致纸艺折纸模型，该模型复刻了（纪念碑名称）的造型。模型上方，“（城市名称）” 一词以粗体折纸风格呈现：字母采用该国国色的鲜艳纸张折叠而成，整体排列成优雅的拱形。背景风格柔和简约，采用浅淡的马卡龙色系或中性色调，点缀着细微的纸张纹理或抽象几何元素。光线柔和且均匀扩散，投射出自然的阴影，既增强了每一处折痕的立体感，也让折痕轮廓更清晰。整体风格简洁、写实且充满手工质感，着重凸显材料纹理、几何精度与视觉和谐感。
prompt_en: A square 1:1 format digital photograph of an intricate paper origami model representing (MONUMENT_NAME), folded from textured colored paper and centered in the frame. Above it, the word (CITY_NAME) appears in bold origami-style letters, folded from vibrant paper using the national colors of the country, and arranged in a graceful arch. The background is soft and minimal, in a light pastel or neutral tone with subtle paper textures or abstract geometric details. Lighting is soft and diffused, casting natural shadows that enhance the depth and sharpness of each fold. The overall style is clean, realistic, and handcrafted, emphasizing material texture, geometric precision, and visual harmony.

title: 周边展示货架
author: @tokyo_Valentine
prompt:
移除这幅插画的背景，将其制作成类似手办的周边商品。
图片：照片级写实
地点：
日本一家虚构的便利店的货架。可爱又流行的氛围与整齐摆放的插画周边商品相得益彰。店内空间梦幻般明亮，别具一格，营造出一个让粉丝们兴奋不已的特殊空间。
人物：
这些周边商品陈列在货架上。
周边商品：
屏幕中央摆放着两个约50厘米长的大型人偶（醒目展示）
亚克力支架（原作变形版）
Q版人偶（原作变形版）
抱枕（大型印刷品，醒目展示）
拼图（角色造型）
文具（笔记本、笔、文件夹等，原作变形版）
纸板（原作变形版）
毛绒玩具（原作变形版）
陈列方式：
周边商品整齐地摆放在货架上，既保留了便利店的氛围，又充满了对角色的喜爱。这些商品的摆放方式让少女粉丝们忍不住想要拿起来。
整体氛围：
如梦似幻的周边商品销售空间。可爱与流行元素占据主导地位，虽然只是一家便利店，却被打造成“粉丝活动圣地”。
分辨率：4K，4000像素：3000像素
prompt_en:
Remove the background from this illustration and turn it into a merchandise display similar to a collectible figure stand.  
Image: Photorealistic  
Location:  
A shelf in a fictional convenience store in Japan. The cute and trendy atmosphere complements the neatly arranged illustrated merchandise. The store interior is brightly lit and dreamlike, creating a unique space that excites fans.  
Characters:  
These merchandise items are displayed on the shelves.  
Merchandise:  
- Two large dolls approximately 50 cm in length (prominently displayed)  
- Acrylic stands (original work stylized version)  
- Chibi-style dolls (original work stylized version)  
- Pillows (large printed items, prominently displayed)  
- Puzzles (character-shaped)  
- Stationery (notebooks, pens, folders, etc., stylized version)  
- Cardboard cutouts (original work stylized version)  
- Plush toys (original work stylized version)  
Display style:  
Merchandise is neatly arranged on the shelves, maintaining the convenience store vibe while showing love for the characters. The way the items are displayed makes young female fans eager to pick them up.  
Overall atmosphere:  
A dreamy, fantastical merchandise sales space. Cute and trendy elements dominate, transforming what is just a convenience store into a “fan event sanctuary.”  
Resolution: 4K, 4000 x 3000 pixels

title: 青花瓷风格
author: @firatbilal
prompt: Using the uploaded image as the exact visual base, transform it into a hyper-realistic 3D object that retains the original shape and proportions of the logo only. Apply traditional Ottoman Iznik ceramic textures—featuring a warm white glazed base with delicate crackle lines, overlaid with vivid cobalt blue, turquoise, and bold red floral motifs such as tulips, carnations, and arabesque vines. The entire logo should be treated as a standalone porcelain sculpture with raised, hand-painted detailing and no background plate or tile structure. Ensure the decorative patterns elegantly follow the contours of the Bugatti logo, without altering its form. Render the object in a pure black background with Cinema 4D-style product lighting—highlighting realistic ceramic gloss, material depth, and subtle reflections. The final result should feel like a luxurious handcrafted ceramic reinterpretation, balancing heritage ornamentation with industrial branding.
prompt_en: Using the uploaded image as the exact visual base, transform it into a hyper-realistic 3D object that retains the original shape and proportions of the logo only. Apply traditional Ottoman Iznik ceramic textures—featuring a warm white glazed base with delicate crackle lines, overlaid with vivid cobalt blue, turquoise, and bold red floral motifs such as tulips, carnations, and arabesque vines. The entire logo should be treated as a standalone porcelain sculpture with raised, hand-painted detailing and no background plate or tile structure. Ensure the decorative patterns elegantly follow the contours of the Bugatti logo, without altering its form. Render the object in a pure black background with Cinema 4D-style product lighting—highlighting realistic ceramic gloss, material depth, and subtle reflections. The final result should feel like a luxurious handcrafted ceramic reinterpretation, balancing heritage ornamentation with industrial branding.

title: 车站电影海报
author: @AI_Kei75
prompt:
使用原图制作电影海报。电影类型将根据原图的氛围确定。
无论原图是动画还是真人版，原图的风格和角色设计都将尽可能完美地保留。但姿势和表情可能会根据海报设计进行调整。此外，还可能添加其他人物和物体。
最终生成的图像将具有照片级真实感。但海报设计除外，因为它将基于原图进行制作。
海报所贴日本车站地下通道的场景将以逼真的图像进行重现，并添加穿过地下通道的人物。
海报的反射角度经过调整，使其看起来更加逼真。
prompt_en:
Create a movie poster using the original image. The genre of the movie will be determined based on the atmosphere of the original image.  
Whether the original image is animated or live-action, the style and character design will be preserved as faithfully as possible. However, poses and expressions may be adjusted to suit the poster design. Additional characters and objects may also be added.  
The final generated image will have a photorealistic quality, except for the poster design elements, which will be based on the original image.  
The scene depicting a Japanese subway station underpass will be recreated with realistic imagery, including people passing through the underpass.  
The reflection angles of the poster will be adjusted to enhance realism.

➕铆接细节和可见接缝。
➕带有复古魅力的插图纸板背景。
➕用齿轮和轮子结束玩具风格的设置。

transform it into part of a miniature mechanical scene from the 1940s or ’50s, featuring:

➕Shiny enamel-painted metal characters and objects.
➕Riveted details and visible joints.
➕Illustrated cardboard backdrops with vintage charm.
➕Wind-up toy-style settings with gears and wheels.

The planter has a friendly face and sits on a soft, neutral background with diffused natural lighting, showcasing fine textures and color contrast in a clean, minimalistic composition

title: 288_食物与运动结合的广告
author: Salmaaboukarr
prompt: 晴朗天空下，一位肌肉发达的非洲男子将一块烤鸡胸肉扣进篮球框，篮框上写着“扣篮，每个宏都扣篮”（DUNK EVERY MACRO）。健身主题，带有 Trifecta 标志。
prompt_en: Muscular African  man dunks a grilled chicken breast into a basketball hoop with 'DUNK EVERY MACRO' text, under a clear sky. Fitness-themed, with Trifecta logo.

title: 爱迪生灯泡发明展示盒：蒸汽朋克博物馆陈列与原型及历史工具
prompt:
输入A是灯泡（改变世界的发明）。
分析发明家（托马斯·爱迪生）、灵光乍现时刻、原型设计和社会影响。
风格参考：蒸汽朋克与现代博物馆美学的结合。
目标：带黄铜铰链的木质展示盒，包含微型"第一原型"，周围是发明家的工具、失败尝试和蓝图碎片。
规则：
- 中心：微小的看起来可以工作的碳丝灯泡原型
- 包括发明家在微型工作台上的小人偶
- 周围环绕10-15个时期工具（玻璃吹制器、真空泵、草图、竹丝样品、失败的碳化线尝试）
- 添加通过玻璃顶部可见的老化纸张"专利文件"
- 材料：深色木材、黄铜装饰、复古玻璃
- 带有发明名称"电灯泡"、发明家"托马斯·爱迪生"、专利年份"1879"的铭牌
输出：一张图像，1:1发明家日记美学

title: 可爱的设计师玩偶
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一个可爱的设计师玩偶，造型为 [SUBJECT]。娃娃有一张瓷脸，脸上泛着腮红，柔软的卷曲白发，还有一双富有表现力的大眼睛和独特的瞳孔（像星星和月亮）。它穿着一件蓬松的柔和色服装，类似于 [选择的生物或想法]，带有详细的配饰，如带耳朵或角的兜帽、蕾丝和丝带。爪子上的刺绣反映了角色的主题。娃娃坐在中性背景上（如米色皮革或柔软的织物）。气氛梦幻而异想天开，灯光柔和。风格：韩国收藏艺术娃娃，高度详细，柔和的调色板。
prompt_en: A cute designer doll styled as a [SUBJECT]. The doll has a porcelain face with blush, soft curly white hair, and large expressive eyes with unique pupils (like a star and moon). It wears a fluffy pastel-colored costume resembling the [chosen creature or idea], with detailed accessories like a hood with ears or horns, lace, and a ribbon. Embroidery on the paws reflects the character’s theme. The doll is sitting on a neutral background (like beige leather or soft fabric). The atmosphere is dreamy and whimsical, with soft lighting. Style: Korean collectible art doll, highly detailed, pastel color palette.

title: 为图像添加水印
author: @AiMachete
prompt: 在整个图片上反复覆盖“TRUMP”这个词。

title: 心爱的角色制作动漫风格的签名
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 简约的黑白亲笔签名设计，采用单线绘图风格，带有手写签名：[CHARACTER NAME]，并融入了受角色外表和个性启发的可爱线条艺术元素（例如：头发、服装细节、武器、魔法符号）。包括一个简化的赤壁风格的小吉祥物或角色涂鸦，周围环绕着与其氛围相匹配的装饰元素（星星、心形、火花、音符、花朵）。干净、可爱、现代的设计，适合纹身或贴纸。高分辨率线条图。
prompt_en: A minimalistic black-and-white autograph design in a single-line drawing style, featuring the handwritten signature: [CHARACTER NAME], integrated with cute line art elements inspired by the character’s appearance and personality (for example: hair, outfit details, weapons, magical symbols). Include a small mascot or doodle of the character in simplified chibi style, surrounded by decorative elements (stars, hearts, sparkles, musical notes, flowers) that match their vibe. Clean, cute, modern design suitable for tattoo or sticker. High-resolution line art.

title: 生成真实电影海报
author: @aziz4ai
prompt:
“[MOVIE NAME ]” — 超逼真、高清风格的电影海报设计。根据电影的标题捕捉一个充满戏剧性和情感的场景。使用高开尔文色温来消除黄色调，偏爱冷色调、蓝色调或中性白色。添加体积雾、锐利阴影和深景深。模拟具有柔和泛光、细微镜头光晕和胶片颗粒的电影镜头。

以富有表现力的动态排版呈现标题“[MOVIE TITLE ]”，在视觉上体现单词的含义（例如，溶解、破裂、融化、发光）。排版应该感觉与环境融为一体，大胆而标志性。

在标题下方包括一个简短的、能引起情感共鸣的标语。整体构图必须类似于高预算的大片电影海报，具有 2.35：1 的纵横比和强烈的视觉叙事性。
prompt_en:
"[MOVIE NAME]" — Ultra-realistic, high-definition style movie poster design. Capture a dramatic and emotionally charged scene that reflects the movie's title. Use a high Kelvin color temperature to eliminate yellow tones, favoring cool, blue, or neutral white hues. Add volumetric fog, sharp shadows, and deep depth of field. Simulate cinematic lens effects with soft glow, subtle lens flare, and film grain.

Present the title "[MOVIE TITLE]" with expressive, dynamic typography that visually embodies the meaning of the words (e.g., dissolving, cracking, melting, glowing). The typography should seamlessly integrate with the environment, bold and iconic.

Include a short, emotionally resonant tagline below the title. The overall composition should resemble a high-budget blockbuster movie poster, with a 2.35:1 aspect ratio and strong visual storytelling.

title: 带GPS坐标叠加的实时天气氛围场景
prompt: 创建一个与坐标40.00023661635351, 116.27808154448789（中国北京）的当前时间氛围和实时天气相匹配的图像。在左下角,使用优雅的排版显示当前坐标、带天气图标的位置信息,并添加中文位置描述文本:'北京·颐和园 晴朗的午后时光'。展示具有当前天气条件的标志性颐和园景观的照片级真实场景。

title: 可爱粉彩乙烯基人物
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一个可爱的粉彩乙烯基人物 [插入您的角色或对象]，柔和的颜色（薰衣草色、柔和的粉红色、婴儿蓝色）、卡哇伊风格、圆圆的大眼睛和友好的微笑、简单的圆形形状、人物或底座上某处的程式化“RIP”细节、背景中的玩具包装与主题艺术相匹配、具有柔和灯光的工作室产品照片，最小的阴影
prompt_en: A cute pastel vinyl figure of [INSERT YOUR CHARACTER OR OBJECT], pastel colors (lavender, soft pink, baby blue), kawaii style with big round eyes and friendly smile, simple rounded shapes, stylized “RIP” detail somewhere on the figure or base, matching toy packaging in the background with themed art, studio product photo with soft lighting, minimal shadows

title: 玻璃变形海报
author: @aziz4ai
prompt: 设计一张带有“[BRAND NAME]”字样的电影式品牌海报 — 在下面包括一个粗体的六字标语 — 应用 3D 玻璃折射效果，使部分文本或布局失真 — 在右上角加入品牌徽标 — 平滑的阴影、有光泽的照明、黑色超粗体排版 — 干净的现代背景 — 高分辨率、1：1 的纵横比
prompt_en: Design a cinematic brand poster featuring “[BRAND NAME]” — include a bold six-word slogan beneath — apply a 3D glass refraction effect that distorts part of the text or layout — incorporate the brand logo in the top corner — smooth shadows, glossy lighting, black extra-bold typography — clean modern background — high-resolution, 1:1 aspect ratio

title: Gorillaz风格角色
author: @gnrlyxyz
prompt: 在 Gorillaz 角色美学中为 [您的主题] 创建风格化的全身肖像。给角色一个夸张的瘦长身材，长而瘦的腿和狭窄的手臂。使用简化的棱角分明的特征和粗体轮廓。将头发设计成尖尖的、凌乱的或夸张的，用非自然的颜色，如 [蓝色或绿色]。眼睛必须是空白的白色的，没有瞳孔。仅使用纯色。没有渐变、阴影或纹理。背景应为单一的平面颜色。设计必须对矢量友好并准备好打印。
prompt_en: Create a stylized full-body portrait of [your subject] in the Gorillaz character aesthetic. Give the character an exaggeratedly lanky build with long, skinny legs and narrow arms. Use simplified, angular features and thick, bold outlines. Style the hair to be spiky, tousled, or exaggerated, in a non-natural color like [blue or green]. The eyes must be blank white with no pupils. Use flat, solid colors only. No gradients, shadows, or textures. Background should be a single flat color. Design must be vector friendly and print ready.

title: 霓虹效果海报
author: @aziz4ai
prompt: 单个 [对象] 用与其品牌或本质相匹配的内部霓虹灯发出生动的光芒 — 光芒必须精确地跟随对象的形状和细节，而不会过度曝光 — 电影摄影棚照明 — 丰富的反射表面或纹理 — 对象周围微妙的环境雾或薄雾 — 清晰的阴影和清晰的对比度 — 漂浮或站在柔和的反光黑色表面上 — 超清晰的细节 — 2：3 垂直布局 — 纯黑色背景 — 高开尔文照明以避免黄色调 — 超高清照片级真实感 — 发光必须让人感觉优质、戏剧性且情感上充满情感冲击
prompt_en: a single [OBJECT] glowing vividly with internal neon light that matches its brand or essence — the glow must follow the object’s shape and details precisely without overexposing — cinematic studio lighting — rich reflective surface or texture — subtle ambient fog or mist around the object — sharp shadows and clean contrast — floating or standing on a soft reflective black surface — ultra-sharp details — 2:3 vertical layout — pure black background — high-Kelvin lighting to avoid yellow tint — ultra-HD photorealism — the glow must feel premium, dramatic, and emotionally pow

title: 制作电影海报
author: @aiehon_aya
prompt:
分析上传的照片，检测其中的主体、情绪和氛围。
自动将照片归类到合适的电影类型（爱情、动作、悬疑、恐怖等）。

根据检测到的类型和氛围，用英文生成以下内容：
- 电影标题：具有冲击力，符合该类型风格。
- 短标语 / 宣传语：1–2 行，具有戏剧性或情感渲染。
- 底部制作信息：包括导演、制片、音乐等虚拟姓名，风格类似真实电影海报。
- 上映信息：如 “COMING SOON” 或 “In Theaters 2025”。

将上述元素叠加在照片上，呈现电影海报风格：
- 标题显著展示在中央或下三分之一位置。
- 标语置于标题上方或下方。
- 制作信息放在底部，文字较小。
- 上映信息置于底部中央。
- 最后添加主演信息，格式固定如下：
"Starring: <演员姓名>"

字体要求：粗体、戏剧性、符合电影类型。
最终效果应看起来像真实的电影院海报，所有元素与照片的情绪和氛围协调一致。

title: 休闲农场游戏UI图标：16个带标签的统一风格界面元素
prompt: 生成16个休闲农场游戏风格的UI界面图标并带有文字标签，保持视觉风格一致。图标应包括：种子、浇水壶、收获篮、拖拉机、谷仓、肥料、稻草人、市场摊位、鸡舍、牛、麦田、果树、风车、储藏棚、菜园和鱼塘。

title: 水果蜡烛
author: TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一个装满 [水果] 的圆形玻璃蜡烛的极简静物，标有“[SCENT NAME]”，放在优雅的白色丝绸织物上。蜡烛玻璃为【玻璃色】，蜡与水果色相配。该场景由自然日光柔和照亮，具有微妙的阴影和平滑的高光。超写实的质感，简洁的美感，自上而下的视角，风格像高端产品摄影。
prompt_en: A minimal still life of a round glass candle filled with [fruit], labeled “[SCENT NAME]”, placed on elegant white silk fabric. The candle glass is [glass color], and the wax matches the fruit color. The scene is softly lit by natural daylight with subtle shadows and smooth highlights. Hyperrealistic texture, clean aesthetic, top-down view, styled like high-end product photography.

title: 品牌奢华之物从天而降
author: @hc_dsn
prompt:
Create a image with 1:1 ratio
a dreamy brand ad of [Brand], a brand designed bubble-like capsule with brand color parachute packaging their classic product, against blue sky and other blurry parachute packaging, white cloud, a small brand logo on top, a tiny slogan beneath it, cinematic day lighting, lens flare, dof, hdr
prompt_en:
Create a image with 1:1 ratio
a dreamy brand ad of [Brand], a brand designed bubble-like capsule with brand color parachute packaging their classic product, against blue sky and other blurry parachute packaging, white cloud, a small brand logo on top, a tiny slogan beneath it, cinematic day lighting, lens flare, dof, hdr

title: 马斯克在公园画画
prompt: 创作一个逼真的户外场景，其中一位日本画家正在为马斯克画画。场景中，画家坐在画架前，而马斯克则坐在对面被描绘（不带任何卡通或动漫风格）。环境应充满生机,自然且阳光明媚——比如公园或热闹的户外场所。整体风格必须完全写实，唯独画家画架上的作品例外：那应该是马斯克的吉卜力风格动漫肖像，与周围的写实环境形成强烈对比。请确保画中人物是写实风格，画上的肖像才是动漫风格。
prompt_en: Create a realistic outdoor scene featuring a Japanese artist painting. In the scene, the artist is sitting in front of an easel, while Elon Musk is seated opposite, being portrayed (without any cartoon or anime style). The environment should be lively, natural, and sunny—such as a park or a bustling outdoor setting. The overall style must be entirely realistic, except for the artwork on the easel: that should be a Ghibli-style anime portrait of Elon Musk, creating a strong contrast with the realistic surroundings. Ensure that the characters in the scene are rendered in a realistic style, while the portrait on the easel is in anime style.

title: 俏皮现代的应用程序图标设计
prompt: 一个俏皮现代的应用程序图标设计：一个可爱的咖啡杯形象，带着眨眼的眼睛和微笑的嘴巴，顶部有橙红色火焰状的“头发”，采用极简扁平矢量风格，带有光泽高光和柔和阴影，构图居中，对比度高，色彩鲜艳，边角圆润，背景透明，适合作为图标使用，无文字，边框外无细节，尺寸为1024x1024。
prompt_en: A playful and modern app icon design of a cute coffee cup character with a winking eye and smiling mouth, red-orange flame-like hair on top, minimal flat vector style, glossy highlights, soft shadows, centered composition, high contrast, vibrant colors, rounded corners, on a transparent background, icon-friendly, no text, no details outside the frame, size is 1024x1024.

title: 高端美食广告视觉大片预设
author: Johnn

title: 使用 Gemini Nano Banana 创作个性自画像的创新体验
author: X / Zara
prompt: 一张专业的、电影感的照片（非数字艺术或绘画）捕捉了一位面容与上传参考图相同的美女，艺术家正在画架上绘制自己的写实自画像。她将一支细画笔靠近脸颊，站在画布前，画布上有一个充满活力的水彩泼溅背景。她拥有一头长卷曲的棕色头发，上面点缀着微妙的鲜花装饰。她穿着一件紧身、低领、褶边白色农家女上衣，略微露出胸部。拍摄于一个暖光、木质的摄影棚环境中。构图聚焦，景深深远，自然皮肤纹理，胶片颗粒感，超精细，8k，照片级真实感，哈苏，杰作。
prompt_en: A professional, cinematic photograph (not digital art or painting) captures a beautiful young woman with the same facial features as the uploaded reference,artist painting her own realistic self-portrait onto an easel. She holds a fine brush near her cheek, standing before the canvas which features a vibrant watercolor splash background. She has long, wavy brown hair with subtle floral accents. She wears a tight, low-cut, ruffled white peasant blouse emphasizing a slightly exposed chest. Shot in a warm-lit, wooden studio setting. Focused composition, deep depth of field, natural skin texture, film grain, ultra-detailed, 8k, photorealistic, Hasselblad, masterpiece.

title: 美女竖拍肖像
author: @saniaspeaks_
prompt: 这是一张超现实的 4K UHD 竖拍肖像（3:4），保留了我原本的面容和特征。我坐着，身体微微前倾，表情放松而平静。背景是平滑、丰富的橙色和黄色渐变色调，在我周围投射出柔和而生动的温暖氛围光，灯光是工作室级别的，在我身后形成柔和的阴影，营造出一种闪耀的电影效果。我穿着宽松的深色长袍或自然垂坠的布料。氛围充满艺术感，略带超现实主义，具有忧郁、高对比度的外观和金色、温暖的色调。整体风格逼真、具有电影感，灯光柔和，并带有令人惊叹的 UHD 细节。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic 4K UHD vertical potrait (3:4) of me, preserving my exact original face and features. i am seated , slightly leaned forward with relaxed and calm expression. the background is a smooth, rich gradient of oranve and yellow tones, casting soft but vivid warm ambiet light around me, lighting is studio-grade , creating a glowing cinematic effect with gentle shadow behind me. i wear a loose , dark robe or fabric that drapes naturally. the mood is artistic and slightly surreal , with a moody, high-contrast look and a golden , warm color palette. the overall style is realistic , cinematic , and softly lit - with stunning UHD detail.

title: 橙海中的时尚超现实肖像：帽子墨镜与血橙的视觉幽默
author: TheAIHeadquarters
prompt: 奢华时尚社论肖像，带有一丝超现实的波普艺术风格。一个男人的脸庞从密集的成熟橙子和葡萄柚构图中浮现，充满整个画面。他戴着一顶有质感的软呢帽和深色飞行员墨镜，舌头微吐，表情俏皮而玩世不恭。一个切半的葡萄柚放在他嘴边，增加了图形对比和大胆的纹理。饱和的柑橘色调，生动的橙色和珊瑚色。干净、有力的影棚灯光，水果表皮有柔和的镜面高光，脸部周围有微妙的阴影。超精细的纹理，清晰的焦点，强烈的视觉幽默感。当代高级时装社论，带有讽刺态度，艺术指导驱动的构图，杂志封面般的能量，大胆的超现实造型，无文字。
prompt_en: Luxury fashion editorial portrait with a surreal pop-art twist. A man’s face emerges from a dense composition of ripe oranges and grapefruits, filling the entire frame. He wears a textured fedora hat and dark aviator sunglasses, tongue slightly out in a playful, irreverent expression. One halved grapefruit placed near his mouth adds graphic contrast and bold texture. Saturated citrus color palette in vivid orange and coral tones. Clean, punchy studio lighting with soft specular highlights on fruit skins and subtle shadows around the face. Ultra-detailed textures, crisp focus, strong visual humor. Contemporary high-fashion editorial with ironic attitude, art-direction-driven composition, magazine-cover energy, bold surreal styling, no text.

title: 赛博美学未来社交软件界面照片
author: @dotey
prompt:
一张 9:16 竖版逼真的赛博美学未来社交软件界面照片：一只手拿着一张竖直半透明的亚克力卡片，占据了大部分画面。上面显示着一个社交媒体个人资料界面，但没有任何横幅或背景图片。卡片有平滑的圆润边缘，闪烁着柔和的霓虹灯光，呈现出粉色、紫色和蓝色的渐变。背景黑暗而模糊，以突出发光的边缘。卡片表面如水晶般清澈，个人资料的细节仿佛雕刻，只显示参考图中的信息，按照顺序依次显示：
- 头像（居中）
- 用户名、顶部的认证徽章
- 个人介绍
- 地理位置、网站
- 加入日期
- 关注数和被关注数
- 关注按钮
手指上的灯光反射看起来富有电影感和氛围感，营造出一种高科技的全息氛围。
prompt_en:
A realistic 9:16 vertical cyber aesthetic future social media app interface photo: a hand holding a vertically oriented semi-transparent acrylic card, occupying most of the frame. The card displays a social media profile interface but without any banners or background images. It has smooth, rounded edges and emits soft neon lighting, featuring a gradient of pink, purple, and blue. The background is dark and blurred to emphasize the glowing edges. The card’s surface is crystal-clear, with profile details appearing as if carved into it, showing only the information from the reference image in the following order:

- Profile picture (centered)
- Username with a verified badge at the top
- Personal bio
- Location and website
- Join date
- Follower and following counts
- Follow button

Reflections of light on the finger create a cinematic and atmospheric effect, evoking a high-tech holographic vibe.

title: 卡哇伊3D毛绒猫咪Knolling摄影：可爱猫角色平铺配属性雷达图
prompt: Knolling摄影，平铺构图，中央是一个可爱的3D毛绒白色小猫角色，穿着带蝴蝶结的淡粉色蕾丝裙。小猫拥有受日本角色设计启发的可爱卡哇伊美学。围绕猫咪是以精确网格状Knolling结构组织的物品解构排列：粉色巴黎时尚配饰包括迷你贝雷帽和围巾、优雅玻璃设计的法国香水瓶、来自意大利的美食猫粮、北欧设计玩具、带可爱挂件的日本智能手机、德国精密相机和装饰环形灯。物品整齐排列，用细虚线连接到中心角色。底部是五边形雷达图显示属性。场景包含法式风格排版的UI文本框。奶油色、淡粉色和玫瑰金配金属金色点缀的色彩调色板。专业柔光工作室照明。干净米色背景带微妙纹理。使用C4D和Octane渲染的高清渲染，商业产品摄影质量，8k分辨率 --ar 16:9

title: 墨水黑色电影肖像
author: Nano banana
prompt: 一幅高对比度的墨黑风格肖像，描绘【SUBJECT】，完全用富有表现力的黑色墨水笔触和受控的飞溅效果绘制。浓重的阴影主导着构图，而选择性的高光则通过负空间显现。可以看到细微的纸张纹理。氛围是忧郁的、电影感的、强烈的，如同定格在最戏剧性画面的漫画书。
prompt_en: A high-contrast ink noir portrait of [SUBJECT], illustrated entirely with expressive black ink strokes and controlled splatter. Heavy shadows dominate the composition while selective highlights emerge through negative space. Subtle paper grain is visible. Atmosphere is moody, cinematic, and intense, like a graphic novel frozen at its most dramatic panel.

title: 奢华珠宝腕表产品详情页设计模板
author: Willy
prompt:
画面朝向右侧，身体微微前倾，这是一幅超写实的电影风格肖像，描绘了一位二十多岁、魅力四射的{"ethnicity and gender" "欧亚女性"}，她佩戴着一款高端的{"product" "祖母绿款腕表"}。

【角度与视线】：画面明确朝向右侧，采用3/4视角；她的眼神略带性感地向下凝视，表情极具吸引力。
【面部与表情】：她的面容充满魅力，嘴唇微微张开且富有光泽，妆容精致；颧骨轮廓分明，长而浓密的睫毛为她的脸庞增色；皮肤如瓷器般光滑细腻。
【配饰】：佩戴着镶嵌祖母绿和钻石的腕表（非常显眼），耳环上点缀着闪亮的钻石；还可见一条精致的金项链。
【服装】：穿着优雅的黑色天鹅绒礼服（露肩设计，突显身材曲线）；双肩裸露，姿态优雅。
【布局与结构】：采用网页产品详情页（Web PDP）的布局方式，构图不对称：左侧为产品图库，右侧为购买按钮；主图下方配有缩略图，可查看产品细节、不同颜色版本以及与生活方式相关的照片。
【光线与氛围】：采用伦勃朗式的照明效果，营造出一种忧郁的氛围；背景颜色较深，伴有微弱的光线照射；浅景深效果使得远处的吊灯产生的光晕效果十分明显。
【技术细节】：图片分辨率达到8K，细节丰富、极具写实感；腕表和面部的清晰度极高，皮肤质感处理得非常自然柔和。

在**右下角**，用优雅的手写体署名**{"signature name" "伊莎贝拉"}**点缀着整幅作品。

**负面示例**：画面朝向左侧，人物也朝向左侧；风格可能为卡通、插画或3D渲染；画面质量较差（如模糊、变形等）；人物解剖结构可能不准确；手部描绘不清晰（例如手指缺失或多余）；可能存在文字水印；光线过于明亮，营造出欢快的氛围；人物未佩戴任何首饰，穿着普通服装；同样在**右下角**，用小字体书写着“Willy”作为署名。
prompt_en:
Facing the right side of the frame, body angled slightly forward, hyper-realistic cinematic portrait of a glamorous {"ethnicity and gender" "Eurasian woman"} in her late 20s, showcasing a high-end {"product" "emerald wristwatch"}.

[Angle & Gaze]: Explicitly facing towards the right side of the canvas, 3/4 view, sultry gaze directed slightly downward, captivating expression.
[Face & Expression]: Alluring expression with slightly parted glossy lips, dewy makeup, defined cheekbones, long dark eyelashes, flawless porcelain skin texture.
[Accessories]: Emerald and diamond encrusted wristwatch (prominent), sparkling diamond stud earrings, delicate gold necklace visible.
[Outfit]: Elegant black velvet gown (off-shoulder, emphasizing curves), bare shoulders, graceful posture.
[Layout & Structure]: Web PDP (Product Detail Page) style layout with asymmetric composition. Product Gallery (left), Buy Box (right). Main image, thumbnails for detail, color, and lifestyle shots.
[Lighting & Atmosphere]: Rembrandt lighting, moody atmosphere, dark background with subtle light shafts, shallow depth of field, bokeh from distant chandeliers.
[Technical]: 8k resolution, highly detailed, photorealistic, sharp focus on watch and face, soft skin texture.
A stylish handwritten signature **'{"signature name" "Isabella"}'** is elegantly placed at the **Bottom Right corner**.

Negative prompt: facing left, looking left, body facing left, cartoon, illustration, anime, 3d render, blurry, distorted, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra fingers, text, watermark, bright lighting, cheerful atmosphere, no jewelry, plain clothes.. A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner

title: 微型商店
author: @NanoBanana_labs
prompt: [品牌] 的微型立体模型店。屋顶由超大的 [产品] 制成，窗户上方是巨大的 [品牌] 标识，摊主正在向顾客递上 [产品]，地面上覆盖着许多 [产品]。手工软陶造型，摄影棚微距照片，柔和的光线，浅景深，竖屏 3:4

title: 蜜蜂科学城
prompt: 创建图像 3D Q版迷你风格，一座蜂巢结构的甜蜜科研基地，建筑由六边形透明蜂蜡舱堆叠而成，顶部悬浮滴落蜂蜜的太阳花洒水器，外墙爬满发光花粉藤蔓。侧面延伸出蜂蜡滑梯与蒲公英降落伞，入口是旋转的向日葵转门。透过蜂巢窗可见内部试管操作台、蜜糖吊灯和穿白大褂的蜜蜂博士。花园里有驾驶花粉摩托的甲虫快递员、举着放大镜的蝴蝶研究员，搭配蜂蜜长椅、雏菊花洒喷泉和动态萤火虫光标，整体笼罩琥珀色光晕，打造超现实昆虫科学城的萌趣生态。
prompt_en: Create an image in 3D chibi style of a cute scientific research base with a honeycomb structure. The building is made of stacked hexagonal transparent beeswax pods, topped with a sunflower sprinkler that floats and drips honey. The exterior walls are covered in glowing pollen vines. Extending from the side are a beeswax slide and a dandelion parachute, with a rotating sunflower door at the entrance. Through the honeycomb windows, you can see an interior with test tube workstations, a honey chandelier, and a bee scientist in a white lab coat. In the garden, there’s a beetle courier riding a pollen motorcycle, a butterfly researcher holding a magnifying glass, along with honey benches, daisy fountains, and animated firefly cursors. The scene is bathed in an amber glow, creating a whimsical, surreal insect science city with a charming ecological vibe.

title: 品牌设计指南海报
author: @ai4everyday
prompt: 使用上传的产品图片创建一个垂直的9:16品牌设计指南海报。调整设计风格，以匹配产品的利基和视觉识别。用清晰、优雅的部分构建海报：（1）大型徽标显示和安全区使用，（2）以中心和突出显示的产品模型，（3）带有十六进制代码的主色调和次色调色板，（4）带有标题、副标题、正文字体样本和行距规格的排版指南，（5）品牌使用的图标或图形主题示例，（6）带有示例生活方式或工作室视觉效果的图像处理风格，（7）网格系统或布局规则，（8）包装模型和表面应用，（9）带有注释视觉效果的注意事项。使用极简主义的白色或柔和的中性背景，搭配结构化的布局分隔和阴影。结果必须视觉丰富、干净，适合印刷或数字品牌书籍。
prompt_en: Create a vertical 9:16 brand design guide poster using the uploaded product image. Adapt the design style to match the product’s niche and visual identity. Structure the poster with clear, elegant sections: (1) Large logo display and safe zone usage, (2) Product mockup centered and highlighted, (3) Primary and secondary color palette swatches with hex codes, (4) Typography guide with heading, subheading, body font samples, and line spacing specs, (5) Iconography or graphic motif examples used by the brand, (6) Image treatment style with sample lifestyle or studio visuals, (7) Grid system or layout rules, (8) Packaging mockups and surface applications, (9) Do’s & Don’ts with annotated visuals. Use minimalist white or soft neutral background with structured layout dividers and drop shadows. The result must be visually rich, clean, and suitable for a printed or digital brand book.

title: 电影感时尚肖像
author: Nano banana
prompt:
1. 打开 Gemini / ChatGPT / Grok
2. 上传您的图片
3. 复制并粘贴此提示

一张高时尚电影风格的肖像，描绘一位年轻而成熟的女性，拥有光滑、轮廓分明的面部特征和柔和打理的发型，自信地坐在一张黑色金属吧凳上。她身穿一件合身的黑色高领毛衣，优雅地勾勒出身体曲线，搭配高腰棕色灯芯绒长裤，裤脚卷起，以及一双带有精致轮廓的抛光黑色皮革切尔西靴。

场景设定在一个极简主义的工作室环境中，拥有干净的白色地板和一个大型浅褐色背景，增强了构图的暖色调。戏剧性的黄金时刻阳光透过一扇看不见的窗户照射进来，在她身后的墙壁上以及部分身体上投射出引人注目的明暗对比矩形窗格光影图案，营造出深度、对比度和电影张力。

她的姿势显得沉着而有力，表情平静自信，眼神略带编辑风格。使用 35mm 镜头以超高 8K 分辨率拍摄，画面呈现出温暖、受胶片启发的调色板、柔和的自然阴影和丰富的纹理细节。整体氛围优雅、富有情绪且永恒——将经典的时尚美学与现代电影叙事融为一体。
prompt_en:
1. Open Gemini / ChatGPT / Grok
2. Upload your image
3. Copy and paste this prompt

A high-fashion cinematic portrait of a sophisticated young woman with sleek, well-defined facial features and softly styled hair, sitting confidently on a black metal barstool. She is dressed in a fitted black turtleneck that contours elegantly to the body, paired with high-waisted brown corduroy trousers featuring rolled cuffs, and polished black leather Chelsea boots with a refined silhouette. 

The setting is a minimalist studio environment with a clean white floor and a large tan-colored backdrop that enhances the warm tones of the composition. Dramatic golden-hour sunlight streams through an unseen window, casting a striking chiaroscuro rectangular window-pane light pattern across the wall behind her and partially across her form, creating depth, contrast, and cinematic tension.

Her pose feels composed yet powerful, with a calm, confident expression and a subtle editorial gaze. Shot in ultra-high 8K resolution on a 35mm lens, the image features a warm, film-inspired color palette, soft natural shadows, and rich texture detail. The overall atmosphere is elegant, moody, and timeless—blending classic fashion aesthetics with modern cinematic storytelling.

title: 用花朵美化你的产品
author: @Kerroudjm
prompt: (产品名称或图片)放置在白色大理石底座上，休息在香槟色丝绸上，的高端编辑照片。它被淡色花朵环绕，其类型和颜色自然与产品的主要颜色（调色板）协调——补充并增强其色调。来自左上方的柔和自然光。3D 现实主义，奢华产品摄影，浅景深，1:1 格式。
prompt_en: A high-end editorial photo of (PRODUCT NAME OR IMAGE) placed on a white marble pedestal, resting on champagne-colored silk. It is surrounded by pastel flowers whose type and color naturally harmonize with the product’s primary colors (COLOR PALETTE) — complementing and enhancing its tones. Soft natural light from the upper left. 3D realism, luxury product photography, shallow depth of field, 1:1 format.

title: 大闹天宫gemini版
author: X / Keng哥
prompt:
您是一位专家级 AI 艺术总监和故事板大师。您的目标是深入分析一个[场景]，并生成**一系列 9 个独特的图像提示**。

# 目标
创作一个完整的视觉小说改编版本，该版本由**9 张单独的图像**组成。
* **每张图像**必须是一个**严格的 3x3 网格拼贴**（9 格）。
* **总内容量**：9 张图片 × 9 格 = 81 个独特的叙事节点。
* 最终效果应让人感觉像是一个完整的 1990 年代动画剧集被分解成接触片。

# 风格基因（新中式水墨 & 90 年代动画）
* **艺术风格**：新中式水墨，上海美术电影制片厂 90 年代风格。
* **技法**："大巧若拙"（笨拙却精巧），重墨勾勒，宣纸纹理，水彩晕染，传统矿物颜料（土黄、靛蓝、朱红）。
* **布局限制**：**每幅严格 3x3 矩阵**。

# 增强推理模块（大脑）
在撰写提示词之前，你必须执行一个**层级叙事拆分**：
1. **宏观分析**：将[场景]分为**9 大章节**（按时间顺序排列）。
* *示例:* 1.引言 -> 2.冲突 A -> 3.冲突 B -> ... -> 9.结论.
2. **微扩展**：对 9 章中的每一章，进一步将其分解为 9 个微步骤（镜头、动作、反应、细节），以填充 3x3 网格。

# 输出格式
在代码块内生成一个包含**9 个独立提示**的列表。对每个提示使用以下结构：
prompt_en:
# Role
You are an expert AI Art Director and Master Storyboard Artist. Your goal is to conduct a deep narrative analysis of a [SCENARIO] and generate a **Series of 9 Distinct Image Prompts**.

# Objective
Create a complete visual novel adaptation of the [SCENARIO] consisting of **9 separate images**.
* **Each Image** must be a **Strict 3x3 Grid Collage** (9 panels).
* **Total Content:** 9 Images × 9 Panels = 81 distinct storytelling beats.
* The result should feel like a complete 1990s animation episode broken down into contact sheets.

# Style DNA (New Chinese Ink Wash & 90s Animation)
* **Art Style:** New Chinese Ink Wash (新中式水墨), Shanghai Animation Film Studio 1990s style (上美影风格).
* **Technique:** "Da Qiao Ruo Zhuo" (Clumsy but skillful), heavy ink outlines, rice paper texture, watercolor bleeding, traditional mineral colors (Earthy yellow, Indigo, Vermilion).
* **Layout Constraint:** **Strict 3x3 Matrix** per image.

# Enhanced Reasoning Module (The Brain)
Before writing prompts, you must perform a **Hierarchical Narrative Split**:
1.  **Macro-Analysis:** Divide the [SCENARIO] into **9 Major Chapters** (Chronological order).
    * *Example:* 1.Intro -> 2.Conflict A -> 3.Conflict B -> ... -> 9.Conclusion.
2.  **Micro-Expansion:** For **EACH** of the 9 Chapters, break it down further into **9 Micro-Steps** (Camera shots, actions, reactions, details) to fill the 3x3 grid.

# Output Format
Produce a list of **9 Separate Prompts** inside a code block. Use the following structure for EACH prompt:

title: 文字排版服装合成
author: nanoprompts.org
prompt:
你是一个图像编辑代理。
使用上传的街景照片，执行以下步骤，并将每个步骤的输出作为下一个步骤的输入。

步骤1 - 清洁背景板（移除人物）

完全移除女孩。

用夜晚街道的真实延续来修补缺失区域：
延伸沥青、人行道瓷砖、汽车、店面、霓虹灯标志和她身后的人。

结果必须看起来像原始照片拍摄时没有人物，
没有轮廓，没有抠图伪影，没有模糊。

步骤2 - 单独图层上的排版服装（颜色匹配）

返回到有女孩的原始照片。

保持她的皮肤、面部、头发、姿势和光照完全真实。

仅移除连帽衫和短裤的织物，包括接缝、褶皱、皱纹、阴影和纹理。

文字服装规则：

用仅由平面手绘文字组成的新服装替换连帽衫和短裤：

[YOUR_TEXT]

颜色匹配（重要）：

自动采样原始连帽衫的主导颜色（粉红色、红色或任何色调）。
→ 仅对连帽衫区域的所有文字使用这些采样的颜色。

自动采样原始短裤的主导颜色（黄色、蓝色等）。
→ 仅对短裤区域的所有文字使用这些采样的颜色。

不要在服装部分之间混合颜色。

采样的颜色必须应用为平面、纯色，没有渐变。

服装填充规则：

字母必须密集填充连帽衫和短裤的形状。

服装内所有非字母区域必须是纯色度绿色（RGB 0,255,0）。

绝对不能有黑色、灰色、织物纹理、阴影或渐变。

步骤3 - 合成到清洁背景上

从步骤2中抠除所有纯色度绿色 → 使其完全透明。

将带有颜色匹配的排版服装的女孩放置到步骤1的清洁背景板上。

与原始相机完美对齐。

确保夜晚街道在字母间隙之间自然显示，具有真实细节。

如果需要，重新计算从女孩到街道表面的自然柔和阴影。

最终目标

一张完全逼真的街景照片，其中：

女孩保持真实，

她的服装完全被从她原始服装中采样的颜色的粗体手绘文字替换，

真实的夜晚街道背景在所有字母间隙中清晰显示，

没有原始服装或其阴影的痕迹。

"使用局部平均而不是全局平均精确采样颜色区域。
无论照片光照如何，都以零阴影和零光衰减应用文字颜色。"

title: 磨砂泡泡 3D 图标
author: @Anima_Labs
prompt_en:
Sandblasted Bubble 3D Icon Style, rendered in 3d_semi_transparent_detailed (3D semi-transparent fine detail).  
Icon theme: {{PlayStation Controller}}.  
Object analysis: retains contours (true), uses geometric-sensitive mapping (true), features smooth rounded edges and subtle internal reflections.  
Material properties: base materials include frosted semi-transparent plastic and matte translucent acrylic.  
Internal elements: floating colorful spheres visible through the shell.  
Surface finish: matte, diffused, semi-transparent with slight translucency.  
Texture: no external tint color; transparency reveals internal objects.  
Brand elements: none.  
Color scheme: primary colors in shades #FFFFFF and #F5F5F5; accent colors include #FF69B4, #FFA500, #6A5ACD, #00CED1, #FFD700.  
Contrast: extremely high.  
Lighting: soft ambient light combined with outline lighting; high intensity.  
Shadows: gentle glow beneath the object.  
Highlights: subtle edge glow and soft reflections on the top.  
Rendering style: modern 3D icon with internal colorful elements.  
Background: pure black.  
Camera angle: isometric 3/4 view.  
Depth of field: none; all details are sharp and in focus.  
Style notes:  
- Black background enhances bubble colors.  
- Frosted transparency appears subtly luminous against the black background.  
- Ideal for high-contrast, collectible-style icons.

title: 可口可乐冰爽视觉广告

title: 黑白风格肖像照
author: @MANISH1027512
prompt: 一位女士自信地站立在极简主义的摄影棚中，从略低的视角拍摄，半身肖像。她的头微微向下倾斜，表情平静而神秘。中分编织的双马尾辫，几缕发丝随意地落在脸庞上，头发带有微妙的湿润质感。她穿着紧身的黑色无袖连衣裙和黑色皮手套，双手松散地在身体前方握着一条皮带。画面采用戏剧性的单一主光源从右上角打下，高对比度，黑白影调，强烈的轮廓光勾勒出她的身体曲线。背景是纯色的纹理墙壁，营造出电影般的黑色电影氛围，如同艺术时尚摄影作品。灵感来源于赫尔穆特·牛顿和彼得·库尔森，景深较浅，光影过渡平滑，整体情绪优雅而充满力量。
prompt_en: a woman standing confidently in a minimalist studio, shot from a slightly low angle, half-body portrait, her head tilted slightly down with a calm and enigmatic expression, middle-parted braided pigtails with a few loose strands falling over her face, subtle wet hair texture, wearing a tight black sleeveless dress and black leather gloves, holding a leather belt loosely in front of her body — dramatic single key light from upper right, high contrast, black and white tones, strong rim light accentuating her curves, plain textured wall background, cinematic noir atmosphere, fine art fashion photography, inspired by Helmut Newton and Peter Coulson, shallow depth of field, smooth gradients, elegant and powerful mood
