author: Nano banana
prompt_en: Show me new years eve at 11:59 PM at this location: 40.64473706365788, -74.07352690239428

title: 8位像素复古游戏图标
author: Ege
prompt: 请设计一个极简的 8 位像素风格的 [ 🍔 ] 标志，居中置于纯白色背景上。使用复古风格的配色方案，并采用像素化的细节、锐利的边缘和简洁的方块造型。该标志应简洁、经典且易于识别，并具有像素艺术风格——灵感源自经典街机游戏的美学。
prompt_en:
Bringing back the arcade vibes: Minimalist 8-bit pixel icons for your inner retro nerd!
Created with ChatGPT-4o.
Prompt 👇 https://t.co/D49qPuMEWD

title: 工业内部品牌广告
author: aziz4ai
prompt:
创建一个超现实、1:1 比例的品牌广告。
将产品内部转化为微型工厂或实验室。
展示详细的内部系统：管道、工人、发光的液体、蒸汽和机器——所有这些都运作起来，反映产品的核心功能（能量、美丽、风味等）。
保持外层产品的品牌标识真实锐利。
将背景设置得简约且电影感十足。
在顶部添加品牌标志，底部添加一句简短有力的口号。
风格：影棚级灯光，高对比度，照片级真实纹理。
prompt_en:
Create a hyperrealistic, surreal 1:1 advertisement for [Brand Name].
Transform the product into a miniature industrial factory or laboratory from the inside.
Reveal detailed internal systems: pipes, workers, glowing fluids, steam, and machines — all functioning to reflect the product’s core purpose (energy, beauty, flavor, etc).
Keep the outer product branding realistic and sharp.
Set the background minimal and cinematic.
Add the brand logo at the top, and a short, powerful slogan at the bottom.
Style: studio-grade lighting, high contrast, photorealistic textures.

title: 人物作为动物的高度详细肖像
author: @LinusEkenstam
prompt: [人物] 作为 [动物] 的高度详细肖像
prompt_en: A highly detailed portrait of a [person] as a [animal].

title: 品牌解锁童年回忆
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: A realistic, cinematic photograph of a vintage [BRAND NAME] item being gently lifted from a dusty stack of old children's books in a dimly lit attic. The item is designed in classic [BRAND NAME] style—featuring authentic patterns, textures, or logos (e.g. monograms, embossing, or signature motifs relevant to the brand). It is partially opened to reveal a miniature, warmly lit classroom inspired by [COUNTRY] school interiors, complete with small regional-style desks, a chalkboard with delicate handwriting in [LANGUAGE], and traditional local details like shoes, posters, or flags. A paper airplane hovers mid-air. The lighting is moody and nostalgic, with soft shadows and golden highlights suggesting afternoon light filtering through attic beams. On the top book cover at the bottom of the image, the [BRAND NAME] logo is written in an elegant, fountain-pen calligraphy style—subtle, integrated into the scene, and not obscuring the main subject.
prompt_en: A realistic, cinematic photograph of a vintage [BRAND NAME] item being gently lifted from a dusty stack of old children's books in a dimly lit attic. The item is designed in classic [BRAND NAME] style—featuring authentic patterns, textures, or logos (e.g. monograms, embossing, or signature motifs relevant to the brand). It is partially opened to reveal a miniature, warmly lit classroom inspired by [COUNTRY] school interiors, complete with small regional-style desks, a chalkboard with delicate handwriting in [LANGUAGE], and traditional local details like shoes, posters, or flags. A paper airplane hovers mid-air. The lighting is moody and nostalgic, with soft shadows and golden highlights suggesting afternoon light filtering through attic beams. On the top book cover at the bottom of the image, the [BRAND NAME] logo is written in an elegant, fountain-pen calligraphy style—subtle, integrated into the scene, and not obscuring the main subject.

title: 人物姿势修改
author: @arrakis_ai
prompt: 让图片中的人直视前方

title: 直升机品牌广告
author: @TechieBySA
prompt: 创作一张超写实的 1:1 方形图像，展现一架小型直升机在明亮的蓝天中飞行，周围有蓬松的白云和微妙的镜头眩光。直升机涂装着[BRAND]的标志性颜色和图案。它下方悬挂着一个来自[BRAND]的巨大产品。整个构图具有干净、俏皮（或高端、未来感）的广告风格。在底部，包含[BRAND]的标志和一句简短的风格化标语，如[BRAND SLOGAN]。尺寸为 1080x1080。
prompt_en: Create a hyper-realistic, square 1:1 image featuring a small helicopter flying through a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds and a subtle lens flare. The helicopter is painted in the signature colors and graphics of [BRAND]. It is carrying a giant product from [BRAND] hanging below. The composition has the look and feel of a clean, playful (or premium, futuristic) advertisement. At the bottom, include the [BRAND] logo and a small slogan like [BRAND SLOGAN] in a stylish font. 1080x1080 dimension.

title: 冰镇可口可乐广告视觉呈现
author: 𝐌
prompt: 可口可乐 罐子的超逼真工作室产品照片，罐身水平放置，居中并略微嵌入碎冰和冰霜中。罐身覆盖着冰冷的冷凝水滴和薄霜。柔和的电影光线突出了金属红色纹理。冰晶锐利，带有冷蓝色调。清爽、冰冷、高端商业饮料广告，8K 细节，1350x1080，除 Logo 外无文字。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic studio product shot of a Coca-Cola can lying horizontally, centered and slightly embedded in crushed ice and frosty snow. The can is covered with cold condensation droplets and thin frost. Soft cinematic light highlights the metallic red texture. Ice crystals are sharp with cool blue tones. Refreshing, icy, premium commercial beverage ad, 8K detail, 1350x1080, no text except logo.

title: 马赛克彩色玻璃徽章
author: miilesus

title: 90年代风格的摔跤人物
author: @CharaspowerAI
prompt: 产品摄影，一个 90 年代风格的 WWF 摔角人偶包装，包装中的人偶是[你的角色]。人偶色彩鲜艳，角色设计精细，背景为白色，配有专业工作室灯光。
prompt_en: Product photography, a 1990's style WWF Wrestling Figurine package with the figurine wrestler in the package being [your character]. The figure features bright colors, a detailed character design,  white background with professional studio lighting.

title: 红笔批注
author: @AiMachete
prompt: 分析这张图片。用红笔标出你可以改进的地方。

title: 城市照片上的巨大插画生物
author: nanoprompts.org
prompt: 使用上传的城市照片作为基础图像。不要改变真实的建筑、街道、汽车或人物。保持照片完全真实。在建筑物上方和后方的天空中添加一个非常大的、风格化的插画生物，就像它高耸在城市之上。该生物应以平面、图形风格绘制，具有清晰的轮廓和有限的霓虹色（例如柔和的霓虹绿、霓虹黄和柠檬色），类似于壁画或海报插图。生物设计：- 奇特的奇幻怪物，不恐怖或暴力 - 由分层形状、鳞片、皮毛或花卉图案制成 - 长臂或头发沿着建筑物垂下 - 大角或不寻常的特征，在天空中清晰地显现轮廓 与照片的整合：- 放置生物，使其身体的部分出现在建筑边缘后面，尊重透视 - 使用正确的重叠：建筑边缘在前，生物在后，使其感觉嵌入场景中 - 如果需要，在附近建筑表面添加非常柔和的阴影或颜色反射，但要保持微妙 - 保持原始天空亮度，使插图清晰突出 可选：- 在街道层面添加一些小的、简单的插画角色（平面、极简风格）遭狗或过马路，但不要遮盖真实的人。整体氛围：梦幻、超现实的城市场景，巨大、友好的插画生物出现在现实建筑上方，结合真实摄影和清晰的现代插图。

title: 新动漫风格
author: @Artedeingenio
prompt: 将此图像转换为 1960 年代手冢风格的插图。使用大而圆、富有表现力的眼睛，并带有明亮的高光。通过柔软、圆润的四肢和简洁的线条简化解剖结构。避免细节纹理 - 专注于平滑的颜色填充和强烈的轮廓。最终的图像应该类似于 Astro Boy 的老式动漫框架，具有乐观、未来主义的感觉。
prompt_en: Transform this image into a 1960s Tezuka-style illustration. Use big, rounded expressive eyes with bright highlights. Simplify the anatomy with soft, rounded limbs and clean linework. Avoid detailed textures — focus on smooth color fills and strong silhouettes. The final image should resemble a vintage anime frame from Astro Boy, with an optimistic, futuristic feel.

title: 微型电影片场
author: Nano banana

title: 双重曝光艺术：现代人与自然的对比之美
author: X / LudovicCreator
prompt: 一位艺伎被描绘在双重曝光技术中，其中一半的轮廓包含几何黑色城市景观元素，而另一半则揭示出野性的粉色自然景观，代表着现代人类的双重存在。
prompt_en: A geisha portrayed in a Double Exposure technique where half the silhouette contains geometric black cityscape elements while the other half reveals wild pink natural landscapes, representing the dual existence of modern humanity.

title: 产品添加炫酷光效2
author: 雏田小姐
prompt: 红色区域是喷射蓝色光流(模拟气流)，光流带粒子特效，适当的透明度。光线路径参考产品的动态曲线，仿佛能量在产品内部高速运转，营造专业且富有未来感的视觉效果，深蓝色为主调的色彩搭配，不要出现红色。
prompt_en: 红色区域是喷射蓝色光流(模拟气流)，光流带粒子特效，适当的透明度。光线路径参考产品的动态曲线，仿佛能量在产品内部高速运转，营造专业且富有未来感的视觉效果，深蓝色为主调的色彩搭配，不要出现红色。

title: 大型胶囊形容器的品牌3D渲染图
author: TechieBySA
prompt: 制作一个超逼真的大型胶囊形容器的3D渲染图。上半部分为品牌标志性颜色的实心亮面材质，并醒目地印有[品牌]官方标识。下半部分为透明材质，展现出该品牌众多知名产品的微缩模型[产品]，整齐地包装在内。以深色背景搭配电影级灯光和柔和的反射效果，营造出高端超现实的广告美感。采用超精细的专业产品渲染风格。尺寸为1080x1080。
prompt_en: Create a hyper-realistic 3D render of a large capsule-shaped container. The top half is solid and glossy in the brand’s signature color, featuring the official [BRAND] logo prominently. The bottom half is transparent, revealing multiple miniature famous products of this brand, [PRODUCT], neatly packed inside. Set against a dark background with cinematic lighting and soft reflections to create a premium, surreal advertising aesthetic. Ultra-detailed, professional product render style. 1080x1080 dimension

title: 带肖像和优雅排版的宽幅名人名言卡片
prompt: 一张宽幅名人名言卡片,文字前有一个大的淡色引号。肖像在左侧,文字在右侧,文字占据画面的2/3,肖像占1/3,肖像上有微妙的渐变过渡。棕色背景,衬线字体浅金色文字'Productize Yourself',小文字'— Naval Ravikant'。

title: 高端香水产品摄影提示词
author: AmirMushich
prompt:
产品：

[品牌] [产品名称] - [瓶型], [标签描述], [液体颜色]



场景：

奢侈品照片，漂浮在深色水面上，周围环绕着[种类]和[颜色]的[花卉]。

[灯光风格 - 例如，“黄金时段光晕” /

“明亮的新鲜光线”]创造
prompt_en:
Product:

[BRAND] [PRODUCT NAME] - [bottle shape], [label description], [liquid color]



Scene:

Luxury product shot floating on dark water with [flower type] in [colors] arranged around it.

[Lighting style - e.g., "golden hour glow" /

"bright fresh light"] creates

title: 作为家具的著名地标
author: zeng_wt
prompt: [LANDMARK - 自由女神像/埃菲尔铁塔/大本钟]雕刻完美，功能强大，就像一个[FURNITURE_PIECE - 灯/书架/咖啡桌]，客厅设置，正常比例的家具，逼真的细节。
prompt_en: The [LANDMARK - Statue of Liberty/Eiffel Tower/Big Ben] perfectly carved and functional as a [FURNITURE_PIECE - lamp/bookshelf/coffee table], living room setting, normal scale furniture, photorealistic detail.

title: 青苹果能量饮料闪电冲击视觉广告
author: K
prompt: 一个纤细的绿色能量饮料罐（BRAND NAME），呈苹果绿和哑光黑，以 45 度角斜向悬浮，迸发出气泡翻腾的青苹果飞溅。霓虹绿闪电划过背景，白色苹果片漂浮四周。强烈的酸爽能量，大胆而前卫。--ar 3:4
prompt_en: A slim green energy drink can ( BRAND NAME)in apple green and matte black, hovering diagonally 45°, bursting with fizzy green apple splash. Neon green lightning strikes the background, and white apple slices float around. Intense sour energy, bold and edgy --ar 3:4

title: 国旗烟花表演
author: Nano banana
prompt: 夜空中[地标]上壮观的烟花表演的超写实4K照片。烟花以[国家]国旗的精确颜色[国旗颜色]爆炸，自然地向外辐射。包括黑暗的夜空，烟花的烟雾轨迹，以及水面上的彩色爆发的倒影（如果临水）。城市剪影或地标（[标志性地标]）应在背景中清晰可见。电影构图，照片写实风格，专业的长曝光摄影技术，烟花爆发的锐利焦点，戏剧性的光线，4K质量。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic 4K photograph of a spectacular fireworks display over [LANDMARK] at night. The fireworks explode in the exact colors of the [COUNTRY] flag: [FLAG COLORS] radiating naturally outward. Include a dark night sky, smoke trails from the fireworks, and reflections of the colored bursts on the water below (if waterfront). The city silhouette or landmark ([ICONIC LANDMARK]) should be clearly visible in the background. Cinematic composition, photorealistic style, professional long exposure photography techniques, sharp focus on fireworks burst, dramatic lighting, 4K quality.

title: 带有动态行动号召的互动挑战邀请缩略图
prompt: 创建一个高度互动的挑战邀请缩略图。人物动作:图像中的人物做出挑衅/邀请手势(如挥手、指向观众或竖起大拇指)。表情:自信、挑战性的微笑或严肃坚定的表情。背景:充满活力的跳跃色彩的动态抽象几何背景。互动文本提示:顶部大文本:'你敢吗?'中央核心文本(带描边和阴影):'7天健身挑战'底部行动号召(红色按钮样式):'点击加入 ▶'视觉元素:添加倒计时时钟图标,放置'50,000参与者'徽章,右上难度标签:'⭐⭐⭐中等难度'。效果:动态光扫效果营造紧迫感。氛围:充满能量和动作,激发观众参与。

title: 奇幻森林中的冰镇芬达罐
author: Yaseen Khan Gul

title: 游戏角色状态界面
author: @AI_Kei75
prompt:
使用原图中的角色创建一个 RPG 游戏角色状态界面：
保留原图角色的设计和风格，但将服装更换为幻想 RPG 风格，并调整姿势以符合情境。
在画面中同时展示原图角色与状态界面并排显示。
状态界面需包含角色参数、技能、图标等信息，呈现丰富而直观的布局。
背景使用与原图风格匹配的幻想风格场景。
整体界面设计应丰富、时尚，风格类似 2025 年的高质量游戏界面。
prompt_en:
Create an RPG game character status interface using the character from the original image:  
Maintain the original character's design and style, but change the outfit to a fantasy RPG style, and adjust the pose to suit the scene.  
Display both the original character and the status interface side by side in the image.  
The status interface should include character stats, skills, icons, and other information, presented in a rich and intuitive layout.  
Use a fantasy-style background scene that matches the style of the original image.  
The overall interface design should be detailed and fashionable, similar to high-quality game interfaces from 2025.

title: 沙滩胶囊城市
author: TechieBySA
prompt: 一个充满活力的、超写实的[CITY]微缩模型，放置在一个透明胶囊内，躺在沙滩上。胶囊一半是[COLOR]色（与[COUNTRY]的国旗相匹配），彩色部分上用白色文字写着[CITY]。胶囊内部：[CITY]的标志性地标、美丽的运河或街道、小巧精致的船只或汽车、阳光明媚的光线、电影般的景深、梦幻般的氛围、背景中的海浪。
prompt_en: A vibrant, hyper-realistic miniature of [CITY] inside a transparent capsule lying on a sandy beach. The capsule is half [COLOR] (matching [COUNTRY]’s flag) with [CITY] written in white text on the colored section. Inside the capsule: iconic landmarks of [CITY], beautiful water canals or streets, small detailed boats or cars, sunny bright lighting, cinematic depth of field, dreamy atmosphere, ocean waves in the background.

title: 黑色蕾丝连衣裙多视角电商产品页面
prompt: Generate a multi-view e-commerce product page for a black lace dress, including front view, side view, and back view. Add fabric texture close-ups, pricing tags, and "Buy Now" button. Ensure 4K resolution and brand consistency. Clean white background, professional product photography lighting, model wearing the dress in elegant poses. Include size chart and material composition details. High-end fashion e-commerce aesthetic.

title: 皮克斯/迪士尼3D角色解构艺术海报：电影级Knolling风格个人物品布局
prompt: 创建一张超高质量、电影级的皮克斯/迪士尼风格3D角色解构艺术海报。将参考转化为风格化写实的3D动画角色，并以严谨的Knolling艺术风格布局展示其个人物品。宽高比：16:9横向。艺术风格：皮克斯风格化写实主义 - 将夸张的卡通比例与照片级真实材质光照相结合。质量基准：可与《寻梦环游记》《青春变形记》《卢卡》的官方角色宣传海报媲美。物品布局：30-36件物品以90度直角或放射状有序排列围绕角色。类别1：时尚物品（香槟金标签）- 主要服装解构展示袖子、领子、面料、衬里分离悬浮；鞋类解构显示鞋底、鞋面、鞋带、鞋跟分离；法式高级定制的皮带、包袋、帽子、围巾等配饰。类别2：美妆系列（玫瑰金标签）- 彩妆产品如可见膏体和色号标签的口红、颜色清晰的眼影盘、粉饼、可见液体折射的巴黎香水瓶；护肤精华瓶、面霜罐、美容仪器。类别3：现代必需品（钢蓝色标签）- 电子设备包括屏幕显示内容的智能手机、无线耳机、智能手表、笔记本电脑/平板、日本科技品牌相机。类别4：奢华与爱好（24K金标签）- 奢华配饰如带宝石色散效果的珠宝、展示内部隔层的设计师包袋；爱好物品如艺术用品、书籍、乐器、运动器材、瑞士巧克力和意大利浓缩咖啡工具。每件物品要求：与角色级别相当的3D精度渲染质量，01-36编号圆形徽章，PBR材质配真实柔和阴影。爆炸视图技术配优雅的虚线/实线连接线、装饰箭头、材质样本、测量尺。标题设计：主标题'THE ART OF DECONSTRUCTION'使用优雅衬线字体配金箔效果；副标题'Character Essence Unveiled'使用流畅手写风格。设计元素：装饰艺术风格的六边形/圆形细线框架组织物品分组，边缘测量尺，角落和焦点处十字准线，底部材质样本微观方块。背景：白色到奶油色/香槟色的暖色渐变或浅灰到白色的冷色渐变，叠加5-10%透明度的几何网格或蓝图线条，柔和晕影效果，柔和金色散景粒子和微妙胶片颗粒。色彩方案：时尚主题使用香槟金、玫瑰金、奶油色、樱花粉；科技主题使用钢蓝色、炭灰色、银色、电光蓝。技术规格：等同于Cycles/Arnold/RenderMan的路径追踪渲染，最少4096 SPP获得干净无噪点图像，12次光线反弹确保精确全局光照，启用钻石和玻璃折射焦散，角色多边形数量200万+确保曲线平滑，10万+毛发带物理模拟。PBR材质工作流：皮肤使用三层SSS和双层高光，头发使用各向异性着色器和双高光，布料使用微编织法线贴图，金属使用金属度1.0和粗糙度0.1-0.4，玻璃使用IOR 1.5，钻石IOR 2.42带色散。分辨率：4K（3840x2160）横向，16:9宽高比，32位浮点色深，16x MSAA抗锯齿。后期处理：电影LUT调色提升阴影避免纯黑（最小RGB 15,15,15），柔和S曲线增强对比度，色温调整（+200K暖色或-200K冷色），整体饱和度-5%配重点色+10%，高光泛光，柯达Portra 400胶片颗粒，边缘微妙色差，中度晕影，输出锐化。角色：年轻的巴黎时装设计师，周围环绕法式高定物品、北欧极简生活用品、日本科技小工具和瑞士奢华腕表。

title: 咖啡与巧克力的空中盛宴，极致光影下的味觉艺术
author: Sharon Riley

title: 制作照片中人物的玩具
author: @egeberkina
prompt: 制作照片中人物的玩具，做成一个可动人偶。人偶旁边要有玩具装备，比如足球、足球鞋和世界杯奖杯。另外，在包装盒顶部写上“LIONEL MESSI”，其下方写上“GOAT”。请以写实的风格呈现这一画面。
prompt_en:
Create a toy of the person in the photo. Let it be an
action figure. Next to the figure, there should be the toy's
equipment like a football and football boot and world cup. Also,
on top of the box, write 'LIONEL MESSI and underneath it,
'GOAT'.Visualize this in a realistic way.

title: 用自己的审美下棋
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一张高度逼真的传统棋盘垂直照片，从上方看，背景是受 [COUNTRY] 艺术遗产启发的纹理表面。棋盘上有复杂的图案和国家图案，棋盘上用优雅的金色书法写着“[COUNTRY]”字样。所有的棋子都离开了棋盘，围绕着棋盘排列在织物上——有些侧躺着，有些直立着——仿佛等待着被放置。每件作品在形状、装饰和质地上都经过独特的重新构想，反映了 [COUNTRY] 的建筑、文化符号和调色板。丰富的素材、柔和的定向光、电影般的阴影、超详细的编辑静物风格、对称的自上而下的取景、9：16 格式。
prompt_en: A highly realistic vertical photograph of a traditional chessboard viewed from above, set against a textured surface inspired by [COUNTRY]’s artistic heritage. The chessboard features intricate patterns and national motifs, with the word “[COUNTRY]” written across the board in elegant golden calligraphy. All the chess pieces are off the board, arranged around it on the fabric — some lying on their side, others upright — as if waiting to be placed. Each piece is uniquely reimagined in shape, ornament, and texture, reflecting the architecture, cultural symbols, and color palette of [COUNTRY]. Rich materials, soft directional light, cinematic shadows, ultra-detailed editorial still life style, symmetrical top-down framing, 9:16 format.

title: 字母动物
author: @aziz4ai
prompt: 在纯色背景上，一个艺术化设计的大写字母【字母】与一只卡通【动物】相互缠绕的图案。
prompt_en: A stylized capital letter [Letter] with a cartoon [Animal] intertwined with it, on a solid color background.

title: 插画绘画过程四格
author: @ZHO_ZHO_ZHO
prompt: 为人物生成绘画过程四宫格，第一步：线稿，第二步平铺颜色，第三步：增加阴影，第四步：细化成型。不要文字
prompt_en:
Create a four-panel sequence illustrating the character drawing process:  
Step 1: Line art  
Step 2: Flat colors  
Step 3: Add shadows  
Step 4: Refine and finalize  
No text included.

title: 未来一瞥
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: A cinematic rendering of [subject] walking through a rain-soaked street at night, illuminated by moody neon lights, reflections dancing on wet pavement, and a hazy urban skyline in the background. The subject feels alive, caught between solitude and electricity.
prompt_en: A cinematic rendering of [subject] walking through a rain-soaked street at night, illuminated by moody neon lights, reflections dancing on wet pavement, and a hazy urban skyline in the background. The subject feels alive, caught between solitude and electricity.

title: 寂静中的紫光瞬间：电影感优雅与身份锁定的四格拼贴
author: X / Mira

title: 选择你的阵营
author: @aziz4ai
prompt: 一个戏剧性的电影场景，两个竞争对手的产品并排放置在一个定制设计的环境中，在视觉上反映了他们的身份。构图应包括高对比度的照明、雾、霓虹灯等大气效果以及超细节的纹理。在产品下方或背后加入一个强大的3D口号，采用符合场景情绪的大胆风格化排版。产品必须通过颜色、灯光和摆放来体现[品牌A]和[品牌B]的精髓。超现实、喜怒无常的色调，1:1方形格式，具有锐利的景深和高分辨率。
prompt_en: A dramatic cinematic scene featuring two rival products placed side by side in a custom-designed environment that visually reflects their identities. The composition should include high contrast lighting, atmospheric effects like mist, fog, or neon glow, and hyper-detailed textures. Incorporate a powerful 3D slogan below or behind the products in bold stylized typography that fits the scene’s mood. The products must reflect the essence of [Brand A] and [Brand B] through color, lighting, and placement. Ultra-realistic, moody tones, 1:1 square format, with sharp depth of field and high resolution.

title: 洞壁画
author: @azed_ai
prompt: A cave painting of a [subject], rendered with primitive ochres and charcoal lines on a rough stone wall. Smudged handprints, crude geometry, and flickering torchlight add a primal, ancient mood.
prompt_en: A cave painting of a [subject], rendered with primitive ochres and charcoal lines on a rough stone wall. Smudged handprints, crude geometry, and flickering torchlight add a primal, ancient mood.

title: 虚构的英语电影海报-回忆之味
author: songguoxiansen
prompt: 一张虚构的英语电影《回忆之味》（The Taste of Memory）的电影海报。场景设置在一个质朴的19世纪风格厨房里。画面中央，一位红棕色头发、留着小胡子的中年男子（演员 成龙 饰）站在一张木桌后，他身穿白色衬衫、黑色马甲和米色围裙，正看着镜头，手中拿着一大块生红肉，下方是一个木制切菜板。在他的右边，一位梳着高髻的黑发女子（演员 刘亦菲 饰）倚靠在桌子上，温柔地对他微笑。她穿着浅色衬衫和一条上白下蓝的长裙。桌上除了放有切碎的葱和卷心菜丝的切菜板外，还有一个白色陶瓷盘、新鲜香草，左侧一个木箱上放着一串深色葡萄。背景是一面粗糙的灰白色抹灰墙，墙上挂着一幅风景画。最右边的一个台面上放着一盏复古油灯。海报上有大量的文字信息。左上角是白色的无衬线字体"ARTISAN FILMS PRESENTS"，其下方是"ELEANOR VANCE"和"ACADEMY AWARD® WINNER"。右上角写着"ARTHUR PENHALIGON"和"GOLDEN GLOBE® AWARD WINNER"。顶部中央是圣丹斯电影节的桂冠标志，下方写着"SUNDANCE FILM FESTIVAL GRAND JURY PRIZE 2024"。主标题"THE TASTE OF MEMORY"以白色的大号衬线字体醒目地显示在下半部分。标题下方注明了"A FILM BY Tongyi Interaction Lab"。底部区域用白色小字列出了完整的演职员名单，包括"SCREENPLAY BY ANNA REID"、"CULINARY DIRECTION BY JAMES CARTER"以及Artisan Films、Riverstone Pictures和Heritage Media等众多出品公司标志。整体风格是写实主义，采用温暖柔和的灯光方案，营造出一种亲密的氛围。色调以棕色、米色和柔和的绿色等大地色系为主。两位演员的身体都在腰部被截断。
prompt_en: 一张虚构的英语电影《回忆之味》（The Taste of Memory）的电影海报。场景设置在一个质朴的19世纪风格厨房里。画面中央，一位红棕色头发、留着小胡子的中年男子（演员 成龙 饰）站在一张木桌后，他身穿白色衬衫、黑色马甲和米色围裙，正看着镜头，手中拿着一大块生红肉，下方是一个木制切菜板。在他的右边，一位梳着高髻的黑发女子（演员 刘亦菲 饰）倚靠在桌子上，温柔地对他微笑。她穿着浅色衬衫和一条上白下蓝的长裙。桌上除了放有切碎的葱和卷心菜丝的切菜板外，还有一个白色陶瓷盘、新鲜香草，左侧一个木箱上放着一串深色葡萄。背景是一面粗糙的灰白色抹灰墙，墙上挂着一幅风景画。最右边的一个台面上放着一盏复古油灯。海报上有大量的文字信息。左上角是白色的无衬线字体"ARTISAN FILMS PRESENTS"，其下方是"ELEANOR VANCE"和"ACADEMY AWARD® WINNER"。右上角写着"ARTHUR PENHALIGON"和"GOLDEN GLOBE® AWARD WINNER"。顶部中央是圣丹斯电影节的桂冠标志，下方写着"SUNDANCE FILM FESTIVAL GRAND JURY PRIZE 2024"。主标题"THE TASTE OF MEMORY"以白色的大号衬线字体醒目地显示在下半部分。标题下方注明了"A FILM BY Tongyi Interaction Lab"。底部区域用白色小字列出了完整的演职员名单，包括"SCREENPLAY BY ANNA REID"、"CULINARY DIRECTION BY JAMES CARTER"以及Artisan Films、Riverstone Pictures和Heritage Media等众多出品公司标志。整体风格是写实主义，采用温暖柔和的灯光方案，营造出一种亲密的氛围。色调以棕色、米色和柔和的绿色等大地色系为主。两位演员的身体都在腰部被截断。

title: 都市上空巨大的涡旋冲破暴风云层
author: @xxx
prompt: 在一座灯火璀璨的未来都市上空，巨大的螺旋状涡旋冲破暴风云层，显露出后方的蓝天 —— 这一视觉隐喻象征着通用人工智能突破当前局限的重重阻碍，抵达人类难以理解的清晰境界。
prompt_en: A massive spiral vortex tears through storm clouds above a futuristic illuminated city, revealing blue sky beyond a visual metaphor for artificial general intelligence breaking through the turbulence of current limitations to reach clarity beyond human comprehension.

title: 磨砂模糊剪影
author: @umesh_ai
prompt: 一张黑白照片显示了磨砂或半透明表面后面 [SUBJECT] 的模糊剪影。[PART] 轮廓分明，压在表面，与朦胧、模糊的人物的其余部分形成鲜明对比。背景是灰色调的柔和渐变，增强了神秘和艺术的氛围
prompt_en: A black and white photograph shows the blurred silhouette of a [SUBJECT] behind a frosted or translucent surface. The [PART] is sharply defined and pressed against the surface, creating a stark contrast with the rest of the hazy, indistinct figure. The background is a soft gradient of gray tones, enhancing the mysterious and artistic atmosphere

title: 熔化变异文本
author: @gnrlyxyz
prompt: Create a psychedelic, grotesque cartoon-style text design that says “GNARLY”. Arrange the letters in a straight horizontal line. Each letter should be lumpy, melting, and oozing with bright, clashing flat colors like slime green, neon yellow, and hot pink. Each letter must be filled with only one solid flat color, with no gradients or transitions. All drips, melts, and oozes must be solid black with no shading or gradient. Make the design vector-friendly with clean, solid fills and bold black outlines. Add extra black and white eyeballs to make each letter feel like a weird mutated creature. Keep the composition chaotic but readable, like a mutant version of a Saturday morning cartoon. Black background. Square aspect ratio.
prompt_en: Create a psychedelic, grotesque cartoon-style text design that says “GNARLY”. Arrange the letters in a straight horizontal line. Each letter should be lumpy, melting, and oozing with bright, clashing flat colors like slime green, neon yellow, and hot pink. Each letter must be filled with only one solid flat color, with no gradients or transitions. All drips, melts, and oozes must be solid black with no shading or gradient. Make the design vector-friendly with clean, solid fills and bold black outlines. Add extra black and white eyeballs to make each letter feel like a weird mutated creature. Keep the composition chaotic but readable, like a mutant version of a Saturday morning cartoon. Black background. Square aspect ratio.

title: 高端商业广告视觉矩阵生成
author: Yaseen Khan Gul

title: 形状为生日气球文字
author: @Anima_Labs
prompt: 创建一个超逼真的 3D 渲染效果，将气球字母组成单词 [WOW]。每个字母看起来都像是一个闪亮的充气镀铝气球，带有大胆印刷的图案。使用多种纹理，例如 [格子印刷、彩色网格、波点或光泽金属黑]。气球应该是半反射的，具有真实的空气体积、接缝、皱纹和压力点。给每个字母一个独特、有趣的表面设计，但保持整体外观协调一致。使用柔和的粉彩色背景，例如 [橙色]，以对比气球的纹理。光线应产生清晰的反射和柔和的阴影。渲染效果必须是照片级的逼真、有趣且充满活力——就像创意波普艺术生日装置或时尚活动的高端视觉效果。
prompt_en: Create a hyper-realistic 3D rendering of balloon letters forming the word [WOW]. Each letter should look like a shiny, inflatable mylar balloon with a bold printed pattern. Use a mix of textures such as [checkered print, color grids, polka dots, or glossy metallic black]. The balloons should be semi-reflective with realistic air volume, seams, wrinkles, and pressure points. Give each letter a distinct, playful surface design but keep the overall look cohesive. Use a soft pastel background, like [Orange color], to contrast the balloon textures. Lighting should create crisp reflections and soft shadows. The rendering must be photorealistic, fun, and vibrant — like a high-end visual for a creative pop-art birthday installation or fashion campaign.

title: 霓虹酸性能量饮料科幻广告视觉设计
author: Kashberg
prompt: 超逼真的霓虹能量饮料罐悬浮在半空中，黑色罐体配有发光的绿色字体，爆炸性的青柠切片和液体飞溅定格在空中，充满活力的酸绿色光芒，蒸汽烟雾升腾，未来主义的赛博格栅背景，高对比度照明，超精细的水滴，电影级产品摄影，3D 渲染，锐利对焦，高饱和度，科幻商业美学。
prompt_en: Hyper-realistic neon energy drink can floating mid-air, black can with glowing green typography, explosive lime slices and liquid splash frozen in motion, vibrant acid-green glow, vapor smoke rising, futuristic cyber grid background, high contrast lighting, ultra-detailed droplets, cinematic product photography, 3D render, sharp focus, high saturation, sci-fi commercial aesthetic.

title: 高端洗衣粉产品动态爆裂广告视觉呈现
author: Artificial intelligence (Ai),Open Ai
prompt:
超逼真的商业快消品摄影，画面底部中央展示或打开着一个 {"brand name" "BRAND_NAME"} {"product type" "PRODUCT_TYPE"}。产品在半空中凝固的瞬间向上迸发。与 {"variant" "VARIANT"} 相关的动态飞溅、倾泻、碎片或颗粒在其周围爆裂。新鲜的 {"key ingredient" "KEY_INGREDIENT"} 元素以完整和切开的形式出现，与细小颗粒自然悬浮。
{"brand name" "BRAND_NAME"} 的标志和“{"variant" "VARIANT"}”字样在具有真实材质纹理的逼真包装上清晰可辨。
受变体启发的渐变背景。戏剧性的影棚灯光。
超清晰对焦。高端电影广告般的真实感。
8K 画质。3:4 宽高比。
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic commercial FMCG photography showing a {"brand name" "BRAND_NAME"} {"product type" "PRODUCT_TYPE"} revealed or opened at the bottom center of the frame. The product bursts upward in frozen mid-air motion. Dynamic splashes, pours, fragments, or particles related to {"variant" "VARIANT"} explode around it. Fresh {"key ingredient" "KEY_INGREDIENT"} elements appear whole and cut, suspended naturally with fine particles.
The {"brand name" "BRAND_NAME"} logo and “{"variant" "VARIANT"}” text are clearly readable on realistic packaging with authentic material texture.
Gradient background inspired by the variant. Dramatic studio lighting.
Ultra-sharp focus. Premium cinematic advertising realism.
8K quality. 3:4 aspect ratio.

title: 发光图标
author: @azed_ai
prompt: A close-up digital photo of a human hand gently holding a glowing neon blue square icon featuring the [LOGO NAME] logo, set against a smooth dark gradient background. The blue light from the icon softly illuminates the fingers, casting a futuristic glow. The background is minimal and blurred, emphasizing the icon and the hand. High detail, cinematic lighting, modern tech aesthetic.
prompt_en: A close-up digital photo of a human hand gently holding a glowing neon blue square icon featuring the [LOGO NAME] logo, set against a smooth dark gradient background. The blue light from the icon softly illuminates the fingers, casting a futuristic glow. The background is minimal and blurred, emphasizing the icon and the hand. High detail, cinematic lighting, modern tech aesthetic.

title: 将您最喜欢的品牌变成生活方式产品
author: azed_ai
prompt: 一张高质量的工作室商品照片，其中包含 [品牌名称] 品牌 [商品类型]、[浮动/直立] 和纯色背景，采用品牌标志性的颜色。该商品突出品牌徽标，并使用官方品牌调色板。干净的构图，柔和的阴影，超逼真的材质和纹理，无文字，无道具，专业的商业照明，锐利的焦点，极简的美学。
prompt_en: A high-quality studio product photo of a [brand name]-branded [product type], [floating / standing] against a solid background in the brand’s signature color. The product features the brand logo prominently and uses the official brand color palette. Clean composition, soft shadows, ultra-realistic materials and textures, no text, no props, professional commercial lighting, sharp focus, minimalist aesthetic.

title: 吃掉你的文字
author: @aziz4ai
prompt:
创建由其真实质感完全构成，并使用与其最具有标志性的品牌相联系的标识进行风格的“[单词]”。

该单词应：
• 视觉上反映材料（例如蜂蜜、巧克力、汽水、糖果）。
• 使用该品牌的标志性颜色和字体。
• 在文字下方包含品牌标志。
• 添加一个与产品氛围相符的简短口号（3-4 个字）。
• 居中放置在受产品启发的简约背景中（例如：早餐桌、汽水飞溅、饼干托盘）。

• 尺寸：1:1
• 风格：简洁、醒目、以产品为中心
• 渲染：超高清、HDR、8K
prompt_en:
Create the word “[WORD]” made entirely from its real texture and styled using the identity of the most iconic brand associated with it.

The word should:
• Visually reflect the material (e.g. honey, chocolate, soda, candy).
• Use the brand’s signature colors and typography.
• Include the brand logo beneath the word.
• Add a short slogan (3–4 words) matching the product’s vibe.
• Be centered in a minimal background inspired by the product (e.g. breakfast table, soda splash, cookie tray).

• Dimensions: 1:1
• Style: clean, bold, product-focused
• Render: ultra-HD, HDR, 8K

title: 手工编织3D毛线Logo渲染
author: ecommartinez
prompt: 请制作一个3D照片级真实的渲染图，展示这个由粗线手工编织而成的标志。线条应显得柔软、蓬松且粗壮，同时展现出明显的编织纹理，如环状、螺旋形和辫子状效果。使用明亮且饱和度高的色彩，营造出温暖的感觉。着重表现纤维的质感、材料的柔软度以及手工制作的细节。采用柔和的灯光效果，背景设置为纯白色或米白色。标志必须居中展示，不得添加任何额外的元素，画面形状应为正方形。
prompt_en: Crea un render 3D fotorrealista de este logo hecho con hilo grueso y tejido a mano. El hilo debe parecer suave, esponjoso y de gran tamaño, con patrones visibles de tejido como bucles, giros y trenzas. Usa colores brillantes y saturados, estética cálida. Resalta la textura de las fibras, la suavidad del material y el acabado artesanal. Iluminación de estudio suave. Fondo blanco o crema limpio. El logo debe estar centrado y sin elementos adicionales. Cuadrado.

title: 玉米饼配料分解
author: Nano banana
prompt:
同一款玉米饼的爆炸图，以清晰、商业食谱风格的分解形式呈现。
正好五种配料，与第一张图片一致，从上到下垂直分开排列，间距均匀，对齐完美。

配料顺序（上 → 下）：

新鲜番茄莎莎酱 — 40 克

切达奶酪丝 — 30 克

烤鸡肉块 — 80 克

脆生菜 — 25 克

软质小麦玉米饼 — 60 克（底部基底）

为每种配料添加清晰的信息图式标注。
每个标注包含配料名称及其确切的克数重量，写法与上方列表完全一致。

标注设计指南：
– 简洁的无衬线字体，中等字重
– 文本放置在极简的框架或框内
– 细致、精确的连接线直接指向每种配料
– 可读性高，无重叠，无多余装饰
– 结构化的垂直布局，如同现代食谱卡

背景为浅色、中性，优化了文本清晰度和视觉整洁度。
整体风格为极简、教学式和商业化，适用于营销、解说图和产品分解。
prompt_en:
Exploded view of the same taco, presented as a clean, commercial recipe-style breakdown.
Exactly five ingredients, matching the first image, separated and arranged vertically from top to bottom, evenly spaced and perfectly aligned.

Ingredient order (top → bottom):

Fresh tomato salsa — 40 g

Shredded cheddar cheese — 30 g

Grilled chicken pieces — 80 g

Crisp lettuce — 25 g

Soft wheat taco tortilla — 60 g (bottom base)

Add clear infographic-style annotations for each ingredient.
Each annotation includes the ingredient name and its exact weight in grams, written exactly as listed above.

Annotation design guidelines:
– Clean sans-serif font, medium weight
– Text placed inside minimal frames or boxes
– Thin, precise connector lines pointing directly to each ingredient
– High readability, no overlap, no decorative excess
– Structured vertical layout, like a modern recipe card

Background is light, neutral, and optimized for text clarity and visual cleanliness.
Overall style is minimal, instructional, and commercial, suitable for marketing, explainer visuals, and product breakdowns.

title: 移除汉堡的配料
author: @bind_lux
prompt: 把汉堡里的所有配料都取出来，只留下上下两片面包。面包之间留出空隙，就像馅料还在里面一样。

title: 商业广告-美瞳商品示例展示
author: berryxia_ai
prompt: 一款立式隐形眼镜包装卡片设计的商业摄影。顶部区域：一张特写镜头下的美丽年轻亚洲女性肖像，她拥有水润的水光肌，戴着灰色隐形眼镜，睫毛分明，眼神温柔地望向镜头，妆容质感高端。底部区域：简洁简约的布局网格，包含技术规格、圆形镜片图案样本、“直径14.0毫米”的小字体以及价格标签。整个图像模拟出光滑的亚克力展示卡片质感，采用柔和的工作室灯光，分辨率为8k，超写实风格，广告风格为9:16高清4K高清
prompt_en: 一款立式隐形眼镜包装卡片设计的商业摄影。顶部区域：一张特写镜头下的美丽年轻亚洲女性肖像，她拥有水润的水光肌，戴着灰色隐形眼镜，睫毛分明，眼神温柔地望向镜头，妆容质感高端。底部区域：简洁简约的布局网格，包含技术规格、圆形镜片图案样本、“直径14.0毫米”的小字体以及价格标签。整个图像模拟出光滑的亚克力展示卡片质感，采用柔和的工作室灯光，分辨率为8k，超写实风格，广告风格为9:16高清4K高清

title: 图片变手机壁纸
author: @ZHO_ZHO_ZHO
prompt: 将图片转换为 iPhone 锁屏壁纸效果。手机时间（01:16）、日期（9 月 16 日，星期日）和状态栏详细信息（电池、信号等）叠加显示在图片上，底部显示手电筒和相机图标。原始图片经过调整，以适应加长的智能手机屏幕构图。手机放置在相同配色方案的背景上。

title: 冬日乡村肖像：披肩雪花少女的凝视与温柔静默光影
author: X / Oogie

title: 漫画风格转换
author: @nobisiro_2023
prompt: 将输入的图片处理为黑白漫画风格线稿
prompt_en: Transform the input image into a black-and-white comic-style line drawing.

title: 高端简约护肤产品摄影，展现纯净质感与奢华美学。
author: Oogie
prompt:
高端简约护肤品产品摄影。一个半透明的粉色液体洁面乳瓶，带有白色按压泵，垂直放置在画面中央。瓶身置于一片有机形态的柔和粉色泡沫池中，轻盈的皂沫以平滑、圆润的形状向外蔓延。小小的透明气泡漂浮在泡沫表面。干净的哑光柔和粉色背景，带有微妙的渐变。柔和的漫射顶光和轻微的轮廓光线，使液体透出明亮的光泽，突显瓶内的泵管。锐利对焦，高清晰度，逼真的液体折射，光滑的塑料和玻璃质感，奢华美妆广告风格，现代化妆品品牌，超现实，8K 细节，高动态范围。

负面提示词：

手，人物，脸，杂乱，刺眼的反光，标签扭曲，文字不可读，泵头变形，硬阴影，颗粒感，噪点，低分辨率，CGI 效果，卡通风格，凌乱的泡沫，光线不均匀，水印
prompt_en:
Premium minimalist skincare product photography. A translucent pink liquid cleanser bottle with a white pump dispenser placed vertically at the center of the frame. The bottle rests inside an organic pool of soft pink foamy bubbles, with airy soap lather spreading outward in smooth, rounded shapes. Small transparent bubbles float around the foam surface. Clean matte pastel pink background with subtle gradient. Soft diffused top lighting with gentle rim light creates a luminous glow through the liquid, highlighting the pump tube inside the bottle. Sharp focus, high clarity, realistic liquid refraction, smooth plastic and glass textures, luxury beauty advertising style, modern cosmetic branding, ultra-realistic, 8K detail, high dynamic range.

Negative Prompt:

hands, people, faces, clutter, harsh reflections, label distortion, unreadable text, warped pump, hard shadows, grain, noise, low resolution, CGI look, cartoon style, messy foam, uneven lighting, watermark

title: 高端产品摄影提示词模板
author: Kai｜開発もできる生成AI活用アドバイザー
prompt: [产品名]的工作室摄影。放置在被柔和阴影和渐变背景包围的“背景”上。高关键照明，浅的景深，被摄体到极限夏普聚焦了的高级产品照片。用数码单反相机拍摄。微型美学，精细反射，商业照明设置。
prompt_en:
Genspark が Nano Banana Pro
使い放題だから生成しまくれる！
この画像生成するためのプロンプトは
以下に書いておきます！
[] の中身だけを変えて使用してね
プロンプト👇
[製品名]のスタジオ撮影。柔らかな影とグラデーション背景に囲まれた[背景]上に配置。ハイキー照明、浅い被写界深度、被写体に極限までシャープに焦点を合わせたプレミアム製品写真。デジタル一眼レフカメラで撮影。ミニマルな美学、繊細な反射、商業用照明セットアップ。
#Genspark

title: 黑客帝国的绿色代码
author: @umesh_ai
prompt: 将这张图像转化为数字《黑客帝国》风格场景。背景和主题应由倾泻而下的霓虹绿色代码组成，在黑色背景下，类似于标志性的《黑客帝国》数字雨。使用发光的绿色符号（日语假名、数字和拉丁字母），带有一些运动模糊和深度。添加微妙的光照效果来模拟屏幕辉光，增强赛博朋克、高科技氛围
prompt_en: Transform this image into a digital Matrix-style scene. The background and subject should be composed of cascading neon green code on a black backdrop, similar to the iconic Matrix digital rain. Use glowing green symbols (Japanese katakana, numbers, and Latin letters), with some motion blur and depth. Add subtle lighting effects to simulate screen glow and enhance the cyberpunk, high-tech atmosphere

title: 一键生成街头潮流大片：AI助你打造酷炫自拍照
author: X / Nano Banana Labs
prompt: 一只可爱的橘猫在前景中摆出超广角自拍的姿势，营造出夸张的透视效果，角度活泼动感。背景中，一位男士（请 100%还原参考图片中的人物面部）身着时尚嘻哈服饰，摆出充满活力的爪子姿势，展现街头潮流态度。服装细节包括：oversize 外套、印花 T 恤、宽松长裤、链条和现代运动鞋。场景设定在都市户外，工业建筑林立，蓝天白云，略带镜头畸变的视觉效果，色彩鲜艳，营造出时尚大片的氛围，并运用了电影级的灯光效果。
prompt_en: A cute orange cat taking a dramatic ultra-wide selfie in the foreground, giant perspective effect, playful and dynamic angle. In the background, the man attached in the uploaded reference image ( Keep the face of the person 100% accurate from the reference image ) in stylish hiphop fashion posing with energetic claws gesture, street-style attitude. Fashion details: oversized jacket, graphic tee, loose pants, chains, modern sneakers. Urban outdoor setting with industrial buildings, blue sky, slightly distorted lens look, vibrant colors, high-fashion editorial vibe, cinematic lighting

title: 奢华咖啡品鉴菜单设计模板
author: Willy
prompt:
奢华咖啡品鉴菜单布局，不规则网格构图，网页宽高比为 9:16。
布局：不规则 3x3 网格，单元格大小各异，流畅的编辑排版
背景：同色系面板 - 交替使用 {"color 1" "拿铁米色 (#F2E2D2)"}、{"color 2" "摩卡棕 (#D1B48F)"} 和咖啡奶油色 (#FAF5E6)，营造出微妙的咖啡韵律
产品呈现：仅展示产品，俯视和 45 度角混合，在简约的石板陶瓷餐具上摆盘
色调策略：同色系 - 咖啡色调与背景色调和谐统一，空灵融合
主要元素：独立咖啡品鉴 - 意式浓缩咖啡配奶沫、撒有金粉的卡布奇诺吐司、用咖啡鱼子酱和意式脆饼代替鱼子酱薄饼、柠檬片拿铁、摩卡挞，每款都盛放在配套的盘中，光线柔和一致
排版：双语 - 英文名称采用优雅的细衬线字体 (Didot)，下方是简洁的无衬线英文/韩文，浅灰色的小字产地描述
相机：Canon EOS R5，100mm 微距镜头用于细节拍摄，50mm 镜头用于拍摄全盘，柔和漫射的顶灯，侧面轮廓光
风格：极简 + 奢华混合 - 充足的留白，精致的排版，咖啡色系作为主要色源
风格关键词：咖啡、品鉴菜单、同色系、奢华、网页

右下角小字优雅地放置着精致的手写签名“Willy”。
prompt_en:
Luxury coffee tasting menu layout, irregular grid composition, 9:16 aspect ratio for webpage.
LAYOUT: Irregular 3x3 grid, varied cell sizes, flowing editorial arrangement
BACKGROUND: Tone-on-tone panels - alternating {"color 1" "latte beige (#F2E2D2)"}, {"color 2" "mocha brown (#D1B48F)"}, and coffee cream (#FAF5E6) creating a subtle caffeinated rhythm
PRODUCT EXPRESSION: Product only, overhead and 45-degree angles mixed, plated presentation on minimalist slate ceramics
TONE STRATEGY: Tone-on-tone - coffee colors harmonize with background tones, an ethereal blend
MAIN ELEMENTS: Individual coffee tastings - Espresso with crema foam, Cappuccino toast with gold dust, Caviar on blinis substituted with coffee caviar on biscotti, Latte with lemon twist, Mocha tartlet, each on matching plates, consistent soft lighting
TYPOGRAPHY: Bilingual - English names in elegant light serif (Didot), English/Korean below in clean sans-serif, small origin descriptions in light gray
CAMERA: Canon EOS R5, 100mm Macro for details, 50mm for full plates, soft diffused overhead lighting, side rim lighting
STYLE: Minimal + Luxury hybrid - generous whitespace, refined typography, coffee colors as primary source
Style keywords: coffee, tasting menu, tone-on-tone, luxury, webpage

A delicate handwritten signature "Willy" is elegantly placed in small letters at the bottom right corner..

title: 品牌产品数字广告
author: @shushant_l
prompt: 一个超现实的、超详细的 3D 数字广告，展示百事罐在中心爆裂，喷出清凉的碳酸可乐，气泡和冰块飞溅。罐子的金属表面具有锐利的、写实的纹理，包括冷凝水滴、光线反射和细微的划痕。场景周围是冷的透明冰片和柠檬皮在空中飞舞，增添了鲜明的对比。背景是深电光渐变，带有电影级体积照明和柔和的镜头光晕。绿色薄荷叶和雾气增添了清凉的自然点缀。整个场景使用高级全局光照、HDR 照明和真实的阴影在 4K UHD 下渲染。构图以高端饮料广告的戏剧性基调呈现，使用 Unreal Engine + Octane Render 等工具以达到最大的视觉冲击力。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic, ultra-detailed 3D digital advertisement showcasing a Pepsi can bursting open at its center, sending a refreshing splash of carbonated cola into the air, with effervescent bubbles and ice cubes flying outward. The can’s metallic surface is rendered with sharp, photorealistic textures, complete with condensation droplets, light reflections, and subtle scratches. Surrounding the scene are cold, translucent ice shards and a twist of lemon zest caught mid-motion, adding a vibrant contrast. The background features a deep electric blue gradient with cinematic volumetric lighting and soft lens flares. Green mint leaves and misty vapors add a refreshing, natural accent. The entire scene is rendered in 4K UHD using advanced global illumination, HDR lighting, and realistic shadows. The composition evokes premium beverage advertising with a dramatic tone, created using tools like Unreal Engine + Octane Render for maximum visual impact.

title: 复古电脑开机画面解析为ASCII艺术
author: @Gdgtify
prompt: Retro CRT computer boot screen that resolves into ASCII-art of NYC's tallest building
prompt_en: Retro CRT computer boot screen that resolves into ASCII-art of NYC's tallest building

title: 高端产品悬浮摄影广告图
author: Nabab Uddin
prompt:
创作一张 {"product name" "[PRODUCT NAME]"} 悬浮在半空中的优质影棚产品照片。产品居中，清晰锐利，真实感强，材质准确，反光精致。使用动态影棚照明，搭配更亮的强光和柔和的色彩点缀，以增加活力和能量，同时保持简洁的极简外观。在产品下方添加柔和的阴影，以营造悬浮感。

背景：{"color family" "[COLOR FAMILY]"} 的平滑渐变，带有微妙的光晕和色调深度，营造出视觉冲击力强、现代感十足的美学效果。

风格：高端广告主打照片，生动而优雅，光泽优质产品摄影，电影级景深，超现实，8K 分辨率，清晰对比度，视觉大胆而精致。
prompt_en:
Create a premium studio product shot of {"product name" "[PRODUCT NAME]"} floating in mid-air. The product is centered, sharp, and realistic with accurate materials and refined reflections. Use dynamic studio lighting with brighter highlights and gentle color accents to add vibrance and energy, while keeping a clean minimal look. Add a soft shadow beneath the product to suggest floating.

Background: smooth vibrant gradient in {"color family" "[COLOR FAMILY]"}, with subtle glow and tonal depth to create a visually striking, modern aesthetic.

Style: high-end advertising hero shot, vibrant yet elegant, glossy premium product photography, cinematic depth of field, ultra-realistic, 8K resolution, crisp contrast, visually bold but sophisticated.

prompt_en: A thrilling 3D cartoon scene: [CHARACTER1] runs through a narrow corridor inside [Place], chased at high speed by [CHARACTER2]. Their facial expressions reflect tension and focus, with beads of sweat glistening under dramatic lighting.

title: 优雅纱丽肖像
author: Nano banana
prompt:
一位美丽的女子。（面容与参考图完全一致）
头向右倾斜，靠在右手上，带着温柔的微笑。
浓密的长发，黑褐色，略显凌乱，有细微的风吹动感，几缕发丝垂落在脸颊。
柔和可爱的妆容，自然发光的肌肤。
身穿红色纱丽和红色衬衫。
金色钟形耳环，鼻钉，红色宾迪，食指上的戒指，细致的金色手镯。
电影般的戏剧性光影，浅景深，奶油般柔和的散景，超高动态范围，电影剧照质感，杰作般的TikTok美学。
prompt_en:
A beautiful woman. (Face exactly same as the reference image)
Head tilted right, resting on her right hand, gentle smile.
Long thick black-brown messy hair with subtle wind movement, a few strands falling on her face.
Soft cute makeup, natural glowing skin.
Wearing a red saree and red blouse.
Gold jhumka earrings, nose pin, red bindi, ring on index finger, subtle gold bangles.
Cinematic dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh,ultra-HDR, film-still quality, masterpiece TikTok aesthetic.

title: 彩色卡通俏皮图标和徽标
author: @gnrlyxyz
prompt: Create a 2D digital illustration of the [FIREFOX] logo in a colorful cartoon style with bold black outlines. The icon design should feature playful, vibrant solid colors such as pink, teal, orange, yellow, and purple, applied in a flat, bold way. Give the shapes a slightly exaggerated, bubbly form with rounded edges and fun details like starbursts, stripes, or spark effects if relevant. Keep the illustration simple and stylized with a hand-drawn look. Use thick outlines to emphasize form. Vector friendly. White background. Square aspect ratio.
prompt_en: Create a 2D digital illustration of the [FIREFOX] logo in a colorful cartoon style with bold black outlines. The icon design should feature playful, vibrant solid colors such as pink, teal, orange, yellow, and purple, applied in a flat, bold way. Give the shapes a slightly exaggerated, bubbly form with rounded edges and fun details like starbursts, stripes, or spark effects if relevant. Keep the illustration simple and stylized with a hand-drawn look. Use thick outlines to emphasize form. Vector friendly. White background. Square aspect ratio.

title: 舒适海滨港湾村庄的水彩插画
author: Artingent
prompt: 场景： 傍晚时分，一个舒适古朴的海滨渔村，小木船系在饱经风霜的码头边，渔民们正在修补渔网，海鸥在头顶盘旋，柔和的波浪反射着温暖的阳光，迷人的小屋沿岸而建。 风格： 奇幻手绘水彩插画风格。传统水彩渲染，带有可见的颜料飞溅、流畅的颜料扩散和柔和的色调过渡。精致的手绘线条，富有表现力的细节描绘和有机素描般的轮廓。柔和、温和的调色板，强调轻盈的色调和微妙的饱和度，而非强烈的对比。画意分层水彩纹理与插画奇幻艺术美学相结合。装饰性强、插画丰富的环境，构图中融入了许多小型背景细节。优雅的完整插画处理，优先考虑手工视觉魅力、艺术柔和感和经典故事书风格的奇幻渲染。
prompt_en: Scene: A cozy old seaside harbor village in the late afternoon with small wooden boats tied to a weathered dock, fishermen repairing nets, seagulls circling overhead, and softly rolling ocean waves reflecting warm sunlight while charming cottages line the shore. Style: Fantasy hand-drawn watercolor illustration style. Traditional watercolor rendering with visible pigment splashes, fluid paint diffusion, and softly blended tonal transitions. Delicate hand-illustrated linework with expressive drawn detailing and organic sketch-like contours. Soft, gentle color palette emphasizing airy tones and subtle saturation rather than strong contrast. Painterly layered watercolor textures combined with illustrative fantasy art aesthetics. Decorative, richly illustrated environments with numerous small background details integrated into the composition. Elegant full illustration treatment prioritizing handcrafted visual charm, artistic softness, and classic storybook-inspired fantasy rendering.

title: 高端美妆产品俯拍静物摄影，搭配天然成分与精致布景
author: Oogie
prompt:
创建俯视平铺产品照片。使用上传的产品作为主要物体，居中放置。根据照片分析产品类型，并自动选择搭配的道具/食材，在其周围营造出美观的平铺效果（简约、高端、符合品牌调性）。保留产品的精确几何形状、尺寸、颜色、标签设计和所有文字（无任何改动）。暖米色无缝背景，柔和的定向阳光，清晰逼真的阴影。
超逼真的微距产品摄影，100mm 镜头效果，f/8 光圈，锐利对焦，构图简洁，无额外文字，8k 分辨率，2:3 比例。
prompt_en:
Create top-down flat lay product photo. Use the uploaded product as the main object, centered. Analyze the product type from the photo and automatically choose matching props/ingredients for an aesthetic flat lay around it (minimal, premium, on-brand). Preserve exact geometry, size, colors, label design, and all text on the product (no changes). Warm beige seamless background, soft directional sunlight, crisp realistic shadow. 
Ultra-realistic macro product photography, 100mm lens look, f/8, sharp focus, clean composition, no extra text, 8k, format 2:3.

title: 用气泡膜覆盖表情符号
author: @Anima_Labs
prompt: 表情符号 [ ❤️‍🔥 ] 的超逼真 3D 渲染 ，完全包裹在透明气泡膜中。塑料紧密贴合，清晰可见的充满空气的气泡在下面产生叠加的反射和表情符号的柔和扭曲。包裹具有有光泽的褶皱纹理，可在细节高光中捕捉光线。以柔和的中性灰色为背景，带有微妙的阴影。工作室照明应强调气泡膜的触觉质量及其产生的超现实效果。异想天开、令人满意且视觉上干净。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic 3D render of the emoji [❤️‍🔥], entirely wrapped in transparent bubble wrap. The plastic is tightly fitted, with clearly visible air-filled bubbles creating overlaid reflections and soft distortions of the emoji underneath. The wrap has a glossy, crinkled texture that catches the light in detailed highlights. Set against a soft, neutral grey background with subtle shadows. Studio lighting should emphasize the tactile quality of the bubble wrap and the surreal effect it creates. Whimsical, satisfying, and visually clean.

title: 双曝光电影海报设计
author: Shreya Yadav
prompt:
- 海报主题为“双重曝光”技术，展现了一位女性（左侧侧面像）和一位男性（右侧侧面像），两人都背对着对方。
- 两人的轮廓（包括详细的面部特征和头发轮廓）与茂密的森林景观完美融合，形成一种艺术感十足的视觉效果。
- 女性的身体部分呈现出温暖的金色秋色调，而男性的身体部分则被冷色调的蓝色光线照亮。
- 温和的阳光透过树木洒下，为画面增添了层次感、对比度以及情感氛围。
- 光线效果处理得非常自然流畅，背景采用纯黑色。
- 海报整体风格
prompt_en:
Cinematic Double Exposure Poster Design.
Use Google Gemini ai Nano Banana 3 Pro.

Their silhouettes, including detailed facial features and hair outlines, blend seamlessly into a dense forest landscape with an artistic, modern pattern. The woman's side glows with warm golden autumn hues, while the man's side is illuminated by cool, serene blue tones. Soft rays of sunlight filter through the trees, adding depth, contrast, and emotional atmosphere. Smooth, natural lighting transitions and a clean black backdrop. Modern, artistic, emotionally expressive poster aesthetic. Bold title text at the bottom: 'Ai Queen is Here…'.",

title: 创建多种3D风格头像
author: @tranmautritam
prompt: 创建风格化卡通男孩角色的 3D 渲染数字插图，以中性姿势站立。角色应以逼真的极简主义 3D 风格渲染，具有柔和圆润的比例和毛绒哑光纹理——类似于高端 Cinema 4D + Redshift 产品渲染。
prompt_en: Create a 3D-rendered digital illustration of a stylized cartoon boy character, standing in a neutral pose. The character should be rendered in a realistic-minimalist 3D style, with soft rounded proportions and plush matte textures — similar to high-end Cinema 4D + Redshift product renders.

title: 影视剧/小说名场面3D微缩场景海报
prompt:
请为影视剧/小说《三体》设计一张高品质的3D海报，需要先检索这个影视剧/小说的内容，找出一个最具代表性的名场面或核心地点。在画面中央，将这个场景构建为一个精致的轴侧视角3D微缩模型。风格要采用梦工厂动画那种细腻、柔和的渲染风格。你需要还原当时的建筑细节、人物动态以及环境氛围，无论是暴风雨还是宁静的午后，都要自然地融合在模型的光影里。

关于背景，不要使用简单的纯白底。请在模型周围营造一种带有淡淡水墨晕染和流动光雾的虚空环境，色调雅致，让画面看起来有呼吸感和纵深感，衬托出中央模型的珍贵。

最后是底部的排版，请生成中文文字。居中写上小说名称，字体要有与原著风格匹配的设计感。在书名下方，自动检索并排版一句原著中关于该场景的经典描写或台词，字体使用优雅的衬线体。整体布局要像一个高级的博物馆藏品铭牌那样精致平衡。

prompt_en: 大福（丸）羊羹（四角）団子（三連）最中（長方形）のノリング画像。

title: 电影级3D动感广告
author: @aziz4ai
prompt: [PRODUCT] 的电影级 3D 动感广告，以戏剧化的中景捕捉，展现其核心能量。运用大胆的影棚灯光、强烈的高光和深邃的阴影、动态粒子和慢动作效果来增强视觉冲击力。环境应营造超现实却又超现实的感觉，旨在体现产品的个性（清爽、活力、快速、奢华、清爽等）。尽可能融入由产品元素精心打造的品牌标识，并在其下方放置一个与氛围相符的时尚创意口号。构图采用 1:1 的宽高比，细节丰富、锐利大胆，旨在打造病毒式传播的效果。
prompt_en: Cinematic 3D action-packed advertisement of [PRODUCT], captured in a dramatic mid-motion scene that embodies its core energy. Use bold studio lighting with intense highlights and deep shadows, dynamic particles, and slow-motion effects to amplify impact. The environment should feel surreal yet hyperrealistic, designed to reflect the product’s personality (crunchy, energetic, fast, luxurious, refreshing, etc.). Integrate the brand logo crafted from product elements if possible, and place a sleek creative slogan beneath it that matches the mood. Composition in 1:1 aspect ratio, hyper-detailed, sharp, bold, and designed to go viral.

title: 科普漫画
author: @op7418
prompt: 请帮我生成多张 16:9 的涂鸦风格图片，向中学生解释“未来”的概念。图片应采用一致的彩色粗铅笔手绘风格，信息丰富，包含英文文本，使用纯色背景，卡片周围有轮廓，并包含统一的标题，类似于 PowerPoint 演示文稿。

title: 霓虹可爱Q版动物
author: Nano banana
prompt: 生物发光 可爱 [动物]，卡哇伊，Q版，[颜色] 霓虹背光，3D卡通，大而明亮的可爱眼睛，高清
prompt_en: bioluminescent cute [ANIMAL], kawaii, chibi, [COLOR] neon backlit, 3d cartoon, big cute bright eyes, high definition

title: 哈利·波特圣诞贺卡
author: Nano banana

title: 等轴测立体模型
author: Nano banana
prompt: 一个干净、简约的3D等距立体模型，展示一个[展览类型]，其中包含在[展柜结构]内布置的[展示物品]，带有微妙的灯光点缀，光滑的地面，柔和的影棚灯光，逼真的材质，圆润的边缘，微缩建筑模型风格，高细节，中性背景
prompt_en: A clean, minimal 3D isometric diorama of a [EXHIBITION TYPE], featuring [DISPLAY OBJECTS] arranged within a [POD STRUCTURE], subtle lighting accents, smooth floor surfaces, soft studio lighting, realistic materials, rounded edges, miniature architectural model style, high detail, neutral background

title: 纹理化图片
author: @egeberkina

title: 芒果百香果身体磨砂膏奢华广告图
author: Oogie
prompt: 一个超逼真的高端产品摄影场景：一个透明的化妆品罐，上面标有“MARINE LIFE”，内含芒果和百香果身体磨砂膏，在半空中爆裂开来，白色盖子略微浮在罐子上方，浓稠、蓬松、金黄色的磨砂膏向上喷溅，形成戏剧性的飞溅效果，磨砂膏光泽饱满，质感十足，可见黑色的百香果籽。周围悬浮着芒果丁、切开的半个芒果和切开的百香果，果肉晶莹剔透，金色的液滴和飞溅物在罐子周围凝固在空中。容器略微向右倾斜，居中于画面，采用正面微距视角拍摄，上方和略后方有柔和而高对比度的影棚灯光照射，在湿润的纹理和半透明的飞溅物上营造出发光的高光效果，漂浮的元素下方有微妙的阴影。平滑的暖米色渐变背景增强了热带色彩调色板，包括饱和的黄色、橙色和深紫色水果色调。罐子和磨砂膏对焦超清晰，外围水果景深较浅，呈现电影般的真实感，奢华护肤品广告美学，清晰的反射，8K 超逼真细节，充满活力和清新的氛围。
prompt_en: A hyperrealistic premium product photography scene of a transparent cosmetic jar labeled “MARINE LIFE” mango and passionfruit body scrub exploding open mid-air, with the white lid floating slightly above the jar and a thick, whipped, golden-yellow scrub bursting upward in a dramatic splash, glossy and textured with visible black passionfruit seeds, surrounded by suspended mango cubes, scored mango halves, and halved passionfruits with glistening pulp, golden liquid droplets and splashes frozen in motion around the jar, the container tilted slightly to the right and centered in frame, shot from a straight-on macro perspective, illuminated by soft yet high-contrast studio lighting from above and slightly behind to create glowing highlights on the wet textures and translucent splashes, subtle shadows beneath the floating elements, a smooth warm beige gradient background enhancing the tropical color palette of saturated yellows, oranges, and deep purple fruit tones, ultra-sharp focus on the jar and scrub with shallow depth of field for the outer fruit, cinematic realism, luxury skincare advertising aesthetic, crisp reflections, 8K photorealistic detail, energetic and fresh mood.

title: 猕猴桃切片水花飞溅超写实特写
author: 𝐌
prompt: 一张超逼真的奇异果切片图像，溅起水花，水滴悬浮在空中。新鲜的奇异果切片动态地排列成漂浮构图，营造出柔和的绿色背景。平滑的绿色渐变营造出清新、明亮、多汁的美感。影棚布光，柔和阴影，高细节，物体微距摄影，强调纹理和反光。超真实渲染，8K，锐利对焦，浓郁的绿色调。--ar 9:16 --raw
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic image of a sliced kiwi splashing in a spray of water with droplets suspended in the air. Fresh kiwi slices, dynamically arranged in a floating composition, create a smooth green background. The smooth green gradient creates a fresh, bright, and juicy aesthetic. Studio lighting, soft shadows, high detail, macro photography of objects, an emphasis on texture and reflections. Ultra-realistic rendering, 8K, sharp focus, rich green tones. --ar 9:16 --raw

title: 霓虹灯风格工具
author: @egeberkina

title: AI演化讽刺信息图六章漫画
prompt:
An information graphic slide showcasing NVIDIA RTX 5090 technical specifications, designed in a style completely consistent with Apple keynote Bento grid layout. The background is a clean unified dark mode (nearly black, #0d0d0d). The composition consists of modular rectangles and squares forming a compact grid with smooth rounded corners and subtle dark borders.

Core focus module: A monolithic three-slot NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Founders Edition graphics card. Captured from a premium three-quarter angle, showcasing its massive and exquisite flow-through cooling solution, equipped with polished titanium frame, matte black heat sink fins, with an illuminated "GeForce RTX" logo on the side. Dramatic edge lighting highlights its industrial design.

Key Spec Module 1 (Top left, square): Features a minimalist abstract silicon chip icon with light refracting from it. Below in huge, bold, sans-serif white text: "Blackwell GB202". Beneath in smaller gray subtitle: "Next-Gen Tensor Core Architecture".

Key Spec Module 2 (Top right, square): Features a minimalist stacked memory block icon. Huge, bold white text: "32GB GDDR7". Beneath in smaller gray subtitle: "Ultra High-Speed Memory Interface".

Secondary spec modules (peripheral blocks):
- A vertical rectangular block with stylized speedometer pointer icon and bold text: "24,576 CUDA Cores". Subtitle: "Unmatched Parallel Processing Power".
- A square block with stylized brain icon with network nodes and text: ">1300 AI TOPS". Subtitle: "Generative AI Supercharger".
- A horizontal rectangular block with minimalist port connector icon (showing multiple channels) and text: "DisplayPort 2.1 & PCIe 5.0". Subtitle: "Future-Proof 8K HDR Connectivity".

Overall aesthetic is extremely clean, minimalist, and premium. Typography is the primary design element. Accent colors are strictly limited to pure white, various light gray tones for subtitles, and vibrant NVIDIA electric green (#76b900) only for subtle glows around icons and product illumination. 8K resolution, high detail, crisp graphical user interface rendering.

title: 文艺复兴时期的解剖学研究
author: @azed_ai
prompt: 文艺复兴时期对 [主题]的解剖学研究，用精细的石墨和墨水交叉影线精心说明，透明的组织覆盖层露出骨骼和肌肉系统。该作品以优雅的拉丁书法标记，并呈现在古老的羊皮纸上，散发着学术的精确和古典之美。
prompt_en: A Renaissance anatomical study of a [subject], meticulously illustrated in fine graphite and ink cross-hatching, with transparent tissue overlays revealing skeletal and muscular systems. Labeled in elegant Latin calligraphy and presented on aged parchment, the composition exudes scholarly precision and classical beauty.

title: 色彩缤纷的手工雕塑
author: @Deshraj4x
prompt: 一个色彩缤纷的手工雕塑，由[插入主题]制成，使用半透明的冰块，形状定制。装饰如糖霜、糖果、毛线或水果皮增强了面部特征、纹理或配饰。放置在陶瓷盘上，盘上覆盖着叶子或装饰垫，背景是干净、柔和照明的摄影棚或自然桌面。光线突出了冰块的光泽质感，将食品艺术、玩具设计和摄影融合成一种俏皮、艺术性的构图。
prompt_en: A colorful handcrafted sculpture of [insert subject], made from semi-transparent ice blocks in custom shapes. Accents like icing, candy, yarn, or fruit skin enhance facial features, texture, or accessories. Placed on a ceramic plate over a leaf or decorative mat, with a clean, softly lit studio or natural tabletop background. Lighting highlights the glossy ice texture, blending food art, toy design, and photography into a playful, artistic composition.

title: 定制大理石雕塑
author: @umesh_ai
prompt: 一张超详细的图像中主体雕塑的写实图像，由闪亮的大理石制成。雕塑应展示光滑反光的大理石表面，强调其光泽和艺术工艺。设计优雅，突出大理石的美丽和深度。图像中的光线应增强雕塑的轮廓和纹理，创造出视觉上令人惊叹和迷人的效果
prompt_en: A highly detailed, realistic image of a sculpture as the main subject, made from shiny marble. The sculpture should showcase a smooth, reflective marble surface, emphasizing its glossiness and craftsmanship. The design is elegant, highlighting the beauty and depth of the marble. Lighting in the image should enhance the sculpture's contours and textures, creating a visually stunning and captivating effect.

title: 定制人物贴纸
author: @op7418
prompt: 帮我将角色变成类似图2的白色轮廓贴纸。角色需要转换成网页插画风格，并添加一个描述图1的俏皮白色轮廓短语
prompt_en: Please transform the character into a white outline sticker similar to that in Image 2. The character should be converted into a web illustration style, and add a playful white outline phrase that describes Image 1.

title: 水果的形状
author: umesh_ai
prompt: 在深色表面上战略性地放置 [数量/总数] 个 [水果]，使其形成 [物体/表情符号/标志] 的形状，从而生成一张图片。
prompt_en: Create an image by arranging [NUMBER/AGGREGATE] of [FRUIT] strategically on a dark surface to form the shape of [OBJECT/EMOJI/LOGO]

title: 芒果能量饮料广告图
author: Gagan Singh
prompt:
{
  "prompt": "一张芒果味能量饮料罐的优质工作室产品照片。圆柱形铝罐垂直立于画面中央，呈现充满活力的金黄色至橙色渐变。大胆的白色字体显示着标志 “{\"logo\" \"MAX ENERGY\"}”，下方印有文字 “{\"flavor text\" \"Mango Brain Pating\"}”。罐身表面饰有现代芒果插画和热带风情点缀。罐身周围，多汁成熟的芒果片和翠绿的小薄荷叶漂浮在半空中，营造出清爽的能量爆发效果。一些芒果片清晰锐利，而另一些则柔和模糊，以暗示动感。背景是温暖的黄橙色渐变，增强了热带色彩的调性。明亮专业的摄影棚灯光在罐身上营造出光泽高光，并突出了芒果新鲜多汁的质感。干净、现代、高端的商业美学。",
  "style": "逼真摄影，商业产品摄影",
  "lighting": "明亮的工作室照明，柔和的高光，干净的反射",

    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "depth_of_field": "浅景深"

Bold white typography displays the logo '{"logo" "MAX ENERGY"}', with the text '{"flavor text" "Mango Brain Pating"}' printed beneath it. The can surface features modern mango illustrations and tropical accents. Surrounding the can, juicy ripe mango slices and small green mint leaves float in mid-air, creating a refreshing energy burst effect. Some mango pieces are in sharp focus while others are softly blurred to suggest motion. The background is a warm yellow-orange gradient that enhances the tropical color palette. Bright professional studio lighting creates glossy highlights on the can and emphasizes the fresh, juicy texture of the mangoes. Clean, modern, high-end commercial aesthetic.",

}

Ultra-sharp focus, shallow DOF, 85mm, HDR, ISO100, clean negative space, no clutter, no watermark.Output {ASPECT} (1:1/4:5/9:16).

title: 美女电影感肖像画
author: @karatademada
prompt:
一幅充满电影感的肖像画，描绘了一位年轻的东亚女性优雅地坐在白色大理石梳妆台前。她有着一头柔顺的深棕色长发，中分，简单的发型勾勒出她精致的脸庞。她的肌肤光洁光滑，肤色温暖。她化着柔和的蜜桃色妆容，眼睑上点缀着淡淡的珠光，眼线细腻，珊瑚色唇膏则为她增添了一抹精致的光泽。

她身着一袭露肩黑色天鹅绒连衣裙，凸显了她的颈部和肩部线条，优雅而又不失现代感。一条精致的银项链搭配一枚小巧的吊坠，垂于她的锁骨上，她还佩戴了与之相配的银耳环和戒指，更添一抹精致。她的姿态自信而柔美，一只手臂自然地搭在大理石台面上，另一只手臂则放松地垂在身侧。

场景发生在灯光柔和的梳妆台上，镜子映照出她部分轮廓。光线均衡柔和，营造出干净奢华的妆容，阴影柔和，没有刺眼的高光，肌肤纹理光滑细腻。梳妆台上，她身旁整齐地摆放着一些化妆品，例如粉饼盘、小巧的装饰刷和几瓶粉底液。

背景采用深蓝色或深色窗帘，搭配简约的装饰，包括插满干花的白色花瓶，这些干花呈现出温暖的秋日色调——橙色、奶油色和金色。整体氛围优雅、沉稳，又不失低调的魅力，如同一部用清晰的现代相机，在影院级灯光和8K超高清画质下拍摄的高端美妆社论。

色调：象牙白、黑色天鹅绒、温暖的桃色调和柔和的金色花卉装饰。
长宽比：4：5。
风格：超现实主义、奢华肖像、杂志美学。
prompt_en:
A cinematic portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting gracefully at a white marble vanity table. She has long, sleek, dark brown hair parted in the middle, styled simply to frame her face. Her skin is luminous and smooth with a warm tone. She wears soft, peach-toned makeup with a light shimmer on the eyelids, subtle eyeliner, and coral lipstick that gives her a polished glow.

She’s dressed in an off-shoulder black velvet dress that accentuates her neckline and shoulders, elegant yet modern. A delicate silver necklace with a small pendant rests on her collarbone, and she wears matching silver earrings and a ring, adding a refined touch. Her posture is confident and feminine, one arm resting naturally on the marble surface, the other relaxed by her side.

The scene takes place in a softly lit vanity space with a mirror reflecting part of her silhouette. The lighting is balanced and diffused, creating a clean, luxurious look, soft shadows, no harsh highlights, and a smooth skin texture. On the vanity, there are makeup items such as a compact palette, a small decorative brush, and bottles of foundation neatly placed beside her.

The background features deep navy or dark curtains and minimalist decor, including white vases filled with dried flowers in warm autumn hues of orange, cream, and gold. The overall mood feels elegant, poised, and quietly glamorous, like a high-end beauty editorial captured on a crisp modern camera with cinematic lighting and 8K ultra-realistic clarity.

Color palette: ivory white, black velvet, warm peach tones, and soft gold floral accents.
Aspect ratio: 4:5.
Style: hyper-realistic, luxury portrait, magazine aesthetic.

title: 带有教育注释和蓝图风格的分解视图解剖插画
prompt: 创建一幅龙的解剖分解视图插画，将其翅膀、鳞片、喷火腺体和骨骼结构解剖成带有连接箭头的标注组件。每个部分都以精细的细节呈现，展示金属虹彩鳞片、发光的余烬血管和水晶骨骼。以古老的羊皮纸背景为背景，配有微妙的烟雾效果和温暖的火炬光阴影。包括优雅手写字体的教育注释。横向蓝图风格海报，奇幻写实主义，高分辨率，受莱奥纳多·达·芬奇的草图启发，带有现代数字扭曲。

title: 富士山下的微笑女孩
author: Nano banana
prompt:
一张高质量、明亮的户外肖像照，一位年轻的东亚女性正对着镜头露出温暖的笑容，站在山中湖的岩石岸边。背景中，一座清晰雄伟的富士山，山顶覆盖着白雪，在晴朗无云的鲜艳蓝天下升起。她身穿一件白色羽绒服，一条柔和的粉色针织围巾，一条深色百褶迷你裙，以及黑色半透明打底裤。她手持一台带有珠子挂绳的复古银色数码相机。银色数码相机带有珠子挂绳。光线是清脆的自然晨光，营造出清新、旅行氛围的美感，具有高清晰度和鲜艳的色彩。
主体：年轻的东亚女性，喜悦的表情，回眸。
场景：山中湖（Yamanakako），湖边，富士山背景。
氛围：冬/春晨，"黄金时刻"或明亮的日光，视野清晰。
服装细节：白色绗缝羽绒服，粉色柔和围巾，预科生风格裙子，透明黑丝袜。
服装细节：白色绗缝羽绒服，粉色柔和围巾，预科生风格裙子，透明黑丝袜。
道具：Y2K风格银色数码相机。
技术：焦点锐利，8k分辨率，电影级光线，使用35mm镜头拍摄。
仅精确复制我的脸部。
prompt_en:
A high-quality, bright outdoor portrait of a young East Asian woman smiling warmly at the camera, standing on the rocky shore of Lake Yamanaka. In the background, a clear, majestic Mount Fuji with a snow-capped peak rises under a vibrant blue, cloudless sky. She is wearing a white puffer jacket, a soft pink knit scarf, a dark pleated mini skirt, and black translucent tights. She is holding a vintage silver digital camera with a beaded strap. The silver digital camera with a beaded strap. The lighting is crisp, natural morning sunlight, creating a fresh, travel-vibe aesthetic with high clarity and vivid colors."
Subject: Young East Asian woman, joyful expression, looking over shoulder.
Setting: Lake Yamanaka (Yamanakako), shore side, Mount Fuji background.
Atmosphere: Winter/Spring morning, "Golden Hour" or bright daylight, clear visibility.
Outfit Details: White quilted puffer, pink pastel scarf, preppy skirt, sheer black tights.
Outfit Details: White quilted puffer, pink pastel scarf, preppy skirt, sheer black tights.
Prop: Y2K aesthetic silver digicam.
Technical: Sharp focus, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, shot on 35mm lens.
COPY MY FACE ONLY EXACTLY.

title: 3D立体透视与复古手稿：原子核发现科学可视化
author: Gemini
prompt: 一张超写实的 4:5 微距照片，拍摄的是一本平放在深色天鹅绒博物馆底座上的古老科学手稿。左页“活的发现”展示了一个深邃的 3D 透视场景，描绘了原子核的发现过程。歐内斯特·卢瑟福（Ernest Rutherford），一位身穿 20 世纪初西装的写实 3D 人物，站在曼彻斯特昏暗的实验室里，注视着金箔实验装置。空气中漂浮着隐约发光的轨道和原子核符号。温暖的琥珀色光芒。右页“科学记录”是陈旧的羊皮纸，上面清晰地写着“原子核的发现”和“歐内斯特·卢瑟福”。墨水绘制了金箔实验和原子模型的图解。1911年。细节纹理丰富。

title: 极简主义剧场舞台
author: Nano banana
prompt: 描绘一个极简主义设计的戏剧舞台，只包含[关键道具，例如：一张长凳，几个人]。背景是一个简单的手绘海报，捕捉了[描述场景，例如：一个古朴的村庄，一片宁静的海滩，一条熙熙攘攘的城市街道]的精髓，强调[选择一个方面，例如：简洁性，艺术表现力，宁静]。灯光是[描述灯光，例如：柔和而低调，明亮而清晰，昏暗而忧郁]的，增强了背景的[背景的方面，例如：绘画质感，鲜艳色彩，主题深度]，并营造出一种[描述氛围，例如：宁静，戏剧性，亲密]的戏剧氛围。这种设置展示了极简舞台道具与手绘背景的[描述影响，例如：想象潜力，情感深度，视觉吸引力]之间的对比。
prompt_en: Depict a theatrical stage with a minimalist design, featuring only [key prop, e.g., a single bench, few people]. The backdrop is a simple, painted poster that captures the essence of [describe the scene, e.g., a quaint village, a serene beach, a bustling city street], emphasizing [choose an aspect, e.g., simplicity, artistic expression, tranquility]. The lighting is [describe the lighting, e.g., soft and subdued, bright and clear, dim and moody], enhancing the [aspect of the backdrop, e.g., painted quality, vibrant colors, thematic depth] of the backdrop and creating a [describe the ambiance, e.g., serene, dramatic, intimate] theatrical ambiance. This setup showcases the contrast between the minimal stage props and the [describe the impact, e.g., imaginative potential, emotional depth, visual appeal] of the painted backdrop

title: 日历插画
prompt:
请生成一张可爱、时尚的竖版(9:16)日历插画,风格为清新明快的手绘插画风:
一、插画要求:
人物为年轻时尚的女生形象,风格可爱灵动,采用水彩或手绘质感,色彩鲜艳柔和。
人物特征包括:大眼睛、圆润的红润脸颊,佩戴夸张时尚的配饰(如墨镜、圆环耳环、头巾、发带或蝴蝶结、毛线帽等),服装色彩明亮,人物姿势生动俏皮,身体比例适当夸张(如头部稍大、腰身纤细)。
根据节假日、"宜事项"或所处季节以及用户所在位置的特色元素,配套的人物造型穿着描述为:[{人物造型穿着描述}]
人物位于画面中央或偏右,为文字内容留出充分的留白空间。
背景纯白、极简,不含额外装饰元素,突出主体人物与文字。
二、日历元素布局:
上方正中央显著位置:公历日期数字[{公历日期数字}](字体大而醒目)
日期数字下方配有英文月份[{英文月份}]
日期左右两侧分别标注星期中英文[{星期中文}][{星期英文}]和农历日期及节假日[{农历日期中文}][{节假日}],布局左右对称,字体清晰优雅。
三、"宜"事项与励志句子:
左侧竖排粗体显示当天的[宜]事项:[{宜事项}],字体为简洁的手写毛笔体,略大,竖向排列。
[宜事项]右边以稍小字体竖向排列对应的励志治愈句子[{励志句子}]。
四、地点个性化元素:
根据用户当前位置或输入位置,适当在插画的人物穿着、配饰或细节上融入当地标志性元素或特色(如城市地标、气候特征、地域风情)。
整体说明:
所有占位符信息请根据用户输入或用户信息和系统信息自行检索生成
所有元素的布局要整齐、美观,保持适度的空间留白。
文字位置确保清晰易读,避免与插画重叠、遮挡。

title: Neoglo风格Logo
author: @aziz4ai
prompt:
为“[INDUSTRY TYPE]”行业中名为 “NAME” 的虚构初创公司设计一个 NeoGradient Soft Tech 风格的现代标志。

徽标必须包含：
•独特的抽象图标
•干净、大胆的无衬线标识
•平滑的发光渐变，混合了蓝色、紫色、粉红色、橙色和蓝绿色等鲜艳的颜色
•符号和文本之间的无缝协调
•极简主义、未来主义的构图
•在纯黑色背景上
•1：1 纵横比 — 超高清

prompt_en:
Design a modern logo in NeoGradient Soft Tech style for a fictional startup called “NAME” in the “[INDUSTRY TYPE]” industry.

The logo must include:
•A unique abstract icon
•A clean, bold sans-serif logotype
•Smooth glowing gradients blending vibrant colors like blue, purple, pink, orange, and teal
•Seamless harmony between symbol and text
•Minimalist, futuristic composition
•On a pure black background
•1:1 aspect ratio — ultra-HD

The logo should feel creative, modern, and ready for a bold digital brand.

title: AI智能体系统架构图
prompt:
一张学术论文级别的工程示意图，主题是AI智能体系统架构。黑白线稿风格，类似专利插图。横向构图，白底黑线。
画面严格分为垂直的三层：
上层（物理层）： 排列整齐的硬件图标，包括激光雷达、摄像头、GPU服务器和机械臂。
中层（核心逻辑）： 复杂的流程图，展示智能体的"大脑"。包含标有"LLM"、"Memory"、"Planning"的矩形框，中间有箭头连接表示数据流。
下层（环境层）： 抽象的网格地面，代表模拟环境，以及一些简单的建筑物轮廓代表真实世界。
整体风格：极简、矢量线条、无阴影、高对比度、教科书插图风格。

title: 一张超现实的微距照片
author: @Samann_ai
prompt: 创建一张超现实的微距照片，照片中一个约 10-12 厘米高的微小（角色），轻轻地放在真人的拇指和食指之间或放在指尖上。角色自然地触摸拇指以进行缩放并握住（配件）。工作室设置具有柔和的灰色渐变背景，微妙的散景。皮肤、织物和头发显示微观纹理；在手指与角色接触的地方添加准确的接触阴影。照明：45° 柔光箱，远端微弱的边缘光；无刺眼眩光。相机外观：100mm 微距 • f/2.8 • ISO 100 • 1/160s（浅景深；眼睛完美对焦）。手看起来干净，解剖自然，5 个手指，逼真的指甲和毛孔。除非身份另有要求，否则角色的服装是简单的纹理针织（深灰色）；比例和透视必须是真实的，而不是玩具。尊重地对待（角色），如果基于真人，则保持相似性。构图：以主体为中心，从躯干中部向上，用拇指和食指框住人物；
prompt_en: Create a hyper-real macro photograph of a tiny (CHARACTER) about 10–12 cm tall, gently held between a real human thumb and index finger or sitting on the fingertip. The character naturally touches the thumb for scale and holds (ACCESSORY). Studio setting with a soft grey gradient background, subtle bokeh. Skin, fabric and hair show micro-texture; add accurate contact shadows where fingers meet the character. Lighting: softbox at 45°, faint rim light on the far side; no harsh glare. Camera look: 100mm macro • f/2.8 • ISO 100 • 1/160s (shallow depth of field; eyes perfectly in focus). Hands look clean, natural anatomy, 5 fingers, realistic nails and pores. The character’s outfit is simple textured knit (dark grey) unless the identity demands otherwise; proportions and perspective must read real, not toy. Treat (CHARACTER) respectfully and keep likeness faithful if based on a real person. Composition: subject centered, from mid-torso up, with the thumb and index framing the character;

title: 边走边聊享受周末，探索AI与3D数字艺术的魅力

title: 四品牌纸艺拼贴广告
author: 两斤
prompt:
--- 一张无缝 16:9 全屏合成图像，被分割成四个独立的象限。**关键点：**四个部分直接相连。没有灰色背景。没有边框。没有缝隙。图像边缘到边缘都充满了纸张细节。

**构图：**分屏视图，深入探索四个不同的纸质世界。

1) **左上角（Luckin）：**一片神奇的纸质森林的广阔景象。蓝白相间的纸云和咖啡叶完全填满了这个象限。一只白色的纸鹿跃过茂密的纸片。

2) **右上角（Google）：**一个**“地形图”风格的纸质洞穴的广阔景象。“G”标志由**数百张**蓝、红、黄、绿四色薄纸**水平堆叠而成。它看起来像一个沉积峡谷或等高线地图。可以看到纸纤维和锋利的切割边缘。无塑料光滑感。

3) **左下角（可口可乐）：** 一幅红色纸张爆炸的全景图。可乐瓶是一个**负空间轮廓**——一个穿过厚厚红色纸张层层切割出的深孔。白色纸带横跨在空隙中。

4) **右下角（麦当劳）：** 一幅黄色纸张城市的全景图。垂直的黄色纸条（薯条）密密麻麻地排列在画面中。金色拱门从层层纸张深处升起。

**整体材质：** 所有材质均为哑光卡纸。

**光照：** 柔和均匀的摄影棚灯光，展现出纸张切割的深度。

**技术：** Octane渲染器，8K分辨率，--宽高比16:9 --风格化400 --无边框、无框架、无背景墙、独立对象、3D塑料、无缝纹理。
prompt_en:
调了一下午，都快给我调崩溃了
---
A seamless 16:9 full-frame composite image divided into four distinct quadrants. **CRITICAL:** The four sections touch each other directly. NO GREY BACKGROUND. NO BORDERS. NO GAPS. The image is filled edge-to-edge with paper details.
**Composition:** A split-screen view looking deep into four different paper worlds.
1) **Top-Left (Luckin):** A wide view of a magical paper forest. Blue and white paper clouds and coffee leaves fill the quadrant completely. A white paper stag leaps through the density.
2) **Top-Right (Google):** A wide view of a **"Topographic Map" style paper cavern**. The "G" logo is formed by **hundreds of thin sheets** of Blue, Red, Yellow, and Green paper stacked horizontally. It looks like a sediment canyon or a contour map. Visible paper fibers and sharp cut edges. NO plastic smoothness.
3) **Bottom-Left (Coke):** A wide view of a red paper explosion. The Coke bottle is a **Negative Space Silhouette**—a deep hole void cut through dense layers of red paper. White paper ribbons span across the void.
4) **Bottom-Right (McDonald's):** A wide view of a yellow paper city. Vertical strips of yellow paper (french fries) stand densely packing the frame. The Golden Arches rise from deep within the layers.
**Global Material:** Everything is matte cardstock.
**Lighting:** Soft, even studio lighting revealing the depth of the paper cuts.
**Tech:** Octane render, 8k, --ar 16:9 --stylize 400 --no borders, frames, background wall, isolated objects, 3d plastic, seamless texture

title: 品牌产品动物纹理高端广告照
author: Kerroudjm
prompt: 一张高质量的工作室照片，[品牌] 全身覆盖超逼真的 [动物] 纹理（例如毛皮、羽毛、皮肤或鳞片），置于柔和的中性背景中。在动物的自然表皮下，物体的原始形状、关键设计元素和品牌标识清晰可见。将品牌官方标识醒目地融入构图。自动生成引人注目且契合品牌形象的宣传语，该宣传语应从动物的特质中汲取象征性灵感，并与高端广告宣传的基调相符。图片必须构图清晰、阴影柔和、造型简约、灯光专业，并具有高度精细的纹理——每根毛发、鳞片或皱纹都应清晰可见。格式 1:1。
prompt_en: A high-quality studio photograph of a [BRAND] fully covered in ultra-realistic [ANIMAL] texture (e.g., fur, feathers, skin, or scales), placed against a soft neutral background. The object’s original shape, key design elements, and brand identity remain clearly visible beneath the animal’s organic surface. Integrate the official logo of the brand prominently into the composition. Automatically generate a compelling and brand-appropriate slogan that draws symbolic inspiration from the animal’s qualities and matches the tone of a premium advertising campaign. The image must feature clean composition, soft shadows, minimalist styling, professional lighting, and highly detailed textures—each hair, scale, or wrinkle should be visible in sharp detail. Format 1:1.

title: 折纸鹤教程信息图
author: nanoprompts.org
prompt: 创建一张信息图，说明"如何折纸鹤"。包含6个关键折叠步骤的分解图，标注折痕方向(山折/谷折)，采用极简线条风格。

title: 品牌童年教室场景
author: @TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一张逼真的电影照片，在昏暗的阁楼里，一件复古的[品牌名称]物品被从一堆尘封的旧儿童书中轻轻提起。该产品采用经典[品牌名称]风格设计，具有真实的图案、纹理或徽标（例如与品牌相关的花押字、压花或签名图案）。它被部分打开，露出了一个微型、温暖明亮的教室，灵感来自[国家]学校内部，配有小型区域风格的桌子、用[语言]书写的精致黑板，以及鞋子、海报或旗帜等传统的当地细节。一架纸飞机在半空中盘旋。灯光忧郁而怀旧，柔和的阴影和金色的亮点暗示着午后的阳光透过阁楼的横梁。在图像底部的封面上，[BRAND NAME]标志以优雅的钢笔书法风格书写——微妙，融入场景，不会掩盖主要主题。
prompt_en: A realistic, cinematic photograph of a vintage [BRAND NAME] item being gently lifted from a dusty stack of old children's books in a dimly lit attic. The item is designed in classic [BRAND NAME] style—featuring authentic patterns, textures, or logos (e.g. monograms, embossing, or signature motifs relevant to the brand). It is partially opened to reveal a miniature, warmly lit classroom inspired by [COUNTRY] school interiors, complete with small regional-style desks, a chalkboard with delicate handwriting in [LANGUAGE], and traditional local details like shoes, posters, or flags. A paper airplane hovers mid-air. The lighting is moody and nostalgic, with soft shadows and golden highlights suggesting afternoon light filtering through attic beams. On the top book cover at the bottom of the image, the [BRAND NAME] logo is written in an elegant, fountain-pen calligraphy style—subtle, integrated into the scene, and not obscuring the main subject.

title: 将X账户变成软盘

prompt_en: Transform my X account into a 1990s floppy disk.

prompt_en: Attach Image 1 onto the soda can in Image 2, and place it within a minimalist-designed setting. Professional photography.

title: 绝美可口可乐海报设计
author: -Zho-
prompt:
一张纵向（3∶4）4K 分辨率的极简未来主义展览海报，背景为超浅冷灰 #f4f4f4。

海报中心有一枚流体 3D metaball，形态为【立体可口可乐经典汽水瓶】，材质磨砂玻璃并带细腻颗粒噪点。 流体渐变：JCoca-Cola 红 #E41C23 → 珍珠白 #FFFFFF，呈现丝滑玻璃质感。

高位 softbox 柔光照明，投射长而柔的彩色阴影与淡淡光晕。

流体叠在文字之上，被遮挡的字母透过磨砂玻璃呈轻微高斯模糊。

· 主标题 “Coca-Cola” 经典红色 logo 位于中部，被唯一的流体部分遮挡；被遮挡的字母透过磨砂玻璃呈轻微高斯模糊。

· 副标题，Modern sans-serif 粗体全大写纯黑字体： “TASTE THE FEELING” 位于主标题下方，同样被流体局部覆盖并产生模糊，其余部分锐利。

整体留白干净、构图平衡、焦点锐利、HDR 高动态范围。
prompt_en:
一张纵向（3∶4）4K 分辨率的极简未来主义展览海报，背景为超浅冷灰 #f4f4f4。

海报中心有一枚流体 3D metaball，形态为【立体可口可乐经典汽水瓶】，材质磨砂玻璃并带细腻颗粒噪点。 流体渐变：JCoca-Cola 红 #E41C23 → 珍珠白 #FFFFFF，呈现丝滑玻璃质感。

高位 softbox 柔光照明，投射长而柔的彩色阴影与淡淡光晕。

流体叠在文字之上，被遮挡的字母透过磨砂玻璃呈轻微高斯模糊。

· 主标题 “Coca-Cola” 经典红色 logo 位于中部，被唯一的流体部分遮挡；被遮挡的字母透过磨砂玻璃呈轻微高斯模糊。

· 副标题，Modern sans-serif 粗体全大写纯黑字体： “TASTE THE FEELING” 位于主标题下方，同样被流体局部覆盖并产生模糊，其余部分锐利。

整体留白干净、构图平衡、焦点锐利、HDR 高动态范围。

title: 时尚服装拼贴画

prompt: 时尚情绪板拼贴画。用模特所穿单品的剪纸图案围绕肖像画。用俏皮的马克笔字体添加手写笔记和草图，并用英文标注每件单品的品牌名称和来源。整体美感应该兼具创意和可爱。
prompt_en: Fashion mood board collage. Surround the portrait with paper-cutout patterns of the clothing items worn by the model. Add handwritten notes and sketches using playful marker-style fonts, and label each item with its brand name and source in English. The overall aesthetic should be a blend of creativity and cuteness.

title: 马赛克彩色玻璃徽章

title: 浮空城艺术海报
author: Nano banana
prompt:
[数字艺术海报渲染，适用于 [城市名称]
图像的核心主体是一个漂浮在白云之上的微型岛屿，其形状酷似选定的城市，占据了大部分构图。岛屿的形状模仿了城市在地图上的地理轮廓，无缝地融合了城市独特的标志性地标、自然景观和文化元素。包含城市特有的鸟类、电影般的灯光和阴影、鲜艳的色彩、鸟瞰视角以及阳光反射效果。建筑不宜过多或过于密集。
岛屿展示了历史与现代的无缝融合。一部分展示了城市最具代表性的古代历史建筑；另一部分则平滑过渡到城市的标志性建筑和天际线景观。
岛屿漂浮在一片广阔的云海之上。云海以城市所在文化地区的传统艺术风格进行渲染。
城市名称的 3D 拼音或英文文本漂浮在微型岛屿之上，设计成生态与文化共存的微型生态装置。
在边缘和主体周围，叠加一层极简、优雅的信息排版层，具有博物馆展览面板的美感。使用经典的衬线字体作为主要信息，超细极简无衬线字体作为补充数据，研究并展示相关的城市信息。在构图的角落，以古典地图集或高端杂志封面页的风格排列排版。使用衬线字体标记城市的地理坐标、别名或建城年份，以及当前天气作为装饰性背景信息。整体布局应有充足的留白，克制、干净、平衡的排版，如同欣赏一件珍贵的艺术品。
风格要求：Octane Render, C4D, Isometric City, Micro World, Living Ecosystem, 8K Resolution。梦工厂风格，3D建模，细腻，柔和的光线投射。
这将是用于 AI 艺术生成工具的绝佳提示，或作为数字艺术家创作城市主题艺术品的简报！]
prompt_en:
Digital Art Poster Rendering for [City Name]
The core subject of the image is a miniature island floating above white clouds, shaped like the selected city and occupying most of the composition. The island's shape resembles the city's geographical outline on a map, seamlessly integrating the city's unique iconic landmarks, natural landscapes, and cultural elements. Include the city's distinctive birds, cinematic lighting and shadows, vibrant colors, aerial perspective, and sunlight reflection effects. Buildings should not be too numerous or densely packed.
The island showcases a seamless fusion of history and modernity. One section features the city's most representative ancient historical architecture; another section smoothly transitions to the city's landmark buildings and skyline views.
The island floats above a vast sea of clouds. The cloud sea is rendered in the traditional artistic style of the cultural region where the city is located.
3D text of the city's name in Pinyin or English floats above the miniature island, designed like a miniature ecological installation where ecology and culture coexist.
Around the edges and surrounding the main subject, overlay a minimalist, elegant information typography layer with museum exhibition panel aesthetics. Research and display relevant city information using classic serif fonts for primary information and ultra-thin minimalist sans-serif fonts for supplementary data. In the corners of the composition, arrange typography in the style of classical atlases or premium magazine title pages. Use serif fonts to mark the city's geographical coordinates, alternative names or founding year, and current weather as decorative background information. The overall layout should have abundant white space, restrained, clean, and balanced typography, as if appreciating a precious work of art.
Style Requirements: Octane Render, C4D, Isometric City, Micro World, Living Ecosystem, 8K Resolution. DreamWorks style, 3D modeling, delicate, soft light projection.
This would make an excellent prompt for AI art generation tools or as a brief for digital artists creating city-themed artwork!

title: 等距城市微缩模型
author: Nano banana
prompt:
呈现一个清晰的、45°俯视的等距微缩3D卡通场景，展示【城市】及其最具标志性的地标和建筑元素。使用柔和、精致的纹理，搭配逼真的PBR材质，以及温和、逼真的光影效果。将当前天气状况直接融入城市环境，营造沉浸式的氛围。
采用简洁、极简的构图，搭配柔和的纯色背景。

在顶部中心位置，放置大号粗体文字标题“[城市]”，下方是醒目的天气图标，然后是日期（小号文字）和温度（中号文字）。所有文字必须居中对齐，保持一致的间距，并且可以轻微地与建筑物的顶部重叠。
prompt_en:
Present a clear, 45° top-down isometric miniature 3D cartoon scene of [CITY], featuring its most iconic landmarks and architectural elements. Use soft, refined textures with realistic PBR materials and gentle, lifelike lighting and shadows. Integrate the current weather conditions directly into the city environment to create an immersive atmospheric mood.
Use a clean, minimalistic composition with a soft, solid-colored background.

At the top-center, place the title “[CITY]” in large bold text, a prominent weather icon beneath it, then the date (small text) and temperature (medium text). All text must be centered with consistent spacing, and may subtly overlap the tops of the buildings.

title: 品牌产品动物纹理创意广告
author: Mo
prompt: 一张高质量的影棚照片，展示了 {"brand name" "[BRAND]"} 产品，其表面完全覆盖着超逼真的 {"animal texture" "[ANIMAL]"} 纹理（例如，毛皮、羽毛、皮肤或鳞片），置于柔和的中性背景中。产品的原始形状、关键设计元素和品牌标识在动物的有机表面下依然清晰可见。将品牌的官方标志显著地融入构图中。自动生成一个引人注目且符合品牌调性的标语，该标语应从动物的特质中汲取象征性灵感，并与高端广告宣传的基调相符。图像必须构图简洁、阴影柔和、风格极简、光线专业，并具有高度精细的纹理——每一根毛发、每一片鳞片或每一道皱纹都应清晰可见。格式比例 1:1。
prompt_en: A high-quality studio photograph of a {"brand name" "[BRAND]"} fully covered in ultra-realistic {"animal texture" "[ANIMAL]"} texture (e.g., fur, feathers, skin, or scales), placed against a soft neutral background. The object’s original shape, key design elements, and brand identity remain clearly visible beneath the animal’s organic surface. Integrate the official logo of the brand prominently into the composition. Automatically generate a compelling and brand-appropriate slogan that draws symbolic inspiration from the animal’s qualities and matches the tone of a premium advertising campaign. The image must feature clean composition, soft shadows, minimalist styling, professional lighting, and highly detailed textures—each hair, scale, or wrinkle should be visible in sharp detail. Format 1:1.

title: 奇幻海滨咖啡馆
author: Nano banana
prompt: {"image_analysis": {    "subject": "一座迷人的、异想天开的两层建筑，很可能是一家商店或咖啡馆，漆成舒缓的柔和浅蓝色。建筑的门窗框架为柔和的粉红色，形成柔和的对比。一楼有一个主入口门、一个带有“SioPop！”字样的醒目展示窗、一个小窗户和一个白色遮阳篷。主门上方的标志写着“'POOR'”。各种盆栽植物、一个户外展示架和空调机组安装在外部。二楼有一个粉色框架的窗户。整体外观呈现出古雅、娃娃屋般的风格。",    "environment": "建筑坐落在一片原始的、非常浅色的地面上，类似于干净的沙子或铺砌区域，正对着平静、清澈的蓝色海洋，海洋一直延伸到地平线。左边是一根带有电线和小标志的木制电线杆。附近，一个带白色雨伞和矮椅的阴凉户外休息区，以及一辆自行车，增添了宁静的海岸风光。上方广阔的天空是明亮、清澈的粉彩蓝色，被一朵巨大、完美成形、蓬松的白色积云占据，这朵云显得不成比例地大且戏剧化，为场景增添了超现实、梦幻般的特质。气氛宁静、夏日、田园诗般。",    "lighting": "场景沐浴在柔和、漫射的自然日光中。太阳似乎高悬空中，投下非常微妙的阴影，表明这是一个明亮、清晰的日子，没有刺眼的对比。光线均匀柔和，营造出宁静宜人的氛围。",    "technical_specs": "该图像呈现出一种具有强烈精心策划美学的照片写实艺术风格，可能是高质量的 3D 渲染或精心构图的照片。构图宽广而平衡，捕捉了建筑主体和广阔的自然元素。色彩略微去饱和但充满活力，营造出独特的粉彩调色板。细节清晰锐利，表明分辨率高且景深深。",    "colors": {        "primary_palette": [            "柔和浅蓝（建筑、天空、海洋）",            "柔和粉红（门、窗框、户外家具点缀）",            "白色/奶油色（云、地面、遮阳篷、雨伞）"        ],        "secondary_palette": [            "棕色（电线杆、自行车、花盆）",            "绿色（植物叶子）",            "深蓝色（远处的海洋）"        ],        "overall_impression": "和谐宁静的粉彩配色方案，唤起平静和梦幻的感觉。"    }},"generated_prompt": "一座迷人的、异想天开的两层建筑，细节一丝不苟，漆成舒缓的柔和浅蓝色。建筑的门窗框架为柔和的粉红色，一楼有一个主入口、一个带有“SioPop！”字样的展示窗和一个小窗户，所有这些都由白色遮阳篷遮盖。主门上方的标志写着“'POOR'”。各种盆栽植物和户外展示架装饰着外部。二楼有一个粉色框架的窗户。这座古雅的建筑坐落在一片原始的、近乎白色的沙质或铺砌地面上，正对着地平线上平静、清澈的蓝色海洋。左边是一根木制电线杆，旁边是一个带白色雨伞和矮椅的阴凉户外休息区，以及一辆停放的自行车。广阔、明亮的粉彩蓝色天空被一朵巨大、完美成形、蓬松的白色积云占据，营造出戏剧化和超现实的背景。整个场景沐浴在柔和、漫射的自然日光中，投下微妙的阴影，营造出宁静、梦幻般的氛围。照片写实、高度详细、干净、粉彩调色板、海岸、夏日、田园诗般、高分辨率、娃娃屋美学、异想天开。","negative_prompt": [    "低质量",    "模糊",    "失焦",    "丑陋",    "变形",    "毁容",    "文字（特定商店名称除外）",    "水印",    "签名",    "刺眼的阴影",    "黑暗",    "阴沉",    "单色",    "黑白",    "杂乱",    "凌乱",    "颗粒感",    "噪点",    "构图差",    "不真实的比例（云的艺术夸张除外）"]}

author: Error_HTTP_404
prompt: 在白色背景上生成前、后、左、右、上、下视图。均匀分布。一致的主体。等距透视等效
